s, and scheduling

title: No Experience Required | 100% Remote | Entry-Level Virtual Assistant
description:
Are you looking for a stable, long-term career opportunity where you work directly with a US-based real estate company, learn real-world skills, and grow with a team that values reliability, structure, and integrity?



If you’re looking for:



--> Consistent pay

--> Long-term stability

--> World-class on-the-job training



This role is built for you.



We are a small, family-owned real estate company in the United States with a long-term remote team (in the Philippines since 2018).



What we value:



--> Accuracy over speed – mistakes cost real money

--> Integrity – honesty matters here

--> Consistency – we reward people who show up every day

--> Coachability – you’ll receive feedback and training

--> Long-term thinking – we invest in people who plan to stay and grow with the company and reap financial rewards as the company grows. We have very big plans for the company and where we want to take it.



These values directly shape your role. You won’t be thrown into chaos — you’ll be trained, supported, and expected to perform at a high level.



This is a jack-of-all-trades VA role, trained fully in-house. No prior experience is required.



Your top responsibilities:



--> Real Estate Research & Due Diligence

--> Data verification and organization

--> Attention to detail is critical — errors have real financial impact

--> Phone Calls & US-Based Outreach (Training Provided)

--> Calling US customers and local offices

--> Following scripts and systems

--> Professional and clear communication

--> Photo/Video editing (Training Provided)



This role is for people who want stability and growth — not shortcuts.



Compensation



--> $3/hour (~$650+ USD/month full-time)

--> Yearly raises

--> Performance-based bonuses

--> Paid consistently and on time



Schedule



--> 8-9 hour shifts starting at 10:00 AM ET (New York time)

--> 6 days/week (Mon–Fri + 1 weekend day of your choice)

--> Overtime opportunities available

--> 100% work from home



Requirements



--> Fast & stable internet

--> Reliable laptop or desktop computer



Who This Role Is For (And Not For)



This role is a strong fit if you are:



--> Highly detail-oriented

--> Honest, Loyal and take pride in your work

--> Comfortable following systems and instructions

--> Willing to work very hard with no downtime

--> Coachable and open to feedback

--> Serious about long-term employment



This role is not for people looking for:



--> Easy work

--> Short-term contracts

--> Freelance flexibility

--> Minimal responsibility



How to Apply (Required — Read Carefully)



Applications without ALL items below will NOT be reviewed.



Please submit:



--> Your current resume



--> Test #1

Take this test and provide a screenshot of your results:

app. testdome. com/screening/challenge/184?hard=false

(remove spaces)



--> Test #2

Take this test and provide a screenshot of your results:

iqtestfree. io

(remove spaces)



--> Tell us one interesting thing about yourself



Share test results via Google Drive or Dropbox

Files must be set to public access



IMPORTANT NOTES (Read Carefully)



Applications without test results are automatically disqualified



If using Google Drive, ensure public permissions are enabled



Only serious, detail-oriented candidates should apply

title: Creative Specialist – Video Editor
description:
BENEFITS

• Paid 13th Month

• Pag-IBIG Contribution

• SSS Contribution

• Flexible Schedule

• Paid Time Off

• Work Anniversary PTO Bonus

• Philippine Holiday Time Off

• Paid Birthdays Off

• Paid Every Friday via Wise. WE COVER THE FEES!

• Bonuses Paid

• Software Provided



JOB OVERVIEW



Murray Marketing Services is looking for a Creative Specialist to join our team and support client campaigns and internal projects. This new role is ideal for someone who loves video editing, creating ad concepts, and building digital marketing assets. You’ll work directly with the owner (Nathan) as his creative right-hand, helping bring marketing ideas to life.



Bonuses will be paid on top of wages as we grow and win. I want to share our success with you!



COMPANY



Murray Marketing Services LLC

(USA | Remote)



About Us



Launched in 2021 and based in Knoxville, Tennessee, Murray Marketing Services is a growing digital marketing agency that partners with service-based businesses. We specialize in Google Ads, paid social, website design (Duda, WordPress, Shopify, GoHighLevel), AI system integrations,
 marketing, and SEO. Currently run by the founder, Nathan (26), we’re expanding with a Creative Specialist to help us deliver next-level results.



Why Join Us?



Creative Focus: Work on exciting projects that include ad design, editing, and digital campaign support. Being a small team of the founder, Executive Assistant, and a Digital Marketing Support Specialist, you'll have a great mix of clients and creative work that keeps your days interesting and hopefully fun.



Ground-Floor Opportunity: Collaborate directly with the founder and be part of a fast-growing agency.



Skill Growth: Gain real-world experience with tools like Eleven Labs, Canva, CapCut, and AI platforms like Ideogram and Arcads.



Flexible & Remote: Work from anywhere, flexibility to your preferred shift time, with consistent communication via Google Chat,
, and Google Meet.



Room to Grow: Opportunity to expand hours, pay, and responsibilities as the agency continues to scale.





CORE RESPONSIBILITIES:



Video & Audio Production



• Edit short-form videos (Reels, TikTok, YouTube Shorts) using CapCut Pro, Canva Pro, Premiere Pro, or similar tools.

• Add captions, music, transitions, and branding to optimize for social platforms.

• Use AI voiceover tools (Eleven Labs or similar) to create high-quality audio for ads.



Creative Strategy Support



• Brainstorm ad angles, creative hooks, and campaign themes.

• Assist in testing new creative formats and tracking what works.

• Brainstorm social media content and captions for both Murray Marketing Services LLC and our clients.

• Guidance and training provided where necessary.



Key Qualifications



• English Proficiency: Strong written/spoken communication skills.

• Video Editing: Strong experience with CapCut, Adobe Premiere, or similar.

• AI Tools: Willingness to learn AI tools like ChatGPT, Ideogram, and Arcads.

• Reliability: Must be proactive and dependable.

• Creativity: Willing to come up with ideas on your own at times.



Compensation & Hours



• Rate: $1000 - $1200+ USD/month (depending on skills & experience).

• Hours: 30-40 hours per week (6-8 hours/day depending on skills & experience). If you are very skilled, this will grow quickly.

• Contract Basis: Independent Contractor.



How to Apply



Please send:

1. Your resume.

2. Portfolio samples (video ads, organic social media content).

3. A short introduction explaining why this role excites you.





If it’s a fit, we’ll set up a video introduction call!

title: Data Assistant
description:
Job Description:

We are a growing independent insurance agency seeking a reliable, detail-oriented Virtual Assistant (VA) to assist with daily tasks and support quoting operations using EZLynx. If you are proactive, enjoy working with insurance tools, and have a strong attention to detail, we’d love to hear from you! This is a remote, long-term position where you can work from the comfort of your home.



Key Responsibilities:



Quoting Assistance: Assist in creating, updating, and managing insurance quotes using the EZLynx platform for various insurance lines (Auto, Home, Commercial, etc.).

Customer Data Management: Input and maintain client information, ensuring accuracy in every entry.

Daily Administrative Tasks: Handle routine administrative duties including scheduling,
 correspondence, data entry, and managing documents.

Quote Comparison: Help compare quotes from multiple carriers and ensure customers receive the best options available.

Follow-Up & Communication: Assist with customer follow-ups, answering questions, and providing status updates on quotes and policies.

Organizational Support: Maintain organized files, records, and workflows to ensure smooth operations for the agency.

Skills and Qualifications:



Attention to Detail: Must be highly accurate in data entry, quoting, and document management.

Strong Communication Skills: Fluent in written and spoken English to interact with clients and the team effectively.

Insurance Knowledge: Previous experience in the insurance industry is preferred but not mandatory. Familiarity with insurance products (Auto, Home, Commercial) is a plus.

Tech-Savvy: Comfortable with various software tools (Google Suite, Microsoft Office, etc.), and a quick learner of new platforms.

Time Management: Ability to work independently, manage tasks, and meet deadlines without supervision.

Reliable Internet Connection: Must have a stable internet connection for smooth communication and task execution.

Preferred but Not Required:



Experience in handling customer inquiries and providing customer service.

Knowledge of other insurance management systems or rating platforms.

Previous VA experience in the insurance industry.



Our hours are: 9:00-5:00PM EST 



What We Offer:



Salary is paid every 2 Weeks via Wise 

Paid US Holidays

Paid PTO 

Paid Vacation

Paid Sick Time 



HOW TO APPLY?    Submit your Resume & send us a LOOM video answering the following questions:  Why are you interested in working with our insurance agency?   Describe why you are the perfect fit to join our team.  What do you enjoy to do on your time off? Interests/Hobbies.

description:

title: Shopify Ecommerce Operations Manager
description:
NOTE: Please do not apply unless you have at least 1 year of experience working with DTC or ecommerce brands.



We are looking for a senior Ecommerce Operations Manager with strong Shopify experience to oversee the day-to-day operations of a growing DTC brand. This is a full-time, remote freelance role focused on keeping the online store, fulfillment pipeline, and operational systems running smoothly while improving speed, accuracy, compliance, and customer experience.



Company: The Lion Advisory

Website: 



Language: English

Availability: Full Time, 40 hours per week

Time Zone: AEST

Work Type: Freelance, Remote, Flexible Hours

Niche: Performance-Focused DTC, Ecommerce, Shopify

Payment: $ 2,000 - $ 4,000

Role Details: Operations Manager, Ecommerce (Shopify)



Responsibilities



-Manage the daily operations of the Shopify store to ensure listings, pricing, promotions, and overall store performance are accurate and up to date

-Oversee the full order process from checkout to dispatch, tracking, returns, and issue resolution with a focus on speed and accuracy

-Build, document, and improve SOPs across inventory management, warehouse workflows, and 3PL coordination

-Forecast demand and manage stock levels across SKUs to avoid stockouts and reduce excess inventory

-Track and improve core operational KPIs such as fulfillment time, shipping cost, COGS, return rate, and customer satisfaction

-Manage the operational tech stack, including Shopify apps and key integrations, to automate workflows and reduce manual tasks

-Work closely with marketing to support campaign launches, seasonal promotions, and subscription or recurring order programs

-Manage relationships with carriers, suppliers, packaging partners, and 3PLs while maintaining service quality as the business grows

-Identify operational issues that affect customer experience and implement fixes that improve retention and satisfaction

-Ensure operations follow relevant Australian compliance requirements for regulated health or therapeutic products sold online



Must-Haves



-5 to 8+ years of ecommerce operations experience, ideally in regulated categories such as health, wellness, supplements, or similar

-Strong hands-on Shopify experience, including admin workflows, app ecosystem knowledge, and platform limitations

-Proven experience managing fulfillment operations, inventory planning, and 3PL relationships at scale in Australia

-Strong analytical skills with experience in KPI reporting, dashboards, and data-driven decision-making

-Experience with ecommerce operations tools such as ShipStation, Starshipit, Cin7, TradeGecko, QuickBooks Commerce, or -similar platforms

-Strong project management skills with the ability to handle multiple workstreams and meet deadlines

-Process improvement mindset with a track record of identifying issues and implementing long-term fixes

-Working knowledge of Australian compliance requirements for regulated health or therapeutic goods sold online, including TGA-related considerations



Nice to Haves



-Experience in telehealth, pharmaceutical, medtech, or other regulated industries

-Familiarity with subscription or recurring ecommerce operations and logistics

-Familiarity with Shopify ecosystem tools like Klaviyo, Recharge, or loyalty platforms

-Experience working in founder-led or high-growth businesses where systems and processes are still being built



Benefits



-Competitive pay based on experience

-High ownership role with direct access to leadership

-Flexible remote work setup

-Opportunity to build and improve systems in a growing company

-Access to company products or services where applicable

title: Executive Assistant – Operational Support
description:
We are looking for a highly organized, proactive Virtual Assistant to support daily operations and ensure consistent follow-through across the business.

This role goes beyond completing tasks, you will help bring structure, clarity, and accountability to a fast-moving environment. You will act as the central point of coordination, ensuring communication is clear, priorities are tracked, and nothing falls through the cracks.



This role operates within 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM EST.

Compensation is hourly and based on active work performed.

Availability during this window is expected, with flexibility depending on workload. When work is light, you may shift focus to other commitments or coordinate an early clock-out. Work load is expected to increase with integration and  as trust is built. 



Qualifications:

Character – High Trust

 You are reliable and honest.  You handle responsibility with care, especially when managing sensitive business information.

Teachable – Humility

You are open to feedback, willing to learn, and able to adjust quickly.

Competence – Experience

You have experience in administrative, operational, or coordination roles and can confidently manage tasks, communication, and organization.

This role involves access to highly sensitive business information. Integrity, discretion, and consistency are non-negotiable.



Core Responsibilities:

Track tasks, deadlines, and follow-ups across the business

Ensure consistent execution through reminders, check-ins, and accountability

Manage and organize communication 
, messaging, team coordination)

Support scheduling, logistics, and daily operational flow

Maintain accurate records, reports, and internal tracking systems

Monitor key items (documents, deadlines, reporting) and flag issues early

Identify gaps or breakdowns and bring proactive solutions



What Success Looks Like:

Nothing is missed, dropped, or forgotten

Communication is clear, timely, and proactive

The business operates with greater structure and consistency

The owner is able to stay focused, prepared, and ahead



****Application Requirements:*** 

To be considered, please complete ALL of the following:

Please send a short video introducing yourself and answering the following questions (Loom or Google Drive Link only).



1. Please introduce yourself.

Share your name, age, and a brief overview of your current background or life situation (for example: student, working professional, career transition, etc.).



2. Written Response (3–5 sentences)

Describe a time when something was at risk of falling through the cracks.

 What did you do to ensure it was handled successfully?  (3-5 Sentences)



AI Policy: AI tools are encouraged to assist with writing, organization, or research tasks. However, we prefer that it NOT be used for direct communication with  tea
mbers. We are committed to genuine human connection, ensuring all interactions feel authentic and organic. We are not looking for PERFECT, we are looking for Human. :)



Requirements:

* Excellent written & verbal English.

* Access to a physical computer (not mobile-only).

* A reliable backup plan for power or internet interruptions (e.g., secondary connection or device).

* If selected, a background check will be requested



Why This Role Matters

This role is built on a simple principle: when the leader is supported well, the entire business benefits. Your role is to help create that support. When you do this role well, you are not just completing tasks, you are helping someone operate at a higher level. Their success becomes your success.

If you’re someone who takes pride in doing things well, communicates clearly, and values being someone others can rely on, we’d love to hear from you. Please send us a message with your loom link, written response and your
.

title: Executive assistant to Business Advisor
description:
About the Role



I run The Granite Table — a business advisory firm that partners with small business owners to build systems that run without them at the center. I work across multiple client engagements simultaneously, which means my time is best spent advising, building, and closing — not managing my inbox, my calendar, chasing follow-ups, or figuring out what to post on LinkedIn.



I need an assistant who can step into that gap and own it.



This is the first hire inside my business. You won't just be executing tasks — you'll be learning how I think, learning my voice, and helping me stay consistent and accountable as the business grows. There's real room to grow here for the right person.



---



What You'll Do



• Draft and schedule LinkedIn posts based on my ideas, notes, and voice — I'll give you the raw material, you make it ready to post

• Send outreach messages and connection requests to business professionals on my behalf — not cold spam, warm and intentional

• Schedule calls, meetings, and networking sit-downs and manage my calendar end-to-end

• Keep my open task list organized and follow up on items that are sitting too long

• Hold me accountable to my weekly priorities and flag when something is slipping

• Handle administrative tasks — applications, research, platform setup, and similar items that need attention but not my direct involvement



---



What I'm Looking For



• Strong written English — you'll be communicating as an extension of me

• Comfortable with technology and actively uses AI tools in your work — this is non-negotiable

• Experience managing social media or professional outreach, LinkedIn preferred

• Organized, proactive, and comfortable working independently without being managed

• Reliable internet connection and availability for occasional overlap with US Mountain Time

• Someone who wants to grow with a business, not just fill a role

title: Short-form video editor for DTC brand
description:
About us

Honeybalm is a fast-growing DTC lip care brand selling internationally. We test and launch a lot of creatives monthly across Meta, TikTok, YouTube, and Snapchat. We're scaling our in-house creative team and looking for editors who live and breathe short-form direct response video.



What you'll do

- Edit short-form ads (15–60 seconds) for Meta, TikTok, and YouTube Shorts

- Cut multiple ad variants from each raw creator package (different hooks, formats, angles)

- Build hook libraries, pattern interrupts, and text overlay systems that scale

- Work directly with our Creative Strategists on briefs and iteration cycles

- Hit deadlines without sacrificing quality, week after week



What we're looking for

- 2+ years editing DTC/e-commerce ads (Meta, TikTok, not corporate, not weddings)

- Portfolio of ads you've made that have run at scale, with brand names you can share

- Fluent in CapCut / Premiere Pro; bonus if you know After Effects

- Obsession with the first 3 seconds (hook); you can explain why a hook works, not just that it does

- Fast turnaround, fast communication

- Strong English (fluent)

- Self-managed, urgent and reliable



IMPORTANT: if all goes well, we will integrate a bonus structure after 3 months of work where you can earn $500 per winning ad that you have edited (+50k in spend). There is no limit on how much bonus you can receive.



How to apply: Send us:

- 3 short-form ads you've edited that have run on Meta or TikTok. Include the brand name and (if you know it) approximate ad spend or performance.

- Your experience explained

- Why you think this is a job that fits you

title: Senior Video Editor (Luxury Real Estate)
description:
Senior Video Editor (Luxury Real Estate)



Full-Time Position



We are a luxury real estate media company seeking a full-time Senior Video Editor who specializes in crafting high-end, cinematic property films. This role is for a highly skilled professional who understands storytelling, pacing, and premium color—and can consistently deliver polished, luxury-level video content.



About the Role



As our Senior Video Editor, you will be responsible for editing a steady volume of luxury real estate videos, including cinematic property tours, agent-led videos, and brand storytelling content.



Every project should reflect a refined, high-end aesthetic—clean edits, intentional pacing, natural yet elevated color grading, and seamless motion. This is not a template-driven role. We value precision, consistency, and creative craftsmanship.



Required Expertise

- 8+ years of professional video editing experience (senior level)

- Strong background in:

- Luxury real estate video editing

- Cinematic property tours

- Agent/on-camera videos

- Story-driven brand content



Advanced expertise in:

- High-end color grading (natural, clean, luxury tone)

- DaVinci Resolve (required)

- Speed ramping and motion timing

- Music-driven editing and pacing

- Clean, professional captioning for social and branding



Deep understanding of:

- Visual storytelling and narrative flow

- Shot selection and sequencing

- Matching footage across multiple cameras and lighting conditions

- Maintaining consistency across projects and clients



Technical Requirements / Advanced proficiency in:

- DaVinci Resolve (primary editing platform)

- Strong working knowledge of:

- Color management and node-based grading workflows

- Export settings for social media, MLS, and high-end marketing use



Strictly no reliance on:

AI-generated edits

Auto-cutting or template-based platforms



What We’re Looking For



A dedicated full-time editor—not a freelancer splitting attention. 

Someone who understands luxury pacing—when to slow down, when to build energy 

Strong attention to detail (no sloppy cuts, mismatched color, or over-editing) 

Ability to create emotion-driven edits, not just compile clips 

Reliable communication and consistent turnaround times

Alignment with a premium, luxury brand aesthetic



Nice to Have

Experience editing $1M+ luxury listings

Familiarity with real estate marketing trends and agent branding

Experience working with drone footage and gimbal-based walkthroughs



What Success Looks Like



Videos feel intentional, cinematic, and elevated

Agents look natural, confident, and well-paced on camera

Every project reinforces a luxury brand standard

Consistent quality across high volume without sacrificing detail

title: Facebook Page Manager & Community Engagement VA — US Home Services
description:
Pay: Competitive, based on experience and skills demonstrated during paid trial. We pay above market for exceptional talent and reward loyalty with raises as we grow. This is a long-term role with a fast-growing US startup, not a one-off project.

Schedule: Full-Time (40 hrs/week), must overlap US Eastern hours minimum 4 hours/day

Start: IMMEDIATELY — this is our Day 1 hire, pages need to start warming up now



Who We Are:

US-based startup launching a marketing platform for home service businesses (plumbers, HVAC, roofers, painters, etc.) across 50 US cities. We're building a network of regional
 business pages and need someone to manage, grow, and engage from these pages starting Day 1.



What You'll Do:



Page Warming & Setup (Week 1-2):

- Help set up and brand 8-
 business pages in Meta Business Suite

- Add profile photos, cover images, business info, and CTAs to each page

- Post 2-3 organic posts per day to each page timeline (we provide content templates)

- Begin following and engaging with local business pages in each market



Group Discovery & Joining (Week 1-3):

- Search
 for every contractor, home services, community, neighborhood, and trade-specific group in your assigned markets

- Log every group (500+ members) into our discovery spreadsheet: name, URL, member count, type, activity level, admin rules, posting rules

- Join groups at 10-15 per day per page (slow ramp to avoid flags)

- Target: 50-100+ groups per market cluster



Group Engagement (Week 3+):

- Comment on posts in groups — helpful, valuable comments that build our reputation

- Follow our 2:1 commenting strategy: 2 value comments, then 1 soft mention of our business

- Post content to groups: territory maps, tips, polls, case studies (we provide content, you schedule and post)

- Monitor for trigger posts from homeowners asking for contractor recommendations

- When we have paying clients: recommend our clients by name when relevant — screenshot and log every referral



Ongoing:

- Manage inbound DMs on regional pages (until AI automation is connected)

- Report weekly: groups joined, posts made, comments, DMs received, engagement metrics

- Follow posting limits strictly — never exceed safe daily thresholds

- Keep content unique across pages and groups — no copy-paste blasts



What You Need:

- Deep familiarity with
 — groups, pages, Marketplace, Meta Business Suite

- Experience managing business pages (not just personal profiles)

- Understands
's posting limits, group rules, and how to avoid getting flagged

- Can write natural, conversational comments that don't sound like a bot or a sales pitch

- Detail-oriented — logging every group, every referral, every metric matters

- Reliable internet, laptop/desktop (not phone-only), quiet workspace

- Strong English writing skills — your comments represent our brand



For Spanish-Bilingual Role (LATAM candidates):

- Native Spanish speaker (Colombian, Venezuelan, or Mexican preferred)

- Conversational English for team communication

- Understanding of Hispanic contractor communities in the US

- Experience with or willingness to learn WhatsApp group engagement

- Comfortable navigating cultural differences across US Hispanic markets (Miami vs Houston vs San Antonio)



Bonus:

- Experience with Planable, Hootsuite, or any social media scheduling tool

- Managed multiple
 pages simultaneously

- Experience in home services, real estate, or contractor marketing



To Apply:

English applicants: Send me links to 2
 business pages you've managed. Tell me the biggest group you've engaged in and what you posted.



Spanish applicants: Same as above, plus record a 60-second voice note in Spanish introducing yourself and telling me about the last
 page or 
 group you managed.



Trial Task:

Search
 for every contractor, home services, and community group in Fort Myers, Florida with 500+ members. Deliver a spreadsheet with group name, URL, member count, type, and whether the group allows business page posts. Deadline: 48 hours.

This is not a beginner role. We are looking for someone who can perform immediately and grow with the business.

title: AI Email Designer Needed
description:
Hello there!



We are a growing
 Marketing Agency with 60+ active e-commerce clients looking for an enthusiastic and skilled
 Designer.



This is a part-time role where you will be working alongside our current team of 50+.



PLEASE ONLY APPLY IF YOU ARE A STRONG
 DESIGNER WHO BUILDS FINAL DESIGNS IN FIGMA AND USES AI 



We are looking for a top-tier
 designer first and foremost. Your main job is to design beautiful, high-converting
s inside Figma for our DTC clients across health, beauty, supplements, pet care, apparel, jewelry, and faith-based brands.



We need someone who consistently hits deadlines and produces polished, on-brand, scroll-stopping
 designs every single time.



These designs will be made for individual
 sends across our client roster. Our
 designs are typically short to medium in length and will always be based on each client's website branding. All text copy will be provided for the design.



The final output for every
 design must be built and exported from Figma at 1000px width with grouped, editable blocks. Figma is your home base.



As a secondary part of the role, you should know how to use AI image generation tools like Nano Banana Pro, Midjourney, Flux, or similar to create supporting visuals when a client does not have a strong asset library to pull from.



This includes things like hero images, lifestyle shots, background scenes, and supporting product visuals.



You will use these tools to prompt and generate the imagery, then bring everything back into Figma to assemble the final
 design. AI image generation is a supporting skill, not the main job.



Here are examples of the level (and beyond) we expect you to design at:




/drive/folders/1xSeK67_uBRNsUTy8u_IZSb-fbHDZHvZU?usp=drive_link



Your designs should match this quality at minimum and ideally exceed it in layout creativity, hierarchy, typography, and visual storytelling.



 



Requirements:



- Minimum 2-year
 design experience



- Highly proficient in Figma (this is the most important requirement)



- Strong understanding of brand identity, color theory, typography, and direct-response design



- Able to take a brand's website and translate its look and feel into a polished
 design



- Working knowledge of AI image generation tools (Nano Banana Pro preferred, or Midjourney, Flux, Sora, etc.) for creating supporting imagery when client assets are limited



- Proficient in English



- Proficient with Slack for team communication



- Able to work weekdays and weekends



 



Bonus Points:



- Experience designing
s inside Klaviyo, 
, or Iterable



- Strong eye for direct-response design (CTA hierarchy, scannability, visual flow)



- Experience working with brands that have minimal asset libraries



- Familiarity with Claude (claude.ai) for design ideation, SVG generation, or layout variations



 



Your tasks as an
 Designer will include:



1. Build polished, on-brand
 designs in Figma using the text copy and brand references we provide



2. Match each brand's identity perfectly, from typography to color palette to overall mood



3. Use AI image generation tools (Nano Banana Pro, etc.) to create supporting visuals such as hero images, lifestyle shots, and background scenes when client assets are limited, then bring those visuals into Figma to finalize the design



4. Design up to 5
s per day (the majority will typically be for one or two clients so the workflow stays efficient)



5. Export all final designs from Figma at 1000px width with grouped, editable blocks



6. Communicate progress and revisions with the team in Slack



7. Complete all tasks daily before 3 PM PH time



 



We ask that you answer the questions below to help us get to know you.



Questions:



1. Have you designed for
 marketing before? If yes, for how long?



2. Do you have examples of
 designs you have built in Figma we can review? Please link
 designs only (no other design work).



3. How would you approach designing an
 for a brand whose entire visual identity you are seeing for the first time? Walk us through your process from website to finished Figma file.



4. Have you used AI image generation tools (Nano Banana Pro, Midjourney, Flux, Sora, etc.) to create supporting imagery for a design? If yes, please share 1 to 2 examples of AI visuals you generated and how you incorporated them into a final design.



5. How do you keep AI-generated imagery from looking generic or "AI-ish" so it blends naturally with a real brand identity?



6. How long would it take you to build a fully designed
 in Figma if all the copy and brand references are provided?



7. Can you work mornings (8 AM to 12 PM PH time)?



8. Can you commit to at least 6 months if selected?



9. Can you work at least 2 hours on weekends?



10. Have you worked for an
 Marketing agency or e-commerce team before?



11. How do you keep your designs feeling fresh across multiple campaigns for the same brand without falling into repetitive layouts?



 



We are looking to grow very quickly over the next few months and this position will allow for opportunities to move into incentive-based pay and a salary increase. After 3 months, there will be a salary increase.



We ask that if you do provide examples, they be relevant to what the job describes.



Biweekly Pay: $150 CAD



Hours: 4 Hours Per day, some days it will be less than 4 graphics to make :)



Currently, you must be able to work at least 20hrs/week (including weekends)



 



*** HOW TO APPLY ***



*You must include your favorite color + ai tool in the subject line of your application for it to be considered (this shows you actually read it and is very important; if you do not have it in there, your application will be skipped).



1.) Send us a message answering all 11 questions



2.) Include examples of your Figma
 design work



3.) Include 1 to 2 examples of AI-generated imagery you have used inside a real design (if applicable)



We look forward to hearing from you!

mbers and actively look for ways to help you grow, take on more responsibility, and develop your skills over time.

The success of new client onboarding

The accuracy and reliability of our systems

The efficiency of our internal operations

The overall client experience

WHY WE’RE A GREAT PLACE TO WORK

We value tea
mbers who take ownership of their work, pay attention to detail, and care about doing things the right way.

THE VALUES WE STAND BY

Details matter

NOW THE IMPORTANT PART – HOW YOU CAN APPLY:

Orion - Ascend Innovation

title: Proofreader / Quality Control Specialist (Video Content Agency)
description:
We run a fast-growing short-form content agency that creates high-volume video content for founders, coaches, and personal brands.



We’re looking for a Proofreader / Quality Control Specialist whose entire job is to catch mistakes before content goes live.



This is not a creative role. This is for someone who is borderline obsessive about detail and notices things other people miss.



You’ll be responsible for reviewing video content end-to-end and flagging issues such as:



Spelling mistakes in captions/subtitles/on-screen text

Grammar mistakes

Incorrect punctuation

Editing mistakes

Missing captions

Wrong names/titles/company references

Bad formatting

Audio issues

Visual glitches

Timing issues

Anything that makes content look sloppy or unprofessional



You must be willing to watch videos in full from start to finish. No skimming.



We produce a high volume of content, so speed matters, but accuracy matters more.



Requirements:



Previous experience in proofreading, quality control, quality assurance, copy editing, or a similar detail-focused role

Fluent/native-level English

Extremely high attention to detail

Able to spot small mistakes quickly

Comfortable reviewing large volumes of content consistently

Reliable and highly organized

Experience reviewing video content is a big plus



Nice to have:



Experience with short-form content (TikTok, Instagram Reels, YouTube Shorts)

Familiarity with video editing workflows

Experience using tools like 
, Google Docs, ClickUp, Slack, etc.



Your role will look like:



Receive completed videos from our editing team

Watch each video fully

Flag every issue before client delivery/posting

Work with editors/project managers to ensure fixes are made

Maintain high quality standards across all client accounts



We need someone who takes pride in catching things that everyone else misses.



If you apply, put BLUE at the top of your application so we know you actually read this.



Also include:



Your experience in proofreading/QA

Any experience reviewing video content

Why you’re a good fit for a detail-heavy role

Your timezone

Your weekly availability



If you’re careless, this role will be painful.



If you’re exceptionally detail-oriented, you’ll do very well.

About Tactical Despatch

Tactical Despatch is a fast-growing, premium same-day logistics company based in the UK. We operate a highly reliable fleet, ranging fro
rcedes Sprinters to specialised Lutons with Tail Lifts. We pride ourselves on our tech-driven approach, guaranteeing 60-minute collections and providing our customers with the highest level of service.



We are looking for a highly focused, detail-oriented professional to join our remote team and act as the driving force behind keeping our UK fleet moving profitably.



The Role

As our Freight Pricing & Dispatch Specialist, your primary responsibility will be managing our presence on the UK’s leading freight platform, Courier Exchange (CX).



This is a screen-based, highly focused role that involves continuously monitoring the live load boards, identifying suitable jobs for our available vehicles, and rapidly calculating and submitting profitable quotes based on our established rate matrix. You will be the vital link that ensures our drivers are never running empty and our vehicles are maximising their daily revenue.



Key Responsibilities

Continuous Platform Monitoring: Actively watch the live Courier Exchange (CX) load boards throughout your shift to identify freight opportunities across the UK.



Rapid Quoting: Use our internal rate structure and pricing matrix to calculate fast, profitable, and accurate quotes for available jobs.



Vehicle Matching: Accurately match available loads to the correct vehicle types in our fleet (e.g., ensuring heavy/awkward freight is quoted for our 750KG Tail Lift Lutons, and standard freight for our Sprinters).



High-Volume Bidding: Submit a high volume of quotes consistently throughout the day to secure continuous work for our drivers.



Communication: Coordinate closely with our UK Operations team via [Slack/Teams/Email] to update them on won jobs and vehicle availability.



Requirements & Qualifications

Excellent Written English: Must have strong, professional written English to communicate effectively with the UK team and UK-based clients on the CX platform.



High Attention to Detail: You will be dealing with numbers, postcodes, vehicle dimensions, and pricing matrices all day. Accuracy is critical.



Comfortable with Repetition: This role requires someone who enjoys a fast-paced, screen-based workflow and is comfortable sitting at a computer submitting quotes throughout their entire shift.



Tech-Savvy: Quick to learn new software platforms and comfortable navigating multiple browser tabs and internal pricing tools simultaneously.



Reliable Infrastructure: Must have a reliable, high-speed internet connection, a quiet workspace, and a capable computer.



Bonus (but not required): Previous experience working with UK logistics, dispatching, or specifically using the Courier Exchange (CX) platform.



What We Offer

Clear Guidance: You will take ownership in ensuring our vehicles are constantly moving profitably. 



Stable Remote Work: Work from the comfort of your own home with a reliable, growing UK business.



Supportive Team: You will be directly supporting an operations team that values your work and relies on your success.



How to Apply

Please submit your resume along with a short cover letter explaining why you are comfortable working UK business hours and highlighting any relevant data entry, quoting, or logistics experience you have.

title: Senior Medical Coder
description:
Senior Medical Coder

Primary Care / General Medicine

Remote — Philippines | US Business Hours | Full-Time





Role Summary

We are looking for an experienced medical coder to handle the full range of encounter types for a US-based primary care practice. This includes routine E/M visits, Medicare-specific coding (AWV, CCM, preventive), and encounters requiring modifier usage and clinical judgment. You will be responsible for maintaining coding accuracy and compliance across Medicare, Medi-Cal, and commercial PPO payers. Depending on team structure, you may also provide quality assurance review for other coding staff.

Responsibilities

• Code all encounter types for a primary care / general medicine practice, including E/M visits (99201–99215), preventive medicine, chronic care management, and Annual Wellness Visits

• Apply correct ICD-10-CM diagnosis codes and CPT codes based on provider documentation

• Handle Medicare, Medi-Cal, and commercial PPO coding distinctions, including AWV vs. preventive vs. E/M billing

• Apply modifiers accurately, particularly Modifier 25 and Modifier 59

• Complete superbills in the EHR and ensure clean data transfer to billing software for claim submission

• Identify and flag documentation gaps that prevent compliant coding, and communicate these to the US-based team

• Review encounters coded by other tea
mbers when applicable, and flag recurring error patterns

• Assist with backlog clearance of historical encounters as needed

• Communicate directly with the US-based team lead on coding questions, volume updates, and escalations

Required Qualifications

• Minimum 3 years of medical coding experience for US healthcare providers

• Demonstrated experience with Medicare, Medicaid, and commercial PPO coding in a primary care or internal medicine setting

• Strong working knowledge of E/M leveling (2021 MDM-based guidelines), ICD-10-CM, and CPT

• Experience with modifier usage and understanding of common audit risk areas

• Familiarity with US payer denial patterns and how coding errors lead to claim rejections

• Ability to work independently and exercise judgment on complex or ambiguous encounters

• Fluent in English (written and verbal)

Preferred Qualifications

• CPC, CCS, or equivalent coding certification

• Experience working for a US-facing BPO, billing company, or RCM firm

• Experience mentoring or QA-reviewing other coders

• Familiarity with California Medi-Cal managed care and IPA capitation structures

• Experience with Practice Fusion, Practice Suite, or similar US EHR/billing platforms

description:

The ideal candidate is someone who can follow established systems, templates, and brand guidelines with precision, ensuring consistency across all deliverables. Most importantly, they must have a strong sense of intentional design, where every element, from layout to typography, is placed with clear reasoning and contributes to a cohesive, high-quality final output.



- Part-Time – 15 hours per week

- Must be available in at least one of the following time zones: AST / EST / CST / PST



Core Responsibilities:

- Produce 2 carousel posts per week per client (total of 4 per week)

- Design carousels with clear structure, storytelling, and visual consistency

- Add dynamic captions, transitions, and overlays to enhance engagement and viewer retention

- Develop and maintain brand-aligned templates for consistent output across all content

- Ensure all visuals strictly follow each brand’s tone and identity



Key Expectations:

- Strong understanding of layout, typography, and visual hierarchy

- Ability to create clean, cohesive, and premium-looking designs

- Consistency across all carousel slides (no random or disconnected layouts)

- High attention to readability, alignment, and spacing

- Reliable turnaround within deadlines with minimal revisions



To Apply:

1. Provide direct links to specific Instagram or
 posts that you personally designed or created (not accounts you only managed). Submissions must clearly showcase your own work—portfolio-only links or general account pages will not be considered.

2. Confirm your ability to work 15 hours/week and specify the time zone you’ll work in (AST / EST / PST / CST).

3. Provide a viewable link to your updated CV.

4. Provide a viewable link to your portfolio.



Kindly ensure all application instructions are followed precisely. Only compliant submissions will be considered.

title: Senior Accountant (Australia Accounts)
description:
How you'll contribute:

Financial Accuracy & Compliance

-Ensure the integrity and accuracy of financial records.

-Maintain clean books, ensuring all transactions are properly classified and recorded.

-Assist in local compliance and regulatory filings.

-Month-End Close & Reconciliations

-Lead month-end closing processes, ensuring all accounts are reconciled and financial reports are prepared on time.

-Conduct bank, balance sheet, and general ledger reconciliations.

-Identify and resolve discrepancies and anomalies before final reporting.

Bookkeeping Oversight & Supervision

-Supervise and support junior bookkeepers to ensure data accuracy and efficient financial processing.

-Provide guidance, training, and reviews to maintain high accounting standards.

Process Improvement & Reporting

-Identify gaps in financial processes and suggest efficiencies for better reporting and compliance.

-Work closely with the CFO to provide insights and reports for strategic decision-making.

-Assist in implementing financial controls and best practices.



What you'll need to succeed in this role:

Stickler for details and you're highly organized - good at organizing others too!

Proven track record as an Accountant with more than 5+ years experience.

Bachelor's degree in Accounting, Finance, or a related field.

Strong knowledge of month-end closing processes and financial reporting.

Experience managing or supervising bookkeepers or junior accountants.

Proficiency in accounting software – Both Xero and QuickBooks.

High attention to detail and a problem-solving mindset.

Comprehensive understanding of professional services business operations.

Considerate person and know how to navigate human relationships diplomatically to achieve objectives.

You work fast and pride yourself in getting a lot done in a short amount of time.

Ability to work independently and proactively in a remote setting.

Highly collaborative and communicative. You love working with others and are good at taking and giving instructions to achieve a common objective.

You have great English speaking and writing capability.

You're growth-minded and take responsibility for your own professional development, including staying up to date with the latest industry trends.

You are experienced in using practice management software.

title: Executive Assistant (Directly Supporting Founder | Growth Role)
description:
We are a U.S.-based venture studio building and launching consumer brands.



We are looking for a highly organized, proactive Executive Assistant to work directly with the founder and support daily operations, coordination, and execution across multiple business initiatives.



This is not a typical VA role.



You will start with structured support tasks, but this role is designed to grow into a true Executive Assistant position—someone the founder relies on daily to stay organized, focused, and moving fast.



WHAT YOU’LL BE DOING



Task & Project Management

- Track tasks, deadlines, and priorities across multiple projects

- Help organize workflows and keep execution on schedule

- Follow up to ensure things actually get done



Organization & Systems

- Maintain files, documents, and internal systems

- Build and manage trackers (Google Sheets, etc.)

- Help organize messy information into clear structure



Communication & Coordination

- Draft
s and basic communications

- Coordinate with freelancers and external partners

- Help ensure alignment across projects



General Execution Support

- Assist with day-to-day operational tasks

- Handle ad hoc requests quickly and accurately

- Support ongoing business initiatives



WHAT THIS ROLE BECOMES



Over time, you will:

- Help manage the founder’s time and priorities

- Take ownership of key workflows

- Anticipate needs before being asked

- Become a key part of how the business operates



REQUIREMENTS

- Excellent written and spoken English

- Highly organized and detail-oriented

- Strong problem-solving ability

- Able to work independently with minimal supervision

- Comfortable with Google Docs, Sheets, and Drive



WHO YOU ARE

- Proactive (you don’t wait to be told what to do)

- Reliable and consistent

- Comfortable with ambiguity

- Able to think, not just follow instructions

- Interested in long-term growth

title: Email Marketing Manager
description:
Reformly is a fast-growing home Pilates brand helping women aged 35–65 feel stronger, healthier, and more confident from home.



Our mission is simple: give women everything they need to feel strong, confident, and unstoppable.



We’re a tight-knit team of 12 full-time people who move fast, care deeply about quality, and genuinely love what we build. Every person who joins Reformly gets the opportunity to grow with us long-term. We’re not hiring for a quick project or an agency. We’re looking for someone who wants to be part of something bigger and help shape our culture as we scale.



The Role



We’re looking for a full-time
 Marketing Manager who will take ownership of our
 marketing channel from strategy to execution.



This is not a basic newsletter role. This is not a “send a few campaigns every week” role.



You’ll be the person responsible for building and optimizing high-performing flows, creating strong campaigns, segmenting our audience intelligently, and driving as much revenue as possible from
 without damaging list quality or brand experience.



You should already have strong hands-on experience with Klaviyo and know how to use
 as a serious growth channel. You understand how to balance performance with brand, how to keep a list healthy while still pushing revenue, and how to create campaigns that feel relevant, well-timed, and aligned with the customer journey.



You’ll also need to be highly skilled in Figma, with the ability to create polished, on-brand
 designs that match Reformly’s visual identity and speak directly to our target audience.



This role requires both strategic thinking and strong execution. You’ll work closely with the team to plan campaigns, improve flows, test ideas, refine segmentation, and make sure every
 sent serves a clear purpose.



What You’ll Own



•
 flows: building, optimizing, and maintaining key Klaviyo flows across the customer journey 

• Campaign strategy: planning and executing campaigns that drive revenue while staying aligned with the brand 

• Segmentation: creating smart audience segments based on behavior, engagement, lifecycle stage, and purchase intent 

• List health: managing deliverability, engagement, suppression, and overall list quality 

• Revenue growth: finding opportunities to increase
-attributed revenue without hurting customer experience 

•
 design: creating high-quality, on-brand
 creatives in Figma 

• Testing and optimization: improving subject lines, content, timing, offers, segmentation, and creative performance 

• Brand alignment: making sure all
 communication feels consistent with Reformly’s tone, identity, and positioning



What We’re Looking For



Must-have



• Proven experience in
 marketing, ideally for e-commerce or direct-to-consumer brands 

• Strong hands-on experience with Klaviyo 

• Deep understanding of
 flows, campaigns, segmentation, and list management 

• Strong knowledge of how to grow revenue through
 while protecting deliverability and list health 

• Expert-level Figma skills 

• Ability to create
s that are not only visually strong, but also strategically built to convert 

• Strong understanding of customer psychology, retention, and lifecycle marketing 

• Clear communication skills and ability to collaborate smoothly with the wider team 

• High attention to detail and strong execution skills



Nice to have



• Experience in health, wellness, fitness, or women-focused brands 

• Strong instinct for brand storytelling and campaign messaging 

• Experience with A/B testing and performance analysis 

• Ability to manage multiple campaigns and priorities in a fast-paced environment 

• A self-driven mindset with a strong focus on growth, quality, and continuous improvement



Why Reformly



• Full-time, long-term opportunity in a company that’s growing fast 

• Real ownership over one of the most important revenue channels in the business 

• Direct collaboration with a highly involved team that cares deeply about quality and execution 

• The chance to grow with the company and play a meaningful role in shaping the brand as we scale 

• Your voice matters here, and your growth matters just as much as the company’s



How to Apply



Video applications only.



Please send us:



• A short introduction video telling us about yourself



• Your experience with Klaviyo, flows, campaigns, and segmentation



• Examples of
 work or brands you’ve worked on that you’re most proud of



• A walkthrough of how you think about revenue, list health, and brand alignment in
 marketing



• Why you believe you’d be a strong fit for Reformly



This is not optional. Applications without a video will not be considered.

title: Mental healthcare administrative Assistant
description:
Administrative Healthcare Assistant — Virtual (Healthcare Operations + Project Coordinator)







Location: Remote (Phoenix time zone preferred / core hours overlap 9:00–5:00 MST)

Reports to: Office Manager / Clinical Director

Classification: Full-time, Non-exempt (non-clinical)

Works with: Front Desk, Billing, Clinical Team, Providers, QA







Position summary

We’re hiring a detail-oriented, proactive virtual Administrative Healthcare Assistant / Project Coordinator who will be the operational backbone of our remote front-desk and practice operations. This person will run the virtual check-in workflow, own patient communication and billing liaison tasks, and lead small operational projects that improve patient flow, reduce no-shows, and tighten administrative compliance. They must be an expert at juggling EHR tasks and telehealth logistics, and be comfortable owning projects end-to-end using modern PM tools.







This is a fully remote role. Candidate must be able to create a secure, HIPAA-compliant workspace and be available during core clinic hours (with flexibility for occasional early/late shifts when necessary).







Core responsibilities







1) Virtual Front Desk & Patient Coordination







Run the virtual check-in workflow from first contact through session completion: verify identity and insurance, request/confirm ID & insurance images, collect/confirm copay via Square or card-on-file, confirm telehealth links, and update EHR notes accordingly per BANANA AAPPLE and CHEESE







Triage incoming phone calls, secure messages and
s; respond or escalate per SOPs. Maintain SLAs (e.g., respond to patient messages within 2 business hours during core hours).







Manage scheduling for intakes (60 min), follow-ups (30 min default), and therapy visits (60 min), honoring provider blocks and modalities.







Monitor no-show/cancellation queue and run scripted outreach to reschedule, document outreach, and apply fees per policy.







Prepare pre-visit chart packets and superbills for providers; ensure charts are complete 48 hours prior to scheduled visits.







Ensure accurate demographics, medication lists, pharmacy, and emergency contact updates in the EHR.







2) Billing & Insurance Support







Verify eligibility and pre-authorization needs prior to visits; track outstanding eligibility failures and follow up.







Collect copays and reconcile daily collections with billing; maintain credit card authorizations and PCI/HIPAA compliance.







Help triage denials and re-bills and coordinate with Billing to reduce aged AR.







Maintain accurate documentation for superbills and submissions so encounters close promptly.







3) Telehealth & Technology Management







Own telehealth logistics: create/validate session links, send confirmations, troubleshoot patient connection issues, and guide patients through virtual check-in.







Be fluent with Practice Fusion (or equivalent EHR), Square/PayPal for payments, telehealth platforms (
), e-fax/e-fax queues, and secure patient file upload procedures.







Maintain an equipment checklist and ensure secure storage of credentials (use company vault) — never
 PHI insecurely.







4) Project Coordination & Continuous Improvement







Lead and coordinate office projects such as: virtual triage redesign, scheduling optimization, EHR template updates, and onboarding workflows.







Build and maintain project plans with milestones, owners, status updates, and risk logs in Asana/ClickUp/Teams Planner.







Run weekly status huddles for operational initiatives and deliver monthly KPIs to management.







Identify process gaps and propose SOP changes; draft SOP updates and training guides for staff.







5) Compliance, Reporting & QA







Maintain daily and weekly checklists: opening/closing tasks, med-fridge logs, supply orders, and safety walkthroughs (virtual analogues where applicable).







Ensure documentation and communications follow HIPAA minimum-necessary rules; participate in monthly QA spot checks and staff micro-trainings.







Prepare operational reports: no-show rates, appointment confirmation rates, average response time, and resolution times for administrative tickets.







6) Team Communication & Back-up







Serve as the remote “glue”: coordinate between providers, medical assistants, billing, and other admins.







Maintain clear handoffs and task ownership. Escalate provider or patient risks immediately.







Be available as a backup to other administrative roles during vacations or high volume.







Qualifications & experience







2+ years in a medical/behavioral health front desk, virtual patient services, or clinical administrative role (behavioral health experience strongly preferred).







Demonstrated project coordination experience (managing timelines, tasks, and stakeholder communications).







Strong EHR experience (Practice Fusion or equivalent), telehealth systems, and payment processors (Square, PCI concepts).







Excellent written and verbal communication; professional phone manner.







Working knowledge of HIPAA, OSHA basics, and insurance verification practices.







Comfortable with Asana/ClickUp/Teams Planner, MS Teams, Google Suite or Office 365, and Excel/Sheets for reporting.







High integrity, reliable high-speed internet, a private workspace, and willingness to submit proof of secure environment tools if requested.







Preferred: Associate/BA in healthcare administration, project management certification, or formal training in medical billing/insurance.







Key competencies & traits







Owner mentality: closes loops, tracks tasks to completion, escalates proactively.







Time management: manages multiple priorities and fast-moving tasks without micromanagement.







Attention to detail: accurate data entry, superbill prep, and payment reconciliation.







Customer focus: empathetic, calm with patients in distress, professional with providers.







Analytical: tracks trends, identifies root causes, and suggests measurable improvements.







Tech-savvy & adaptive: learns new tools quickly and documents workflows.







Performance metrics (KPIs)







Patient message response time: ? 2 business hours during core hours.







Virtual check-in completion rate: ? 95% of scheduled visits completed as “checked in” 30 min before appointment.







No-show outreach & reschedule rate: contact attempts recorded for 100% of no-shows within 24 hours; reschedule conversion target ? 60%.







Superbills and chart prep accuracy: ? 98% completeness before sessions.







Project deliverables: projects completed on time ? 85%; operational improvements produce measurable gains (e.g., decreased no-show by X%).







AR / billing support: reduce re-bill queue by target ?ch month (set quarterly).







Onboarding & 90-day training plan

Week 1: Orientation — HIPAA, Desert Bolt SOP review, EHR access & practice environment, telehealth basics.

Weeks 2–4: Shadow existing staff for virtual check-ins, scheduling, copay collection, and message triage; complete mini-projects (e.g., create a checklist for pre-visit chart prep).

30–60 days: Own daily queues independently; handle scheduling, authorizations, and minor billing reconciliations. Start first small process improvement project.

60–90 days: Lead one cross-functional improvement project; complete performance review per the Performance Agreement. Be fully autonomous in virtual check-in, billing liaison, and project tracking.







Tools & environment (remote)







Company provides access to EHR, project tools, and training materials. Candidate must provide: reliable internet (min 100 Mbps recommended), quiet/private workspace, and basic computer hardware (camera + headset).







Must use company-approved methods for PHI (company vault, secure video, encrypted file uploads); no PHI via personal
 or insecure channels.







Interview / hiring checklist (suggested)







Ask for a short case: “You have 3 missed appointments today, 4 unresolved prior auth tickets, and 10 patient messages. Walk me through your first 60–90 minutes.”







Test EHR basics and ask for a demo of how they would prepare a superbill and close an encounter.







Ask for an example of a project they owned, tools they used, and measurable outcomes.







Scenario: telehealth patient cannot find the link 5 min before appointment — ask for step-by-step handling.







Compensation & scheduling (example)







Competitive range depending on experience (example band: $18–$27/hr or salary equivalent).







Standard remote schedule with core hours: 9:00–5:00 MST with 1-hour lunch; may include staggered start to overlap providers as necessary.







“This hire must fix” — expectations (use on posting to be explicit)







Never leave messages unacknowledged: zero tolerance for >24-hour unattended patient messages during business days.







Follow through on tasks: if assigned an action item, close or report blockers within the same business day.







No scheduling confusion: accurate appointment entry so providers and patients are never double-booked.







Accurate billing & collections: copays reconciled daily and flagged discrepancies escalated same day.







Document everything: every outreach, authorization, and reschedule must be in the EHR with friendly, clear notes.







Project ownership: lead improvements end-to-end and deliver measurable results.

title: Go High Level Specialist VA — CRM, Automations & Workflow Management
description:
Pay: Competitive, based on experience and skills demonstrated during paid trial. We pay above market for exceptional talent and reward loyalty with raises as we grow. This is a long-term role with a fast-growing US startup, not a one-off project.

Schedule: Full-Time (40 hrs/week), must overlap US Eastern hours minimum 4 hours/day

Start: Immediately — paid 1-week trial before commitment



Who We Are:

US-based startup selling AI marketing tools to home service businesses across 50 US cities. GHL is our operating system. We need someone who already lives inside it.



What You'll Do:

- Build and manage workflows, automations, and triggers across multiple sub-accounts

- Set up and manage pipelines, lead stages, and opportunity tracking

- Create and schedule
 and SMS campaigns and sequences

- Configure phone system settings (inbound routing, missed call text-back)

- Build forms, landing pages, and booking pages inside GHL

- Set up review request automations (post-job text sequences)

- Manage contacts, tags, custom fields, and smart lists

- Troubleshoot broken workflows, failed automations, and integration issues

- Produce weekly reports from GHL dashboards

- Help onboard new client sub-accounts using our snapshot templates



What You Need:

- 1+ year of hands-on Go High Level experience (not negotiable — we will test you)

- Built workflows, automations, and pipelines from scratch (not just maintained someone else's)

- Comfortable with Twilio/LC Phone setup, A2P 10DLC registration, and SMS compliance

- Experience connecting
, Google, and third-party integrations inside GHL

- Strong English — you'll communicate with founders and team daily via Slack

- Reliable internet, quiet workspace, screen sharing capable

- If you are fluent in Spanish, that is a major plus!!!



Bonus:

- Experience with GHL Agency/SaaS mode and managing multiple sub-accounts

- ManyChat experience or willingness to learn

- Familiar with Stripe billing integration inside GHL

- Experience with Vapi, Bland, or AI voice calling tools



To Apply:

Send me a Loom video (under 3 minutes) walking through a GHL workflow you built. Show me the trigger, the actions, and explain why you set it up that way. No Loom = no interview.



Trial Task:

Set up a new GHL sub-account with: a 5-stage sales pipeline, a missed-call text-back workflow, a 3-touch cold
 sequence, and a review request automation triggered by a tag. Complete within 72 hours.

title: Automation Developer (n8n / Zapier + AI Integration) for Airbnb and Cleaning Business
description:
I am looking for someone who can build automation systems and connect tools for a growing short-term rental and cleaning company. This is not a basic VA role. You will be building real workflows that reduce manual work and improve efficiency.



Your role will involve creating automations using n8n or Zapier, connecting tools like ToDoist, Google Sheets, RingCentral, and messaging platforms, and using AI (OpenAI/ChatGPT) to generate follow-ups, summaries, and structured tasks. You will help build systems for lead tracking, follow-ups, cleaning coordination, and daily business reporting.



You must have experience with n8n or Zapier and understand how triggers, actions, delays, and conditions work. You should be comfortable connecting different tools using APIs or webhooks and have some experience using AI in workflows. If you only have experience prompting ChatGPT but have not built real automations, this role is not a good fit.



To apply, please answer the following in your application. First, explain how you would automate a missed call into a logged lead, a follow-up message, and a task in a system. Second, share an example of a workflow you have built and explain how it works. Third, list the tools you have used for automation.



This is a part-time role to start, around 10 to 15 hours per week, with pay between 6 to 10 dollars per hour depending on experience. There is strong potential to grow into a long-term role if you can execute well.



I am looking for someone who can build and implement, not just suggest ideas. If you are strong in systems, automation, and practical AI use, this is a great opportunity.

title: Senior Graphic Designer
description:
Senior Graphic Designer



Wandering Lion is a brand and growth agency that helps founder-led businesses build stronger foundations, clearer messaging, and integrated growth systems. We work across brand, strategy, marketing, websites, campaigns, and ongoing growth support, creating work for both our own businesses and a range of client brands.



We’re looking for a Senior Graphic Designer who can produce polished, commercially focused creative work across brand, digital, social, web, and marketing channels.



This role is for someone who understands that strong design is not just about making things look good. It’s about building trust, improving brand perception, creating consistency, and supporting real business outcomes.



You’ll need to be confident working from existing brand guides, style guides, campaign directions, templates, and supplied assets, and turning them into high-quality finished creative without needing excessive hand-holding. You should also be capable of helping create brand guides, style guides, design templates, and visual systems for new clients when required.

Strong experience with Adobe Creative Cloud is essential, especially Photoshop, Illustrator, and InDesign. Experience with Premiere Pro, Light Room, After Effects, Figma, Canva, Webflow, or WordPress would also be highly regarded.



Key Responsibilities

- Create graphics, marketing assets, social media content, presentations, digital documents, and campaign visuals

- Work from supplied brand guides, style guides, templates, and creative directions

- Use Adobe Creative Cloud to create, edit, retouch, prepare, and export professional design assets

- Design assets for social media, paid ads,
 campaigns, websites, landing pages, and proposals

- Retouch, crop, resize, optimise, and prepare images for digital and marketing use

- Maintain strong brand consistency across multiple businesses and client accounts

- Check work carefully for spacing, alignment, spelling, formatting, export settings, and brand accuracy

- Manage multiple creative tasks, communicate clearly, and meet deadlines



What We’re Looking For

- Strong graphic design portfolio

- Advanced experience with Adobe Photoshop, Illustrator, and InDesign

- Experience working with brand guides, style guides, and visual identity systems

- Strong understanding of layout, typography, spacing, colour, hierarchy, and composition

- Experience creating digital, social, web, campaign, and presentation assets

- High attention to detail and pride in polished execution

- Ability to follow direction while bringing thoughtful creative input

- Reliable, organised, proactive, and comfortable working remotely

- Good communication and collaboration skills



Preferred Experience

- Website graphic design or landing page design

- Basic UX/UI understanding

- Video editing or motion graphics

- Canva template creation

- Figma, Webflow, or WordPress support

- Proposal, presentation, or report design

- Experience designing for multiple brands or client accounts



The Type of Person We’re Looking For

We’re looking for someone who is reliable, honest, detail-focused, easy to work with, and open to feedback.

We’re looking for someone who can bring creative ideas and visual thinking to the table, but who also understands when the job requires following an existing brand direction, maintaining consistency, and producing commercially useful work rather than pushing their own personal style. 



Working Arrangement

This is a remote role.

Standard workdays are Monday to Friday, generally within 9:00am–5:00pm Philippines time.

We offer reasonable flexibility because family and life matter, but we do need consistency, reliability, and clear communication.



How to Apply

Please send:

Your CV / resume

Your design portfolio

Examples of work created from brand guides or style guides, if available

Examples of social media, website, presentation, or marketing assets

A short introduction about yourself

A list of the software and tools you use, including your level of proficiency

Your expected salary in PHP

title: Amazon PPC Specialist (Part-Time)
description:
We are looking for an experienced Amazon PPC Specialist to support our growing Amazon Private Label brands. This role is ideal for someone who is analytical, detail-oriented, and highly experienced in managing and optimizing PPC campaigns.



Your main focus will be improving ad performance, reducing ACoS, scaling profitable campaigns, and driving overall sales through effective advertising strategies.



Work Schedule



* Philippine Time

* Part-time – 4 hours per day

* 10:00 AM – 3:00 PM (with 1-hour break from 12:00–1:00 PM)



Compensation



* Starting rate: $3/hour

* Increase to $4/hour after probation (based on performance and KPI evaluation)



Key Responsibilities



* Set up, manage, and optimize Amazon PPC campaigns (Sponsored Products, Sponsored Brands, Sponsored Display)

* Perform keyword research and build effective campaign structures

* Analyze search term reports and optimize targeting

* Adjust bids, budgets, and placements based on performance

* Scale profitable campaigns and control ACoS/TACoS

* Conduct competitor and market analysis

* Monitor daily campaign performance and key metrics

* Provide actionable insights and optimization suggestions

* Coordinate tasks and updates via Asana

* Track time using Clockify



Required Experience



* At least 6 months of hands-on Amazon PPC experience

* Proven experience managing Private Label PPC campaigns

* Strong understanding of ACoS, TACoS, CTR, CVR, and campaign scaling strategies

* Ability to analyze data and make performance-driven decisions

* Experience handling multiple campaigns/accounts



Additional Skills (Plus)



* Experience in listing creation

* Ability to perform keyword research and incorporate it into optimized listing content (titles, bullets, backend search terms)

* Knowledge of how to publish listings on Amazon while following Amazon policies and guidelines



Tools You Must Be Familiar With



* Amazon Campaign Manager

* Helium 10 (or similar keyword tools)

* Keepa

* Google Sheets / Docs

* Asana

* Clockify



We’re Looking For Someone Who Is



* Data-driven and analytical

* Detail-oriented and organized

* Proactive in identifying opportunities for optimization

* Consistent and reliable with daily monitoring

* Comfortable working with SOPs and workflows



To Apply



Please include:



1. Your Amazon PPC experience

2. Campaigns or brands you’ve managed

3. Tools you’ve used

4. Your OLJ subject line: PL-PPC-4HRS
