title: Credit Repair FTC Report Processor - Immediate High-Volume
description:
We are a fast-growing US credit repair organization. We currently have an immediate backlog of 40+ clients requiring FTC Identity Theft reports to be processed today, with a continuous pipeline of new files arriving every week.

We are hiring for an immediate piece-rate gig paying $2.00 - $5.00 per completed client file (rate based on your proven experience and the complexity of the file as some clients may require multiple reports). Because some clients have heavy files requiring multiple reports due to form limitations, you will be compensated per client, not just per report. If you can knock this backlog out efficiently and flawlessly, this will immediately turn into a permanent Part-Time or Full-Time role on our team.

This is an urgent need, so we are seeking an experienced FTC processor who can hit the ground running. While we have detailed SOPs for our specific workflow, the ideal candidate will already be familiar with the platform and standard workarounds.

Please ensure you meet these technical requirements before applying:

• File Handling: You must know how to download and open a .html credit report file directly in an internet browser (like Chrome or Edge) to view the data.

• FTC Workarounds: You must know the standard methods to bypass the FTC website's paste restrictions (such as using the "Inspect Element" tool or browser extensions) to quickly enter large amounts of information into the personal statement area.

• FTC Platform Navigation: You must know to always select "Submit without an account" and how to troubleshoot basic website glitches (like clearing cache).

• High Accuracy: You must be meticulous in verifying names, SSNs, and addresses before submitting.

A Note on Experience: Because this is a time-sensitive backlog, please do not misrepresent your skill set. We are looking for true experience, and your first batch will be a paid test of your speed and accuracy using these methods and could potentially be upgraded to a part-time / full-time VA role.

Please provide work samples if possible.

Thank you!

title: Social Media Operator
description:
About the role

We are looking for a reliable and detail-oriented Social Media Operator to join our online community team. In this role, you will manage a set of assigned social accounts, publish content across a busy 
 server on a daily schedule, and help keep our community active, engaged, and on-brand.

This is a fully remote, flexible-hours position. You will work independently following clear guidelines and a structured daily routine. Full training is provided — no specialist background is required.



Location: Fully remote — work from anywhere

Hours: Approx. 2–3 hours per day, flexible timing

Contract: Part-time, freelance / contractor

Accounts: 6–7 assigned social accounts to manage

Team: Small team of 6 operators + manager

Training: Full onboarding and SOPs provided



What you will do

Your day-to-day work centres on managing your assigned accounts and publishing content to the right 
 channels at the right times. Every task has a clear brief and a defined output.



Core daily responsibilities

-Manage 6–7 assigned accounts and post content across designated 
 channels each day

-Spread posts across three daily windows — morning, midday, and evening. This is not a single morning task. Consistent activity throughout the day is a core requirement of this role

-Morning window (9:00 – 10:30am UK): publish the daily schedule post and first round of account activity across channels

-Midday window (12:00 – 2:00pm UK): general community engagement and second wave of channel activity

-Evening window (6:00 – 8:00pm UK): second daily highlight post and evening engagement across active channels

-Publish community highlight posts twice per day, following precise image guidelines

-Engage in general community channels using your assigned account personas

-Post a brief daily update in the internal team channel each morning



Weekly responsibilities (rotating between tea
mbers)

-Publish the weekly community recap (Sunday or Monday)

-Publish weekly promotional content for new members

-Publish member review highlights every few days

-Publish themed channel content on a weekly schedule

-Publish the weekly featured member spotlight post

-Publish curated content picks when provided by the team analyst



What we are looking for

Essential

-Highly reliable and consistent — daily delivery is core to this role

-Strong attention to detail and ability to follow precise formatting instructions

-Comfortable managing multiple accounts and adapting tone between different writing styles

-Self-sufficient working remotely with async team communication

-Clear written English with the ability to match different voices and personas

-Available for a 2–3 hour daily commitment, with some overlap in UK daytime hours preferred



Nice to have

-Prior experience with 
 (posting, channels, community management)

-Experience managing multiple social media or online community accounts

-Comfortable with structured, process-driven work environments



What we offer:

-Fully remote — work from anywhere, any timezone (UK overlap preferred)

-Flexible hours within a clear daily structure

-Detailed SOPs and guidelines for every task — no guesswork

-Supportive team environment with direct manager access

-Paid trial shift before any long-term commitment

-Growth opportunities into senior operator or team lead roles



Operating standards

This role requires a high level of consistency and process discipline. All operators are expected to follow the team’s posting standards without exception. Before applying, please review the following non-negotiable requirements:



1. Always use the correct currency format as specified in your brief. No exceptions.

2. Never include unauthorised third-party platform screenshots in any content.

3. Always crop or blur sensitive information from screenshots before publishing.

4. Maintain a minimum 10-minute gap between posts from different accounts in the same channel.

5. Each account has a fixed writing style. Never mix personas between accounts.

6. Use the designated account management tool only. Never log into multiple accounts in a standard browser.

7. You do not approve your own work. Your manager reviews and signs off all completed tasks.



Compensation:: Starting pay is $1.50/hour for the first 30 days while you learn our systems. Upon successful completion of your first month, pay will increase to $2.00/hour. After 90 days, pay will increase to our target base rate of $2.50/hour, contingent on good performance and reliability.



These standards exist to maintain the integrity of our community and protect our accounts.

Candidates who are not comfortable working within strict operational guidelines are not a fit for this role.





How to apply

To apply, please send a short message covering the following:



-A brief introduction and why this role suits you

-Your daily availability and timezone

-Any relevant experience managing social accounts, 
 communities, or similar

-Your answer to this question: You are managing three accounts with different writing styles. ---How would you make sure you never mix them up?



Please begin your application with the word OPERATOR. Applications that do not include this word will not be reviewed.

This is a simple check to confirm you have read the full job description.

title: Marketing & SEO Lead
description:
We are a high-growth, physician-led telehealth practice expanding nationally. We specialize in complex care (HIV prevention, addiction medicine, chronic disease). We are looking for an operational "Lieutenant" who can lead our digital team and drive our national and local search presence.



The Role:

You are the operational lead. You will manage a team consisting of a WordPress Designer, graphic designer, a Clinical Writer, and an SEO worker. You are responsible for the team's output, but you are also a "doer" who owns our SEO strategy, monitors our clinical presence, and reports directly to leadership.



Key Responsibilities:



Team Management: Oversee the Designer and Writer to ensure the -state expansion stays on schedule. Monitor the progress of the SEO/Backlink worker and report weekly to leadership.



SEO Execution: Lead the strategy for national and local SEO rankings. You will personally oversee backlink quality, clinical authority optimization, and technical SEO health.



Analytics & Reporting: Weekly analysis of Google Analytics and Search Console. You will prepare and present weekly executive reports to leadership on KPIs, traffic, and conversion metrics.



Google Workspace & Workflow: Manage our internal Google Workspace and optimize Google Workflows to ensure the team operates at maximum efficiency.



GHL Integration (Preferred): Oversee or assist in implementing GoHighLevel automations and CRM management to ensure patient leads are tracked correctly.



Requirements:



Proven Management Experience: You must have experience leading a remote creative/technical team.



Advanced SEO Knowledge: Deep expertise in national SEO, local SEO Also people usually sign out all the charts during the week so the weekends can be My advice, and high-authority backlink strategies.



Data Mastery: Proficiency in Google Analytics, Google Search Console, and creating executive-level reports.



Professional Communication: College education preferred (professional/executive) for reporting to leadership and coordinating with clinical staff. 



Tool Proficiency: Google Workspace, Project Management tools (Asana/ClickUp), and ideally GoHighLevel.



Mandatory Technical Screening Question:

"We are expanding nationally state to state. Walk us through your specific process for managing a team to create 'Local Authority' in 50+ cities simultaneously. Additionally, what are the top 3 metrics you would include in a weekly executive report to a Physician-CEO to prove SEO ROI?"

title: AI & Workflow Automation Specialist — 2-Month Project (Australian Business)
description:
We are an Australian business looking for an experienced AI and workflow automation specialist for a 2-month project, with the possibility of extension based on performance.



This is a hands-on build role — not a planning or strategy role. You will spend the majority of your time designing and implementing automations that eliminate manual work across our business operations. By the end of the project, we expect to have a set of live, working automations that our team uses every day.



WHAT YOU WILL WORK ON:



• Product sourcing & supplier outreach — build automated workflows to contact factories in China and other markets, collect pricing, compare product offers, and track responses without manual follow-up

• Freight forwarding — automate the process of reaching out to freight providers, collecting quotes, and comparing costs side by side

• Warehouse & 3PL operations — conduct a full workflow analysis of our third-party logistics operation and identify and implement automations to reduce cost and handling time

• Invoicing & stock management — map our current invoicing and stock holding processes, identify inefficiencies, and build automations that improve cash flow and reduce excess stock

• General workflow automation — any other manual, repetitive process across the business that can be eliminated or reduced through AI and automation tools



WHAT WE NEED FROM YOU:



• At least 2-3 years of experience building real automations for real businesses — not just theory

• Hands-on experience with Make (Integromat), Zapier, n8n, or similar platforms

• Experience using AI tools including ChatGPT or Claude to automate content, communications, and data processing

• Ability to connect and integrate different business platforms via API or native connectors

• Strong written English — you will be communicating directly with our Australian team

• Self-directed — you can work from a brief without needing constant supervision

• Experience with procurement, inventory, logistics, or supply chain workflows is a strong advantage

title: Ad Uploader & Media Buying Assistant (Facebook Ads)
description:
???? About Us

We are Vertofix, a fast-growing German e-commerce brand in the back pain / sciatica relief niche. We run
 Ads at scale and need someone to handle the daily execution inside the Ads Manager so the founder can focus on strategy and creative direction.

This is NOT a strategy role. This is an execution role. You follow SOPs, upload ads, manage naming conventions, and keep the ad account organized. High performers will grow into a full Media Buyer role with decision-making responsibility.

???? Position Details

Position: Ad Uploader & Media Buying Assistant

Type: Remote

Start: ASAP

Workload: 10-20 hours per week

Daily Work: Upload new ads, duplicate campaigns, organize ad account, pull reports

???? Compensation

Starting Rate: $4/hour

Growth:

More hours as ad volume increases

Higher pay as you take on more responsibility

Path to full Media Buyer role if you prove yourself

???? Your Role

Your job is to:

Upload new ad creatives into
 Ads Manager following our exact structure and naming convention

Duplicate existing campaigns and ad sets when instructed

Turn ads on and off based on instructions from the founder

Pull daily and weekly performance reports from Ads Manager

Keep the ad account clean and organized at all times

Follow SOPs precisely — no improvisation, no "I thought it would be better this way"

???? Responsibilities

Upload 5-15 new ads per day into correct campaigns and ad sets

Apply correct naming convention to every ad, ad set, and campaign (we have a specific system)

Set correct targeting, budget, and optimization settings as instructed

Download performance data and fill in our tracking spreadsheet

Flag any issues (ads rejected, account warnings, billing problems) immediately

Duplicate winning ads into scaling campaigns when instructed

Turn off underperforming ads when instructed

? Requirements (IMPORTANT)

You MUST have:

At least 3 months experience working INSIDE
 Ads Manager (not boosting posts — actually building campaigns, ad sets, and ads)

Understanding of campaign structure (CBO vs ABO, ad set level targeting, ad level creative)

Experience with bulk uploading or managing 20+ active ads at once

Extreme attention to detail — one wrong setting can waste hundreds of dollars

Ability to follow SOPs without deviation

Fast and reliable — if we say "upload these 10 ads today" it needs to happen today, not tomorrow

???? This job is NOT for you if:

You have only boosted posts on

You don't know the difference between CBO and ABO

You are sloppy with naming conventions and organization

You think this role is about making strategy decisions — it's not, it's execution

You cannot be available daily

???? FILTER QUESTIONS (VERY IMPORTANT)

You MUST answer ALL questions to be considered.

If you don't answer properly, your application will be ignored.



 Ads Manager Experience

How long have you worked inside
 Ads Manager?

???? Be specific — months + what you did (uploading, reporting, building campaigns, etc.)

Campaign Structure

Explain the difference between CBO and ABO in 2-3 sentences.

???? If you can't answer this, don't apply.

Naming Conventions

We use this naming format for ads: ANGLE_SPOKESPERSON_HOOK_EMOTION_VERSION

If I give you an ad for Bandscheibenvorfall angle, Patient spokesperson, Secret Lead hook, Resignation emotion, Version 1 — what would you name it?

???? Write the exact name

Bulk Upload

What is the maximum number of ads you have uploaded in a single day?

???? Be specific

Attention to Detail

You are uploading 10 ads. Ad #7 has a different landing page URL than the others. What do you do?

???? Explain your process

Problem Handling

You try to upload an ad and
 rejects it immediately. What steps do you take?

???? Explain your process

Tools

Do you have experience with any of these:
 Business Manager, Ads Manager, Meta Business Suite, Excel/Google Sheets for reporting?

???? List which ones and what you did with them

Reporting

If I ask you to pull a weekly report showing Spend, CTR Link, CPC, ROAS, and Sales for each ad — can you do that?

???? Yes / No + explain how you would do it

Attention Test (IMPORTANT)

Write the word: SCALING at the BEGINNING of your application.

(If missing ? instant rejection)

Availability

How many hours per day can you work? What timezone are you in?

???? We need overlap with European business hours (CET)

Long-Term Interest

Are you looking for a long-term position or just a quick project?

???? Yes / No + explain



???? How to Apply

Send:

The word SCALING as first word

Short introduction

Answers to ALL 11 questions

Any screenshots or proof of past
 Ads Manager work (blur sensitive data if needed)

Your hourly rate expectation

???? Final Note

This role is the backbone of our ad operations. Without clean uploads and organized data, nothing works. If you are detail-oriented, fast, and reliable — you will become essential to our team. And essential tea
mbers get rewarded. But it starts with your application. Show us you actually read this.



?? MINIMUM REQUIREMENT — READ BEFORE APPLYING

If you have not worked for at least 3 different e-commerce stores or brands in this role, DO NOT apply. We are not looking for beginners. We are not looking for people who "want to learn." We need someone who has done this before, multiple times, for real businesses with real revenue.

If you have worked for only 1 or 2 stores, you are not ready for this role. No exceptions. We will ask for proof during the interview process.

title: Creative Strategist — Facebook/Meta Ads (E-commerce)
description:
Job Title: Senior Creative Strategist —
/Meta Ads (E-commerce)







Job Type: Full-time / Part-time



Ideally full time



About the Role



We're looking for an experienced creative strategist who makes ads that scale profitably on Meta. Not boosted posts. Not organic content. Direct response ads that spend real money and generate sales.



You'll research customers, develop angles and hooks, write scripts and briefs, and build creative testing roadmaps. You are NOT editing videos or running the ad account — you're the strategist behind winning ads.



If you want to edit/ design your own ads that is also fine. You need to be able to manage teams, outreach to UGC creators to get consistent inflow of content. If you haven't managed a brand doing over at least $10k a day please don't apply 



We have 2 video editors and 1 Graphic designer for static ads. They are both amazing.



This role requires proven experience. If you've never worked on ads spending $500+/day, please do not apply.



This role has HUGE winning ad bonuses. Every winning creative you make, You will get a % of ad spend.





---



Requirements



- Minimum 2 years experience in creative strategy for paid Meta ads

- Have worked on e-commerce brands (Shopify, DTC) — not lead gen, not local business

- Can show specific ads you strategized and their performance (spend, ROAS, results)

- Strong understanding of hooks, angles, offers, and why ads convert

- Able to write creative briefs that UGC creators and editors can execute

- Excellent written English



---



Big Plus



- Helped scale a brand from low spend to $50K-$100K+ per month

- BIGGG + if you have worked with any first to market product. Or brands with very little direct competitors

- Experience working with a performance marketing agency

- Understand creative testing frameworks (concept testing, iterations, 3-2-2 method)

- Familiar with ad spy tools (Foreplay, AdSpy, Atria Meta Ad Library)

_ familiar with AI ads, we can teach as well, But ideally very experienced with AI UGC ads



---



**Do NOT Apply If:**



- Your only experience is organic social media or content creation

- You've never worked on ads spending more than $500/day

- You cannot provide examples of ads you personally strategized

- You're looking for a "virtual assistant" role — this is specialist work



---



To Apply



Send a message with:

1. Short intro — your experience with paid ads creative strategy

2. 2-3 examples of ads you strategized (screenshots, links, or videos) with results

3. Full Portfolio/ Case studies

4. Your expected monthly salary in PHP or USD



No examples = no interview. I respect your time, please respect mine.

title: Short-Form Video Editor — Christian Ministry Content
description:
Job Title: Short-Form Video Editor — Christian Ministry Content

Job Type: Part-Time | Remote | Long-Term

Rate: $25 per video (flat rate)



About This Role

Work will be done for a traveling evangelist based in the United States. He preaches the gospel at churches, camps, conferences, and crusades across America and around the world. I'm building a content platform across Instagram, TikTok,
, X, and YouTube focused on calling a generation back to genuine Christian faith. We need someone absolutely elite - exceptional. If that's not you, do not even waste the time to apply.



We need a dedicated short-form video editor who will be a core part of this mission — not just a freelancer doing a job. This is a long-term role with consistent weekly work and real growth potential as the platform grows.



What You'll Be Editing

— Talking-head conviction videos filmed on iPhone (30-60 seconds)

— Sermon clips mined from full-length messages (45-90 minutes of raw footage ? best 60-90 seconds)

— Mission documentation content — field footage, pre-preach 
nts, event aftermath

— Photo and video reels combining stills, clips, and audio

— Stage clips from speaking events



Typical weekly output is 6-8 videos. At $25 flat per delivered video that's approximately $
/month of consistent work.



What This Role Requires

This is not general video editing. You need to be able to:

Short-form native editing for sermons / short form.

You think in 30-60 second arcs. You understand Instagram Reels and TikTok natively — not as a skill you learned but as a format you actually consume. You know how to open a video so the first frame hooks before a caption is read. You know when to cut and when to let something breathe.



Sermon mining

This is the most critical skill in this role. You can watch a 45-minute sermon and identify the 60-90 seconds where something true landed differently. This requires genuine engagement with the content — not just looking for applause breaks or loud 
nts. You need to feel when something is worth stopping a scroll for.



Reel construction

You can take still photos, short clips, audio, and captions and assemble them into a cohesive piece that tells a story in under 60 seconds. You understand music selection, pacing, and caption placement.



Platform fluency

You know the spec differences between Instagram Reels, TikTok, YouTube Shorts, and
 Reels. You export correctly for each platform. You understand aspect ratios, safe zones, and caption placement.



Restraint

The most important editing skill for this content is knowing what NOT to add. No unnecessary transitions. No heavy color grades. No dramatic music beds that don't fit the tone. This content needs to feel real and urgent — not produced and polished. If your instinct is always to add effects, this is not the right role for you.



Technical Requirements

— Proficient in Premiere Pro, CapCut, or DaVinci Resolve

— Experience with caption tools — Captions app, CapCut auto-captions, or similar

— Able to export in correct specs for each platform

— Reliable internet connection

— Able to turn around edited videos within 24-48 hours of receiving raw footage



Weekly Workflow

Every week you receive fro
:

— Raw talking-head video files from my Sunday filming session

— Sermon footage from speaking events when available

— Field footage or photos from the week when available

Every week you return:

— Edited videos captioned and correctly cropped for all platforms

— All files clearly labeled and organized for my assistant to schedule



Who This Role Is For

You are a committed Christian. This is not optional. You need to understand what you're editing and why it matters. The content is deeply rooted in the gospel and the evangelistic calling. You need to feel the weight of that when you're making judgment calls in the edit.



You have been editing short-form video content for at least one year with a real portfolio to show for it. Instagram Reels or TikTok content specifically — not long-form corporate or wedding video.



You are organized and communicative. You meet deadlines without being chased. You communicate proactively when something comes up. You treat this as a professional long-term commitment.



You are open to feedback and calibrate quickly. The first few weeks involve learning the specific style and voice of this content. 



You receive notes well and adjust without defensiveness.



How to Apply

Send all three of the following — incomplete applications will not be reviewed:



One — Three examples of short-form content you have edited. Instagram Reels or TikTok videos specifically. If you have edited for Christian creators, include those first.



Two — Your answer to this question in one paragraph: "Why do you want to edit content for a Christian evangelistic ministry specifically?"



Three — A brief description of your faith and church background.



Paid Trial Project

The top two or three applicants will be invited to complete a paid trial. You will receive a sermon recording and be asked to deliver a 90-second clip, a 30-second clip, and one paragraph explaining why you chose that 
nt. You will be paid $25 for the trial regardless of outcome. Trial turnaround is 48 hours.



Compensation

$25 flat rate per finished video delivered — regardless of video type or length. Paid weekly via Wise. Consistent long-term work. Rate and volume reviewed as the platform grows.



This Is a Long-Term Opportunity

I'm not looking for someone to try this for a month. I'm building a platform and a ministry that will grow significantly over the next several years. The right person grows with it. If that's you — apply.

title: Appointment Setter - Real Estate
description:
NOW HIRING: APPOINTMENT SETTER

Remote / Virtual

Full-Time

GoHighLevel Required   |   English Fluency Required   |   EST Hours Preferred



WHO WE ARE

The company is an AI consulting and business growth firm dedicated to helping real estate professionals, entrepreneurs, and small business owners harness the power of artificial intelligence to attract more clients, convert more leads, and operate at a higher level.

We work with clients across real estate, mortgage, coaching, and professional services, delivering done-with-you consulting, AI tool integration, automation workflows, and training programs through our proprietary three-system framework: Attract. Convert. Operate.



THE ROLE



As our Appointment Setter, you will be the first voice — or first message — that a prospect encounters. Your primary mission is to convert inbound and follow-up leads into qualified discovery calls and deals.

This is a fully remote position designed for a communicative, tech-savvy professional who takes pride in follow-through and thrives in a structured, fast-paced environment.



WHAT YOU’LL DO

Lead Outreach & Communication

• Follow up with all inbound leads via phone, text, and
 — targeting a 5-minute response time during business hours.

• Conduct outbound follow-up calls to warm prospects who have expressed interest in our services.

• Send personalized, professional follow-up
s and texts using approved templates.

• Maintain consistent multi-touch follow-up sequences for leads that don’t respond on first contact.



Appointment Setting & Scheduling

• Book qualified lead for discovery calls/appointment.

• Confirm appointments 24 hours in advance via text and/or
.

• Re-engage and reschedule any cancelled or no-show appointments promptly.

• Track all appointments and outcomes accurately in the CRM and report every lead during huddles.



CRM & GoHighLevel (GHL) Management

• Log all lead interactions, notes, and status updates in GoHighLevel (GHL) in real time.

• Move leads through the correct pipeline stages in GHL based on current activity and status.

• Trigger and manage automated follow-up workflows within GHL as directed.

• Tag and segment leads accurately to ensure clean reporting and team visibility.

• Use GHL’s two-way SMS,
, and call features as your primary communication hub.



Reporting & Team Communication

• Submit daily or weekly activity reports covering calls made,
s sent, and appointments booked.

• Share lead feedback and objections with the team lead to sharpen messaging and follow-up strategies.

• Attend team check-ins and training sessions as scheduled.



Required

• Fluent English speaker with excellent verbal and written communication skills.

• Strong professional
 writing ability — able to craft clear, warm, and compelling messages independently.

• Hands-on experience with GoHighLevel (GHL) CRM — pipelines, automation workflows, and communication tools.

• Comfortable making outbound calls and handling objections professionally and confidently.

• Highly organized with strong time management and consistent follow-through habits.

• Reliable internet connection and a quiet, professional home office setup.

• Available during core business hours (EST preferred).



Preferred (Nice to Have)

• Prior experience in appointment setting, real estate, or a related industry.

• Experience in an ISA (Inside Sales Agent) or SDR (Sales Development Representative) role.

• Proficiency with Google Workspace (Gmail, Calendar, Docs/Sheets).

• Quick to adapt to new tools, scripts, and evolving processes.



WHAT WE OFFER

• Fully remote

• Competitive pay structure: base pay + possible incentives based on deals closed.

• Access to proven scripts, AI-powered tools, training resources, and ongoing team support.

• A mission-driven culture led by a veteran with a strong commitment to excellence and growth.



HOW TO APPLY



To be considered, please submit the following:

• Your updated resume highlighting relevant experience.

• A brief cover letter and voice recording describing why you’re the right fit for this role.



Qualified candidates will be contacted to schedule a brief screening call.

title: Sales Representative - Business Funding Specialist

Track lead statuses and follow cadence rules.

SKILLS REQUIRED

Strong communication skills

Ability to follow scripts and improve them

IDEAL CANDIDATE

Comfortable speaking with business owners

Can handle objections well

Wants long-term stability

Strong work ethic & responsibility

title: Freight Forwarding Operations Specialist | CargoWise
description:
ABOUT THE ROLE



At DG Air, we’ve specialised in dangerous goods logistics for over 25 years. From transporting hazardous materials across Australia to exporting critical radiopharmaceuticals to New Zealand, we support industries that keep essential global supply chains moving. With strict safety standards, advanced systems, and a strong culture of accountability, our mission is to minimise risk, protect communities, and preserve the environment for future generations.

We are currently seeking experienced Freight Forwarders / Cargo Transport Operators to join our operations support team remotely from the Philippines.



What’s in it for you



• 100% Work From Home (no daily commute)

• Stable long-term employment with an Australian company

• Lower travel costs and better work-life balance

• Real exposure to international freight operations

• Ongoing training and development within a specialist logistics environment



Key Responsibilities



• Managing import and export shipments across air and sea freight from end-to-end, including complete management of shipments

• Preparing and generating all required shipping documentation, such as bookings, bills of lading, airway bills, commercial documents, and regulatory paperwork—not just reviewing or checking

• Coordinating domestic transport movements, including DG shipments via road and air

• Liaising with airlines, shipping lines, transport providers, overseas agents, and internal teams to ensure timely execution of shipments

• Working closely with our Australian-based operations team

• Maintaining accurate and timely data entry in CargoWise

• Tracking shipments and proactively resolving operational issues

• Ensuring compliance with regulatory, documentation, and operational standards





Requirements (Must Have)



• Experience working in a freight forwarding company

• Strong, hands-on experience with CargoWise (essential)

• Proven experience managing shipments end-to-end, including documentation creation (not limited to tracking or coordination)

• Solid understanding of end-to-end freight process, including:

quoting, booking, documentation, customs coordination, and delivery

• Strong attention to detail and accuracy in system work

• Good communication skills and ability to work with international teams

• Reliable, disciplined, and proactive work ethic





Who We’re Looking For



We’re looking for someone who already understands the realities of freight forwarding and is ready for a more stable, remote setup without stepping away from the industry.

If you enjoy structured operations work, take pride in accuracy, and want a long-term role where your experience truly matters, this could be a great fit

title: Jewelry CAD Designer
description:
We are looking for seasoned jewelry CAD designers to add to our growing production department.



We are a mission-driven innovative jewelry company located in Canada specializing in custom engagement rings and jewelry that is growing quickly. Our culture is blend of high care and high performance. We are looking for full-time (preferred) and part-time tea
mbers and offer career growth opportunities, competitive pay, and a supportive team culture.



You will:

• Create accurate, production-ready CAD models for engagement rings, wedding bands, and custom fine jewelry

• Interpret client requests, sketches, inspiration images, and specifications into manufacturable designs

• Work closely with our production team to ensure files meet technical requirements

• Prepare files for 3D printing and manufacturing

• Work efficiently while maintaining exceptional accuracy and attention to detail

• Participate in continual improvement of CAD standards and workflows



REQUIREMENTS:



• Expertise in Rhino / Matrix / MatrixGold (or equivalent jewelry CAD platforms)

• Minimum 5 years jewelry CAD experience (experience in manufacturing environment is preferred) 



Strong understanding of:

• stone settings (solitaire, halo, pave, bezel, channel, prong work)

• tolerance & structural integrity

• proportions, comfort fit, wearability

• manufacturing considerations

• Experience preparing STL files for production / printing

• Ability to produce clean, precise, and manufacturable CAD files



**Experience designing engagement rings is a BIG advantage



WHAT WE OFFER:



70,
,000php/month salary (for full-time based on qualification assessed during interview process)



Upon successful passing of a probationary period:



13th month bonus pay (pro-rated depending on start date)

SSS premium benefit

PhilHealth premium benefit

participation in production department performance bonuses

title: Job Opportunity: Long-Term Employment with Growing Roof Estimating Xactimate Company
description:
Are you looking for a stable, long-term position where attention to detail and expertise are highly valued? We are seeking a dedicated individual with experience in Xactimate and a solid understanding of roofing components.

About Us: We are an insurance supplement company that partners with roofing contractors to assist in supplementing their insurance jobs. Our work involves reviewing photos of roofs, analyzing the original estimates, and creating detailed supplements that include necessary additions for rebuilding, supported by citing code and providing photo justification.



Key Responsibilities:

• Analyze roofing photos and original estimates to identify missing or required line items.

• Create detailed and accurate supplements using Xactimate.

• Communicate primarily via
 with insurance companies, and occasionally speak directly with adjusters to justify the inclusion of certain line items.

• Maintain a high level of detail and accuracy in all communications and reports.



Requirements:

• Proficiency in Xactimate and an understanding of roofing components.

• Excellent written and verbal communication skills.

• Ability to work night shifts (9 AM - 5 PM ET).

• A keen eye for detail and a commitment to delivering high-quality work.

• Willingness to adapt and grow with a rapidly expanding company.



What We Offer:

• A chance to be part of a small but fast-growing company with significant opportunities for advancement.

• A supportive work environment that values hard work, dedication, and continuous improvement.

• A role that will challenge you, with the potential for professional growth and career development.





We are looking to hire 2-3 estimators. 



If you’re up for the challenge and ready to contribute to our team's success, we encourage you to apply. This is a fantastic opportunity for someone who is looking to grow with us and make a meaningful impact in the insurance supplement industry.

title: Ecommerce Accountant/Bookkeeper
description:
Position Title

Part Time Accountant/ Bookkeeper  – Amazon / Walmar t/ Shopify / Ecommerce Business

Position Summary

We are seeking a detail-oriented and analytical Accountant to manage the financial operations of a growing Amazon FBA and ecommerce business. This role is responsible for maintaining accurate financial records, reconciling Bank/Amazon/Walmart and Vendor transactions, managing inventory accounting, preparing financial reports, and ensuring compliance with sales tax and other regulatory requirements.

The ideal candidate has experience with Amazon Seller Central, Amazon FBA accounting, ecommerce bookkeeping, inventory-based businesses, and accounting software such as QuickBooks or Xero.  Ideal candidate will have 2+ years of experience as a bookkeeper and accountant.  This person will do data entry, reconciliation and compile common financial statements. 

________________________________________

Key Responsibilities

Financial Management & Bookkeeping

• Maintain accurate bookkeeping records for the Amazon FBA business

• Record and categorize all revenue, expenses, refunds, reimbursements, fees, and adjustments

• Reconcile Amazon and Walmart settlement reports with bank accounts and accounting software

• Perform monthly, quarterly, and annual financial close processes

• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable

• Process vendor payments and monitor cash flow

• Reconcile company credit cards, bank accounts, and loans

Amazon/Walmart  FBA & Ecommerce Accounting

• Reconcile Amazon and Walmart Seller Central transactions, including:

o Sales revenue

o FBA fees

o Referral fees

o Storage fees

o Advertising expenses

o Refunds and returns

o Reimbursements and lost inventory claims

o Inventory

• Monitor and record inventory movement between suppliers, warehouses, and Amazon fulfillment centers

• Track landed cost of products, including freight, duties, packaging, and other costs

• Calculate and maintain accurate Cost of Goods Sold (COGS)

• Review and reconcile inventory valuations and stock adjustments

• Identify missing reimbursements, discrepancies, and financial errors within Amazon reports

• Assist in preparing profitability analysis by SKU, product line, and sales channel

Reporting & Analysis

• Prepare monthly Profit & Loss, Balance Sheet, and Cash Flow reports

• Create weekly and monthly performance dashboards for management

• Analyze margins, advertising spend, inventory carrying costs, and overall profitability

• Forecast cash flow, inventory needs, and future expenses

• Provide recommendations to improve financial efficiency and profitability

• Assist ownership with budgeting and strategic planning

Payroll & Expense Management

• Process payroll accurately and on time 

• Maintain payroll records and ensure compliance with federal and state requirements 

• Track and manage reimbursements with proper documentation and approvals 

• Oversee expense management and ensure proper classification of all business expenses 

• Track and maintain mileage logs for reimbursement and tax purposes



Tax & Compliance

• Maintain sales tax records and support sales tax filing requirements

• Assist with state sales tax registrations and compliance

• File with state for sales tax reimbursement

• Prepare documentation for CPA, tax preparer, or external auditors

• Support federal and state tax compliance by tracking deadlines and preparing reports

• Ensure compliance with accounting standards and company policies

• Maintain organized records for audits and year-end tax preparation

________________________________________

Required Qualifications

• Bachelor’s degree in Accounting, Finance, or related field

• 2+ years of accounting or bookkeeping experience

• 1+ years of experience with Amazon, Walmart, ecommerce, or inventory-based businesses

• Strong understanding of:

o Amazon Seller Central 

o Walmart Seller Central 

o Inventory accounting

o Cost of Goods Sold (COGS)

o Ecommerce financial reporting

• Experience with QuickBooks, Xero, or similar accounting software

• Advanced Microsoft Excel or Google Sheets skills

• Strong attention to detail and organizational skills

• Ability to manage multiple projects and meet deadlines

• Strong written and verbal communication skills

________________________________________

Preferred Qualifications

• Experience with Amazon FBA accounting tools such as A2X, or Link My Books

• Experience with multi-channel ecommerce platforms such as Shopify, Walmart Marketplace, eBay, or Etsy

• CPA, CMA, or other accounting certification preferred

• Experience with inventory forecasting and profitability analysis

• Familiarity with international purchasing, freight, and import duties

________________________________________

Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)

• Accurate monthly financial close completed on time

• Amazon and Walmart settlement reconciliations completed with minimal discrepancies

• Inventory valuation accuracy

• Timely payment of vendors and taxes

• Reduction in unrecovered Amazon reimbursements or accounting errors

• Accuracy of cash flow forecasting and profitability reporting

________________________________________

Work Environment

• Part-time position available

• Remote 

• Typical schedule: Monday–Friday

• May require occasional work during month-end, quarter-end, or year-end close periods

________________________________________

Sample Tools & Systems Used

• Amazon Seller Central

• Xero

• A2X or Link My Books

• InventoryLab

• Microsoft Excel

• Google Sheets

• Shopify, Walmart Marketplace, or other ecommerce platforms

________________________________________

Please watch this short video before applying.  

Passcode: 



Start your application with your favorite quote.   Thank you,

Descript

Pacing and retention

Conversion-focused editing

Strong communication and reliability

Experience with digital products, coaching, or service businesses is a plus

Task

title: Virtual Assistant — Content & Social Media (Active Shakti)

title: Video Editor (TikTok & Meta Ads)
description:
LOCATION: Remote 

TYPE: Hourly or Monthly Retainer 

SOFTWARE: CapCut (Desktop or Mobile)



ABOUT GLACR We are looking for a sharp, efficiency-driven Video Editor to join the GLACR creative team. We don’t just make "videos", we create high-performance Direct Response ads that convert. You will work directly with our Creative Strategist to turn raw footage and briefs into scroll-stopping ads for TikTok and Meta.



*THE ROLE & WORKFLOW:*

We value volume and speed, but not at the expense of organization. You will be provided with raw footage (influencer content, product shots) and clear briefs. Your job is to assemble them into winning creatives.



*YOUR WEEKLY OUTPUT:* 

We operate on a structured system to keep things efficient. You are NOT building 30 videos from scratch.



- 3 Batches per week.



- 3 Concepts per batch (9 unique core edits total).



- 3–4 Variations per concept (Swapping the "Hook," changing the visual angle, or text overlays).



Total Output: ~30 Ad deliverables per week.



*WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR*



- Experience: Minimum 2 years of video editing experience.



- Platform Native: You live and breathe TikTok/Reels. You understand the trends, the pacing, and the "native" feel.



- CapCut Expert: You are extremely fast and proficient in CapCut.



- Direct Response Mindset: You understand Hooks, Retention, and CTAs. You know that the first 3 seconds are the most important part of the video.



- Language: Capable of editing assets in both English and Swedish (we provide the translations, you handle the timing and placement).



- Communication: You are clear and proactive. If a deadline is at risk or a file is missing, you let us know immediately.



*REQUIREMENTS*



- Ability to follow detailed creative briefs.



- Highly organized file management (handling 30 exports a week requires structure).



- Fast turnaround times without sacrificing quality.



HOW TO APPLY Please send your application with the following:



Portfolio: A link to your work.



*Specific Examples:*

Please highlight 3 specific TikTok/Meta ads you have edited that demonstrate strong hooks and direct response principles.



Rate: Your preferred hourly rate or monthly retainer expectation.



*NOTE:*

Selected candidates will be asked to complete a small paid test task as the final step of the interview process.

mber — not as an agency contact.

title: Part-Time Head Hunter

mber is driven to meet key performance metrics, can work autonomously, and produces high-quality outcomes. This individual should be exceptionally fluent in English in both written and spoken form. *Exceptional communication skills to effectively liaise with both clients and candidates.

*Innovative approach to sourcing, ensuring we stay ahead in identifying the best candidates in the industry.



If you thrive in a dynamic environment, have a passion for connecting exceptional nannies with families, and possess the expertise to navigate the US job market, we want to hear from you! This is a long-term position (2+ years) that starts out part-time (20-30 hours per week) and has the potential to grow to full-time for the right candidate. Pay starts around $22000 php per month based on 20 hours per week. Join us as we shape the future of family care by applying today.

title: Accounts Receivable / Collections Specialist
description:
Position Overview



We are seeking a highly organized, persistent, and detail-oriented individual whose primary responsibility is to ensure all completed jobs are paid in full and on time. This role is critical to maintaining cash flow and requires strong communication skills, accountability, and a results-driven mindset.



Key Responsibilities:



- Proactively contact customers immediately after project completion to collect outstanding balances

- Monitor all completed jobs daily to identify unpaid invoices

- Communicate with customers via phone, text, and
 to secure payment

- Clearly explain invoices, payment options, and resolve any payment-related questions or objections

- Coordinate with sales and operations teams to confirm job completion status and customer satisfaction

- Follow up consistently on overdue accounts until payment is received

- Document all customer interactions and payment updates in CRM (ServiceTitan)

- Process payments and ensure accurate record-keeping

- Escalate disputes or collection challenges to management when necessary



Performance Expectations:



- Maintain a high collection rate on completed jobs

- Minimize days outstanding (reduce AR aging)

- Ensure fast turnaround from job completion to payment collection

- Consistent daily follow-up activity with zero missed accounts



Qualifications:



- Strong communication and negotiation skills

- Comfortable having direct, payment-focused conversations with customers

- Highly organized with strong attention to detail

- Self-motivated and persistent—does not let accounts slip through the cracks

- Experience in collections, accounts receivable, or customer service is preferred

- Familiarity with CRM systems (especially ServiceTitan) is a plus

title: Social Media Manager
description:

mber who will stay and grow at our company. We offer competitive compensation, a good and stable work environment, and plenty of growth opportunities.

mbers to create shot lists for social media, as needed

About HiEnd Accents



HiEnd Accents designs and creates everyday luxury bedding and linens, sheeting, decorative pillows and other home textiles. Founded in 2005 and based in Dallas, Texas, our mission is to elevate our customers' lives via beautifully designed home textiles that deliver quality and value.



As a family-owned business, we’re committed to personal service and long-term relationships. Combined with our customer-first approach, prompt shipping and low order minimums, we’ve become the preferred bedding supplier for thousands of top department stores, furniture retailers, interior designers, and boutique hotels nationwide. Recently recognized on the 2024 INC 5000 list as one of the fastest-growing businesses in the US, we continue to innovate and expand our reach in the home textiles market.



Discover more about us and our brands at 



Why HiEnd Accents?



At HiEnd Accents, we're a close-knit team driven by entrepreneurial spirit, growth mindset, and a shared commitment to excellence. This achievement is a testament to our team's dedication and the exciting opportunities ahead. If you thrive in a vibrant, high-paced culture where your contributions truly matter, we want to hear from you!



Working at HiEnd Accents means that you can expect the following:

title: Fractional accounting advisor — Xero / construction operations
description:
JOB TITLE: Fractional accounting advisor — Xero / construction operations



ABOUT US:

Turns & Reno is a fast-growing tech-enabled renovation and turn service for investor-owned single family rental properties in the Phoenix metro. We manage a portfolio of 100+ properties and are scaling rapidly.



We have a solid bookkeeper handling day-to-day operations. What we need now is a higher-level advisor — someone who can review our financial setup, guide our bookkeeper, help ownership interpret the numbers, and ensure our systems and processes are built to scale.



WHAT THIS ROLE IS:

This is an advisory and oversight role — not execution. Our bookkeeper handles the day-to-day. You're the expert in the room who reviews their work, identifies gaps, recommends improvements, and helps ownership make smarter financial decisions.



WHAT YOU'LL DO:



Review and oversight

Periodically review our Xero setup, books, and financial workflows. Identify gaps, errors, or inefficiencies and work with our bookkeeper to correct them.



Bookkeeper coaching and guidance

Serve as a resource and mentor for our bookkeeper. Answer questions, provide direction on best practices, and help them level up.



Job costing guidance

Help us set up and interpret job costing in Xero — cost per property, per trade, per vendor.



Owner-level financial clarity

Help ownership understand what the numbers are saying. Translate financial reports into operational insights.



Systems and process recommendations

Identify opportunities to improve how we use Xero, structure our chart of accounts, or automate financial workflows.



IDEAL CANDIDATE:

- Xero certified or expert-level

- Construction or trades industry experience

- Job costing familiarity

- Comfortable advising non-financial founders

- Fractional or advisory experience preferred

- AI/automation curiosity a plus



ENGAGEMENT DETAILS:

Fractional / part-time ongoing. Rate negotiable.

title: AI Video Creator — Daily Short-Form Content
description:
We're looking for a reliable, detail-oriented AI video creator to produce short-form vertical videos daily for a hair and cooking brands. This is a long-term, execution-focused role. You will be given scripts, references, and clear direction — your job is to produce clean, consistent output every single day.



This is not a strategy role. This is not freelance project work. This is daily production with a repeatable workflow.



What You'll Do

- Generate AI video clips using Google Veo 3 and/or HeyGen, also Grok

- Edit clips into short-form videos (TikTok, Reels, Shorts format) using CapCut

- Follow provided scripts and match the intended brand style exactly

- Add captions, cuts, pacing, and basic effects as needed

- Deliver finished videos daily, ready to post

- Communicate progress, questions, and blockers daily over 



**Requirements**



- Access to and working experience with Google Veo 3 or HeyGen (at least one is required)

- Proficiency in CapCut, Access to ChatGPT/Claude

- Strong English comprehension — you will be working from English scripts

- Reliable internet connection and dedicated workspace

- Ability to follow instructions precisely and consistently

- Available to communicate daily over 

- Fast turnaround and high attention to detail

- No other full-time clients — this role requires your daily commitment



**Nice to Have**



- Experience creating AI avatar or talking head content

- Familiarity with short-form content pacing and hooks

- Experience with ElevenLabs or other AI voice tools

---



**Pay**



$300/month — consistent, stable, paid monthly. First month is testing period. If satisfactory, we will rehire for additional months.



How to Apply



Include the following — incomplete applications will not be reviewed:



1. A short paragraph (3–5 sentences) about your experience creating short-form video content

2. Links to sample videos you have created or edited (YouTube, TikTok, Google Drive, or similar)

3. Your daily availability and timezone

3. Which AI video tools you currently have access to and your experience level with each

5. Confirm if you need AI tools, if you are renewing your own tools.

title: Growth and Sales Manager
description:
About You 

You want to be part of something with massive potential, there from the ground floor. 

You thrive in environments where the expectations are high, the goal is challenging, the mission is clear, and the team supports each other to get better every day. 

You’re looking for a role with real responsibility, where you feel ownership over what you build. 

You are excited by working directly with a successful entrepreneur who invests in you. 

You want to build something that supports others through stable, dignified, growth-oriented jobs. 

You are a natural closer with a strategist’s mind — equally energized by understanding what makes people say “yes” and building the repeatable systems that turn those yeses into scale. 



Role Overview 

The Growth & Sales Manager is the engine behind Moonlight’s client acquisition strategy. As the Growth & Sales Manager you have a deep instinct for what drives people to say “yes” and the systems-thinking discipline to scale that into a repeatable process. You have a creative and entrepreneurial mind. You are adept at all lead gen tactics — whether it’s cold
, partnerships, webinars, LinkedIn plays, or unconventional outreach strategies. You will work closely with our Digital Marketer to bridge brand and performance — ensuring that outbound efforts are aligned with the broader marketing strategy and that Moonlight is continually being introduced to new audiences in compelling ways. 

Equal parts closer and strategist, this role is responsible for building, refining, and executing our entire outbound and inbound sales funnel — from lead generation through to conversion, onboarding, and renewal. This person is relentlessly outcome-driven, deeply persuasive, and thrives in a fast-paced, early-stage environment where growth is the mandate.



Qualifications 

? 5-7+ years of experience in a sales, growth, or business development role, ideally in a fast-paced startup or service-based business 

? Proven track record of exceeding sales targets and closing high-value clients through outbound channels 

? Deep understanding of sales psychology, lead qualification, and consultative selling 

? Experience designing or optimizing a high-converting sales funnel — from cold outreach to contract 

? Strong proficiency with CRM systems (e.g., HubSpot, Pipedrive) and sales automation tools ? Excellent verbal and written communication skills — persuasive, clear, and human 

? Highly analytical and data-driven with the ability to identify drop-off points and improve conversion rates 

 Creative thinker who enjoys testing and iterating on outreach strategies, messaging, and formats

? Comfortable collaborating with marketers, operators, and leadership to align growth across functions 

? Thrives in a lean, early-stage environment with high autonomy and a bias toward action 

? Excellent project management and organizational abilities; adept at balancing multiple priorities under tight timelines. 

? Comfort and skill in working remotely with distributed, multicultural teams 

Compensation, Growth, and Benefits 

? Competitive compensation commensurate with experience 

? Opportunity for performance-based bonuses as the company grows 

? Direct mentorship from the founder and CEO 

? 21 days of paid time off 

? Health benefits (in progress) 

? Philippines 13th month end of year bonus

title: Immigration Documentation & Evidence Admin
description:
I am seeking a highly organized, tech-savvy Virtual Assistant to manage the complex data entry and evidentiary documentation required for high-stakes immigration filings. 

You will be responsible for ensuring that thousands of data points—from recruitment logs to personal history records—are organized, accurate, and "audit-ready" for government review. 

This role requires a professional who thrives on detail, systematic file organization, and strict compliance with government procedures.

Key Responsibilities:

• Detailed Data Entry: Key-in and cross-reference thousands of details from raw sources (resumes, identity documents, history logs) into Master Excel and Word templates with 100?curacy.

• Audit-Ready Record Keeping: Organize and manage evidentiary records, including date-stamped screenshots, communication logs, and supporting documents to prove compliance with government timelines.

• Information Synthesis: Review high volumes of applicant or client data and summarize them into professional formats that meet strict regulatory standards.

• Systematic File Management: Maintain a flawless digital filing system across multiple platforms, ensuring every piece of evidence is labeled, dated, and easy to retrieve for government audits.

• Quality Control: Perform self-audits to ensure names, dates, and addresses are perfectly consistent across all documentation.

Technical Requirements:

• Expert MS Excel / Google Sheets (formulas, filters, structured data entry).

• Advanced MS Word, Google Drive / OneDrive, and PDF tools (merge, rename, organize).

• Strong proficiency with digital tools: JotForm, E-signature platforms (DocuSign), and Online document sharing.

• Technological Agility: Able to quickly learn and operate systems such as Indeed, Job Bank, and Loom.

• Confidentiality: Absolute discretion in handling sensitive personal data.



Required / Strongly Preferred Experience:

• Hands-on experience with LMIA recruitment processes (Job Bank, Indeed, recruitment logs, screening documentation)

• Experience preparing or organizing immigration-related documents or case files

• Familiarity with compliance-based documentation and audit-ready record keeping

• Background in data entry, bookkeeping, legal admin, or similar detail-oriented roles

Additional Skills (Nice to Have):

• Experience using Canva for simple graphics or social media content.

• Able to assist with basic content posting and administrative tasks as needed.

Work Style & Personality (Critical):

• Active & Proactive Communication: You provide updates and flag issues early without waiting to be asked. You reach out first to confirm receipt of tasks and flag issues immediately.

• Reliable & Responsible: You take ownership of your work and ensure tasks are completed accurately and on time.

• Precision-Obsessed: You carefully review your work to ensure names, dates, and documents are accurate before submission.

• Proactive Problem Solver: If a piece of evidence is missing or a screenshot is blurry, you flag it immediately.

• Highly Communicative: You provide brief, daily "End of Day" (EOD) reports so I always know the status of pending files.

• Deadline-Aware: You understand that government timelines are strict and manage your time to meet filing windows.

You’ll work closely with our content creation team by reviewing, organizing, and selecting content for posting while staying updated on platform trends, audience behavior, and social media best practices.



Think of yourself as the bridge between content creation and viral performance.



What You’ll Be Doing:

This role is perfect for someone who is:



• Chronically online (in a productive way)

• Detail-oriented with strong instincts for what performs online

• Familiar with short-form content trends and platform guidelines

• Comfortable working independently and managing responsibilities remotely

• Fluent in English and communicates clearly

• Open to feedback and eager to improve



Gen Z applicants or candidates deeply familiar with Gen Z internet culture are strongly encouraged to apply, but this is not a requirement.



Experience is helpful, but we care more about:

* Work ethic

* Reliability

* Internet instincts

* Passion for social media



Why This Role Is Worth It

• Long-term growth opportunities within the company

How to Apply

title: Senior Portfolio CPA (100% Remote – Fully Flexible Hours)
description:
About the Role

We are looking for a meticulous and proactive Certified Public Accountant (CPA) based in the Philippines to take full ownership of the financial health of our portfolio companies, and work for Do Good Group (
). Our focus is to create jobs and donate most of the profits to charity. 



We don't care when you work, as long as the work is flawless and deadlines are met. Whether you are a night owl or a morning person, you will have total autonomy over your schedule.



What You’ll Do



Full-Cycle Bookkeeping: Maintain clean, audit-ready books for multiple entities.



Financial Reporting: Prepare monthly, quarterly, and annual P&L, Balance Sheets, and Cash Flow statements.



Reconciliations: Perform complex bank, credit card, and intercompany reconciliations.



M&A Support: Assist in financial due diligence for potential new acquisitions (analyzing historical data and verifying financial health).



Process Improvement: Build and scale accounting workflows that work across our entire portfolio.



Who You Are



Licensed CPA: You must hold a current CPA license (Philippines).



Experience: 5+ years in accounting, preferably with experience in US GAAP or international reporting.



M&A Mindset: You don't just "do the math"—you understand what the numbers mean for a business's valuation.



Tech-Savvy: Expert-level proficiency in QuickBooks Online, Xero, and Excel.



Reliable: Since this is a fully asynchronous role, you must be a self-starter who communicates proactively.



Why Work With Us?



True Flexibility: No "required hours." Work whenever you are most productive.



Stability: This is a full-time, long-term position within a growing portfolio.



Competitive Salary: Paid in USD, bi-monthly.



Growth: Exposure to various industries and the inner workings of business acquisitions.

---

---

Applications without a portfolio will not be considered. We are looking for someone who truly understands the jewelry and fashion aesthetic and takes initiative without being asked.

title: Social Media VA
description:
Role Overview

We are looking for a detail-oriented, self-directed virtual assistant to support a multi-client content strategy operation based in the US. You will be the research and organizational backbone behind a senior content strategist who serves founder-led brands in health, wellness, and creative industries.



This is not a creative role. You are not writing content or making strategic decisions. You are gathering the raw material, organizing the systems, and keeping the calendar running so the strategist can focus on high-level creative and strategic work.

This role is fully remote and async-first. We communicate primarily through Slack or Voxer and work from shared systems. You will be expected to deliver consistent, high-quality work on a weekly cadence with minimal oversight after onboarding.



Core Responsibilities

1. Trending Topic & Hot-Take Research  (~3–4 hours/week)

Monitor a provided list of accounts, hashtags, and industry sources across Instagram, TikTok, X, and relevant publications

Deliver a weekly research brief organized by client, highlighting what’s trending, what competitors are posting, and what’s generating conversation

Flag potential content angles, controversial takes, and emerging narratives worth responding to

Identify gaps — topics the audience is asking about that competitors aren’t covering well



2. Audience & Engagement Research  (~1–2 hours/week)

Pull recurring themes from comments, DMs, and community questions across each client’s channels

Track audience language and phrasing that can be mined for hooks and content angles

Note frequently asked questions and common misconceptions in each client’s niche



3. Content Calendar Management  (~3–4 hours/week)

Populate and maintain a visual content calendar (Milanote or equivalent) for each client

Ensure every calendar card includes: final copy, assets/design files, posting date and time, platform, and any relevant notes

Keep the calendar updated as content is approved, revised, or rescheduled

Coordinate with the strategist on weekly calendar reviews



4. Scheduling & Posting  (~1–2 hours/week)

Schedule approved content to the correct platforms using each client’s scheduling tool

Double-check formatting, hashtags, tags, captions, and links before posts go live

Flag any posting errors or issues immediately



5. Analytics Pulls  (~1 hour/week)

Export weekly performance data from each client’s social platforms

Organize into a simple, consistent reporting template so the strategist can review quickly

Highlight top-performing and underperforming content without interpretation — just surface the data

What This Role Is Not

You are not writing captions, scripts, or creative copy

You are not making strategic content decisions or choosing what gets posted

You are not responding to DMs, comments, or community messages

You are not designing graphics or editing video

Your job is to make the strategist’s job faster and smoother by handling the research, organization, and operational tasks that consume time but don’t require senior-level judgment.



Ideal Candidate

Experience working in or around social media content, marketing, or digital strategy — particularly for US-based brands or creators

Extremely organized with strong attention to detail

Comfortable navigating Instagram, TikTok, X, LinkedIn, and social analytics dashboards as an active user, not just theoretically

Familiar with visual project management tools (Milanote, Notion, Trello, Asana, or similar)

Strong written communication in English — research briefs should be clear, concise, and well-organized

Self-directed — able to complete recurring tasks on a weekly cadence without being reminded

Comfortable working asynchronously across time zones with check-ins via Slack or Voxer

Reliable internet connection and a quiet working environment

Interest in or familiarity with health, wellness, fitness, or creator economy content is a strong plus





You are a good writer and are a keen researcher. 

You should have at least 5 years experience.

title: B2B Sales Caller — NZ Fintech (Cold Calling Accountants) — Paid Trial Month
description:
ABOUT US



We're Frontier Fintech, a New Zealand-based company. Our product Zipy (zipy.store) generates complete professional websites for small service businesses in 90 seconds using AI. The business owner just types their details, and Zipy builds them a website with a Google Map, contact form, services section, and hero image. They pay $19 USD/month to keep it.



We're hiring a full-time B2B Sales Caller to help us partner with New Zealand accountants. Each accountant who joins our affiliate program earns 32% recurring commission for every small business client they refer to Zipy. Your job is to call NZ accountants and convince them to join the program.



IMPORTANT: HONEST READ ON THIS ROLE



This is a paid trial month. After 30 days we'll evaluate results together. If you've delivered against the targets we agree on in week one (call volume, conversation quality, partners signed up), we extend you to a long-term role with a base salary increase and performance bonus structure on top. If results aren't there, the trial ends and we part ways respectfully.



We're being upfront about this because we don't want to waste your time or ours. We're a small startup and we can only afford this hire if it produces measurable results. If you're not comfortable with a one-month trial structure, this role isn't right for you.



For the right person who delivers, this is a long-term position. We'd love to keep someone for years.



SALARY AND HOURS



$1,000 USD/month (paid weekly via OnlineJobs EasyPay / Payoneer — $250 USD every Friday).



Hours: 8am to 4pm Manila time (PHT), Monday to Friday. This gives afternoon overlap with New Zealand business hours.



100% remote, work from home.



WHAT YOU'LL DO



- Make 50-80 outbound calls per day to a pre-loaded list of 1,800+ verified NZ accounting firms (we provide the list)

- Follow a proven script we provide and refine with you in week one

- Pitch the Zipy affiliate program: 32% recurring commission for accountants who refer their clients

- Send follow-up
s (templates provided) to interested accountants

- Update a shared spreadsheet daily with call status, outcomes, and notes

- Report weekly on calls made, conversations had, and partners signed up

- Daily standup with the founder (15 minutes) on Slack or



You're NOT closing the sale of Zipy itself. You're recruiting accountants to become affiliate partners. The accountant then refers their own clients. This is a much easier cold call than direct sales because you're offering them recurring income, not asking them to buy something.



WHAT SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE (TRIAL MONTH TARGETS)



We'll agree on exact numbers in your first week, but expect targets in this range:



Week 1:
dials. Learn the script. 5-10 real conversations with accountants.

Week 2:
dials. 15-25 conversations. 1-2 partner signups.

Week 3:
dials. 20-30 conversations. 3-5 partner signups (cumulative 5-7).

Week 4:
dials. 20-30 conversations. 4-8 partner signups (cumulative 10-15 by end of month).



If by end of month you've signed up 8+ partners and demonstrated consistent call effort, the role becomes long-term with a base salary increase and partner-signup commission on top.



WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR



Required:

- Strong spoken English. Clear, professional, neutral accent. NZ accountants are professional people and the call needs to sound credible.

- 1+ years of B2B cold calling experience (any industry — real estate, SaaS, insurance, finance, agency)

- Comfortable making 50+ calls per day. This is a high-volume role. You need stamina.

- Reliable internet and a quiet home work environment

- Available to start within 2 weeks of being hired



Preferred but not required:

- Experience with affiliate programs, partner channels, or referral marketing

- Familiarity with Google Sheets or similar

- Experience working with Western clients (US, UK, AU, NZ)



You don't need:

- Technical or website-building knowledge (we provide a 90-second walkthrough video)

- Sales certifications or formal training

- Industry experience in fintech or accounting



WHAT WE PROVIDE



- 1,800+ verified NZ accountant contacts with names, firms, and phone numbers

- Proven call script (we'll refine it with you in week one)

-
 templates for follow-ups

- Walkthrough video and partner landing page

- VOIP phone service or call platform (we cover this cost)

- Daily 15-minute standup with the founder for support

- Honest weekly feedback so you always know where you stand



HOW TO APPLY



Send a message including:



1. Brief intro (3-4 sentences about you and your B2B calling experience)



2. A 60-second voice recording of yourself reading this paragraph aloud:



"Hi, I'm calling from Zipy in Auckland. We help accountants like you add a recurring revenue stream by referring small business clients to our AI website builder. Your clients get a professional website built in 90 seconds, and you earn 32% recurring commission for every month they stay subscribed. I'd love to send you a quick walkthrough video and our partner page so you can see how it works. Would that be okay?"



Record on your phone and upload to Google Drive, Dropbox, or send the audio file directly. This is the most important part of the application — we hire on voice quality and clarity. Don't skip it.



3. Tell us about your most successful B2B cold-calling result. Specific numbers if possible (calls made, conversations had, conversions achieved).



4. Confirm you understand and accept the one-month paid trial structure described above.



5. Confirm you can work 8am-4pm PHT, Monday to Friday, starting within 2 weeks.



WHAT HAPPENS NEXT



We'll review applications within 48 hours of receiving them. Shortlisted candidates will be invited to a 15-minute Zoom interview. We aim to make a hiring decision within one week of the application deadline.



Looking forward to hearing from you.



Lloyd Brown

Co-Founder, Frontier Fintech
