title: Meta Ads VSL Video Editor Skincare B-Roll & Direct Response
description:
READ THIS FIRST

We hire based on execution, not resumes.



We are looking for a Meta Ads video editor who can turn detailed ad briefings, voice-overs, scripts, and B-roll directions into high-converting skincare creatives.



This is not a basic video editing role.



You need to understand direct response editing, VSL-style ads, B-roll driven storytelling, hook pacing, visual retention, and how Meta ads need to feel in the first 3 seconds.



You will start with a paid test video.



Paid test structure:



Up to 60 seconds: $5

Over 60 seconds: $10



If your test is strong, we are looking for a long-term part-time editor, with the possibility to grow into a full-time or lead editor role.



ABOUT US



We are building ELYVIA, a premium skincare brand focused on at-home infusion treatments.



Our hero product is a systtem designed for women who want smoother-looking, firmer-looking and more refined skin from home.



Our ads focus on topics such as:



sagging jowls and lower-face ageing

acne scarring and uneven texture

under-eye bags

skincare products only working at the surface level

clinic treatments being expensive, inconvenient, or too invasive



We create performance-driven Meta ads for the UK market.



You will receive detailed scripts, voice-overs, and structured briefings. For example, our current ad briefings include full scripts, timed B-roll scenes, product shots, animation needs, before/after visuals, and direct-response structure for creatives.



We need an editor who can take this level of briefing and turn it into a polished, high-converting video ad.



WHAT YOU’LL DO



You will edit Meta ads using:



VSL-style editing

B-roll storytelling

product visuals

AI UGC or avatar footage when needed

skincare mechanism animations

before/after proof visuals

subtitles and retention-focused text

sound design and pacing

clean mobile-first 9:16 formatting



You will receive:



finished scripts

voice-over files

detailed scene-by-scene briefings

access to our B-roll library

product assets

examples of previous ads



We expect you to source additional visuals yourself when the briefing requires something we do not  have.



For example, if the script mentions collagen support, micro-channels, peptide serum delivery, acne scar texture, clinic microneedling, jawline sagging, or skin-layer animations, you need to be able to find, create, or source suitable visuals that match the message.



Some of our scripts require shots every 2–4 seconds, with longer animations where needed for mechanism explanations.



YOU MUST BE ABLE TO

Edit high-converting Meta ads, not just nice-looking videos

Understand direct response creative structure

Build VSL-style ads from a voice-over

Match visuals tightly to every line of the script

Source strong B-roll when our library does not cover a scene

Create or source simple skincare animations

Add clean subtitles and on-screen text

Improve pacing, retention, and visual clarity

Make premium skincare ads that feel trustworthy, not cheap or dropshipping

Work independently without needing every shot explained twice

Follow a detailed briefing while still bringing creative input



REQUIRED EXPERIENCE



You should have experience with at least one of these:



Meta ad creatives

VSL ads

direct response video ads

UGC-style ads

ecommerce product ads

skincare / beauty / wellness ads

B-roll driven video ads



Experience with skincare, beauty, health, wellness, or direct-response ecommerce is a strong plus.



SOFTWARE / TOOLS



You must have your own editing software and tools.



Examples:



Adobe Premiere Pro

After Effects

CapCut Pro

DaVinci Resolve

Final Cut Pro

Motion graphics / animation tools

stock footage platforms

AI video tools if relevant



We do not provide editing software. You are expected to already have the tools you need.



IMPORTANT SKILLS



We are specifically looking for someone who understands:



how to make the first 3 seconds scroll-stopping

how to keep visual pacing tight

how to make scripts easy to follow visually

how to source relevant B-roll

how to create visual contrast between “problem” and “solution”

how to edit before/after proof sections

how to use animations for mechanism explanation

how to make skincare ads look premium and credible

how to edit for Meta ads, not YouTube or long-form content



HOW WE WORK



We give clear direction.



You will usually receive:



script

voice-over

example competitor ad

scene-by-scene briefing

B-roll notes

brand direction

product assets

access to our B-roll library



But we do not want someone who only places the exact files we provide.



A strong editor should be able to look at the script, understand the emotional and conversion goal, and source missing visuals where needed.



If a scene says “skin-layer collagen support animation” or “woman 50+ touching sagging jawline area,” we expect you to understand what visual is needed and find or create something that fits.



COMPENSATION



We start with a paid test.



Paid test structure:



Test video up to 60 seconds: $5

Test video over 60 seconds: $10



After the test, if the quality is strong, we discuss ongoing work.



Long-term compensation can include:



part-time fixed pay

consistent weekly editing workload

bonuses for winning creatives

higher pay as performance improves

potential full-time or lead editor role



We are not looking for a one-off freelancer. We are looking for someone who can grow with the brand.



TEST VIDEO



For the test, you will receive:



a script

voice-over

example ad / reference

access to base assets

detailed creative briefing

B-roll notes



You are expected to create a complete Meta ad.



We will evaluate:



hook strength

pacing

visual matching

B-roll sourcing

sound design

structure

clarity

premium skincare feel

ability to follow the briefing

ability to improve the creative with your own judgement



HOW TO APPLY



SEND:

Your portfolio

Examples of Meta ads, VSL ads, UGC ads, or ecommerce ads you edited

What editing software you use

Whether you can source B-roll yourself

Whether you can create or source simple skincare / skin-layer animations

How you approach the first 3 seconds of a Meta ad



IMPORTANT



Please only apply if you are comfortable working with detailed ad briefings and performance-focused scripts.



Do not apply if:



you only do basic cuts

you cannot source visuals yourself

you do not understand Meta ad pacing

you cannot work from a structured briefing

you do not have your own editing software

you cannot show a relevant portfolio



If you meet most of the requirements but not all, you can still apply. Just be honest about your skill level and show us your best work.



We are happy to train the right person, but you must already have a strong editing foundation and a good eye for ads.







Kind regards,



Syfax.

title: Content & Production Specialist for a Pet Company (Full-time/Long-term/Remote)
description:
We’re hiring a Content & Production Specialist to support our Content, Editorial, & Social Systems team across posting, inbox management, and day-to-day operations.



In this role, you’ll be responsible for executing structured, repeatable tasks while supporting Content Managers with updates, live article edit coordination, and general content and production workflows. Your domain will be keeping content accurate, organized, and moving forward, while knowing when to take initiative and when to ask questions.



About us:



Pangolia is a fully remote, international company. We run high-traffic content and media websites that reach millions of readers each month, with a focus on the pet world.



About the Role:



You’ll be supporting multiple tea
mbers across content posting, live post edit workflows, inbox management, and operational tasks. Much of your work will follow clear processes — but not everything will.



This role requires someone who can balance accuracy, initiative, and communication. You should feel confident taking action within guidelines, but equally comfortable pausing to clarify when something doesn’t fit the usual process.



This is not a passive, task-only role. We’re looking for someone thoughtful, reliable, and communicative.



What You’ll Be Doing:



- Post and update content based on established guidelines

- Assist with live post edit workflows (applying flagged updates, formatting, and supporting content revisions)

- Help manage shared inboxes (sorting, flagging, and responding where appropriate)

- Follow structured processes for recurring tasks with high accuracy

- Support Content Managers with ad hoc updates and requests



What Success Looks Like:



- Content updates and posts are accurate and consistent

- Live edits are applied carefully and correctly

- Inbox communication is clear, timely, and organized

- Tasks are completed reliably with minimal to no errors

- Questions are raised at the right time — not too late, not unnecessarily early



Musts for the role:



- Available 40 hours a week 

- Strong written and spoken English

- Highly organized and detail-oriented  - In the first line of your application, please let us know what your favorite animal is (we are a pet company, after all!)

- Comfortable with repetitive tasks, but able to think critically when needed

- Experience with Google Sheets, Google Docs, WordPress

- Knows when to take initiative and when to ask for guidance

- Communicates clearly and proactively

- Experience in content, admin, or virtual assistant-style roles

- Reliable internet



Bonus (Nice to Have):



- Experience with social media posting or scheduling

- Basic video editing (short-form content, reels, simple cuts)

- Experience supporting content updates or edits

- Podcast production or promotion

- Outreach experience for interviews/guest articles

- An eye for content quality and presentation



What You Can Expect From Us:



- Clear processes and training to set you up for success

- Autonomy and trust once trained

- A collaborative relationship with the Content, Editorial & Social Systems team

- A role that will evolve as the team grows



Perks:



- Flexible work hours

- 10 PTO days annually

- 13-month bonus paid in December

- Public holidays off

- Internet reimbursement



To apply, please include:



- A brief introduction of yourself

- Relevant experience - have you worked in this area before?

- Why does this role interest you?

- Anything else you think would help us understand how you'd thrive in this position



Can't wait to hear from you! 



Nicole Cosgrove

Director of Content, Editorial, & Social Systems

title: AU Intermediate Tax Accountant
description:
Our values guide everything we do:

Human First – We put people at the heart of everything. Warmth, respect, and genuine care matter here.

Integrity & Authenticity – We act transparently and ethically, always.

Proactive Support – We anticipate needs and act before challenges become problems.

Empowerment Through Knowledge – We educate and guide so clients can confidently own their path.

Commitment to Growth – We celebrate progress — for our clients and our team.



We focus on work-life balance, smart systems, and sustainable growth. Were passionate about creating a workplace where our people feel supported, trusted, and excited to come to work.



Why Join Us

Competitive salary starting from PHP 100,000 per month

Permanent work-from-home setup

Working Monday to Friday, 7 am – 3 pm PHP time

Strong focus on work-life balance

Opportunity to grow with the firm long-term

Supportive, close-knit team environment

Ongoing training and professional development

New equipment supplied

A firm that values quality, relationships, and enjoyment in work



Position Summary

You'll be preparing financial statements, tax returns, and providing practical support.



This role is ideal for someone who enjoys public practice, values balance, and wants to develop their skills in a calm, well-structured environment, without the pressure and politics of a large firm.

Perform account reconciliations and resolve discrepancies in financial records

Work collaboratively with the team to meet deadlines in a planned and sustainable way

BGL Super

Ignition

Solid understanding of accounting principles and tax compliance

Experience in preparing financial statements and tax returns

Strong attention to detail and organisational skills

Good communication skills and a client-focused approach

Ability to manage multiple tasks and meet deadlines in a structured environment

title: Acquisition Agent — Real Estate (Warm Inbound Leads)
description:
About the Role

We run a high-volume nationwide real estate acquisitions operation. We generate warm inbound leads from motivated sellers across the U.S. — sellers who already raised their hand. Your job is to call them, build quick rapport, underwrite deals, make offers, and get contracts signed.

This is not a training role. You will be handling live leads from day one.



What You'll Do



Call and text warm inbound seller leads same day — speed matters

Qualify sellers (motivation, timeline, condition, price)

Deliver offers confidently using our script and framework

Handle objections and push toward commitment

Log all activity into our CRM (Podio) in real time

Follow up systematically until the lead is closed or killed

Sign deals — contracts via PandaDoc





Requirements — Non-Negotiable



Minimum 1 year of outbound/inbound sales experience (real estate preferred)

Proven track record of closing deals or converting calls to signed agreements

Strong spoken and written English — no heavy accent

Comfortable making 50–80 calls per day

Experience with a CRM (any — Podio is preferred)

Fast internet, quality headset, distraction-free workspace

Available during U.S. business hours (EST or CST preferred)





You Are the Right Fit If:



You've worked acquisitions, solar, insurance, or high-ticket phone sales

You can handle rejection and keep dialing

You don't need hand-holding — you follow a system and execute

You're motivated by results, not just hours clocked





What We Provide



Warm inbound leads (you are not cold calling)

Proven scripts and objection handlers

CRM access and full onboarding workflow

Direct communication with the team lead

Performance bonuses for contracts signed





To Apply, Answer These 4 Questions:



Describe a deal or sale you closed where the prospect initially said no. What did you do?

What CRM have you used and how did you track your pipeline?

What is your internet speed and what hours are you available EST?

Record a 60-second voice intro. Link it here. (Non-negotiable — no recording = no interview.)

title: Video Editor for Ecommerce Dropshipping (Meta Ads Specialist)
description:
Are YOU an experienced video editor specializing in Meta Ads for physical products and dropshipping? Can you look at a competitor’s winning ad and immediately understand how to replicate it technically, or transform a script into a winning creative using the most advanced AI tools? If you answered an enthusiastic “YES” to both questions above, KEEP READING.

We run multiple international companies in the ecommerce and education space and we’re looking for a Video Editor (Meta Ads Specialist) to join our creative team.

We need someone to take responsibility for:

Sales-Focused Ad Production: Crafting clean, high-conversion ads (1 to 5 minutes) including Mini-VSLs, AI-UGC, and "Product in Hand" content.

Asset Management & Sourcing: You will be provided with a folder of our selected B-rolls. However, if additional clips are needed, you must source them autonomously and innovatively. The use of traditional stock footage (Shutterstock, Envato, etc.) is strictly FORBIDDEN.

From Script to Finished Product: We provide the scripts; your job is to interpret them visually, choosing the right clips and editing them to create a dynamic, persuasive, and technically flawless product.

AI Tool Research & Implementation: This is your passion. You must stay constantly updated on new AI releases (editing, UGC avatars, video generation). In our weekly calls, we expect you to pitch new software that can revolutionize our workflow.

AI Asset Generation: Hands-on use of the AI Stack (Higgsfield, Sora 2, Veo 3, Arcads, MakeUGC) to create or enhance content.

Visual Optimization: Implementing textual hooks, kinetic typography, and scroll-stopping subtitles.

Position Requirements:

At least 2 years of specific experience: A solid background in Meta Ads for ecommerce brands. You must have worked as an editor for brands generating at least $10k/month in revenue. While respecting privacy, you will be asked to provide examples of these collaborations in the following stages.

Deep Passion for Innovation: This isn't just a job; you must love technology. We want an AI "killer" who stays ahead of the market.

Excellent Problem-Solving Skills: If instructions aren't crystal clear or assets are missing, you don't stop. You find a solution and complete the task with excellence.

Availability & Commitment: Starting with a part-time collaboration (20h/week) with a clear intention of moving to Full-Time shortly. We work 5 days a week, but availability on Saturdays and Sundays is required for emergencies. Please note: we are looking for a dedicated partner, not an "Upwork or Fiverr style" freelancer juggling 5-6 different companies. If you cannot guarantee us top priority and absolute mental focus, do not apply.

Obsessive Precision & Anti-Mediocrity: Subtitles, cuts, and details must be perfect. Mediocrity is not allowed in our team.

Fluent in English: The team communicates in English. Deep proficiency is mandatory to manage multilingual content (IT, FR, ES, DE, NL).

What We Offer:

Performance Bonuses: Potential for bonuses up to $1000+ per month based on the results of the videos produced.

Career Growth: A real opportunity to become Head of Video Editing.

Active Involvement: You will actively participate in the growth of an international company, testing the most powerful AI tools on the market.

title: Real Estate AI Photo Editor
description:
What you'll do

- You'll take raw photos shot on iPhones and Android phones and enhance them using AI tools for real estate marketing. Most images will need multiple rounds of prompting and tweaking to get right — adjusting virtual staging, fixing lighting, cleaning up clutter, correcting angles, brightening dark rooms, replacing skies, and so on. Every image needs to look natural and realistic. No warped furniture, no melted doorframes, no six-fingered hands on the kitchen counter. If something looks off, you re-prompt until it's right.





What we care about most

- Attention to detail is the entire job. We'd rather you spend 30 minutes getting one photo perfect than rush through ten that look "mostly fine." If you're the type of person who notices a crooked picture frame in the background or a weird shadow that doesn't match the light source, you'll do well here. If you tend to call things "good enough," this isn't the right fit.





Requirements



- Strong eye for detail and realism — you can spot AI artifacts and weird inconsistencies most people miss

- Comfortable working with AI image tools (Nanobanana, Sora, or similar) and willing to learn whatever we use

- Solid written English to understand prompt instructions and feedback

- Reliable internet and ability to hit deadlines

- Able to take revision notes without ego - sometimes we'll ask for the same image redone 3-4 times





Bonus



- Prior experience enhancing real estate photos specifically

- Video editing experience with DaVinci Resolve, Premiere, CapCut, or similar (we may have video work down the line)

- Familiarity with virtual staging tools



To apply, please send:



- 2-3 before/after examples of real estate or interior photo enhancements you've done (if you have them)

- A short note about your experience with AI image tools

- In your first line, write the word "PIXEL" so we know you read this

title: Senior Accountant, Management Accounting and Business Services
description:
ROLE OVERVIEW



In this role as Senior Accountant of the Accounting and Finance Services team in Manila, you will be responsible for supporting your managers by ensuring that high-quality financial accounting, business advisory, and business management services are provided to our institutional and corporate clients. Your expertise will be integral in driving the success of the team and delivering tailored, specialized outcomes for our clients. You will be required to complete key management accounting and business services tasks in a timely manner, working with your broader team to accomplish an excellent standard of service delivery for our clients.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES



Management Accounting:

-Perform key management accounting tasks, including cost analysis, margin analysis, and performance metrics.

-Develop and maintain management accounting reports to assist in decision-making.

-Support clients in understanding their financial performance and identifying areas for improvement.

- Undertake Accounts Payable / Receivable processes (inputting invoices, processing bills, etc.)

- Process and maintain payroll functionality

- Attend to 
 and process inbound requests accordingly.



Financial Reporting and Analysis:

-Prepare, review, and analyze monthly, quarterly, and annual financial reports.

-Provide insights and recommendations based on financial analysis to suit desired stakeholder requirements.

-Ensure compliance with accounting standards and regulatory requirements.



Budgeting and Forecasting:

-Participate in the budgeting and forecasting process for clients, including variance analysis and reporting.

-Collaborate with clients and internal stakeholders to develop realistic and achievable plans.

-Monitor budget implementation and provide ongoing financial projections and analysis.



Business Advisory:

-Support strategic business advisory services to clients, helping them make informed financial decisions.

-Identify opportunities for business growth and cost savings, and provide actionable recommendations.

-Conduct financial modeling and scenario analysis to support business strategies.



Client Relationship Management:

-Build and maintain strong relationships with clients, ensuring high levels of client satisfaction.

-Act as a primary point of contact for clients, addressing their accounting and business service needs.

-Provide regular updates and reports to clients on their financial status and business performance.



Compliance and Risk Management:

-Ensure all financial practices adhere to legal regulations and company policies.

-Identify and mitigate financial risks through diligent monitoring and control processes.

-Support internal and external audits by providing required documentation and explanations.



EXPERIENCE AND QUALIFICATIONS:



To be successful in this role, the ideal candidate will have the following experience and

qualifications:

- Software Experience: By familiar with ERP systems like Netsuite, Salesforce etc. while having a strong competence in XERO and/or MYOB

- Educational Background: A bachelor's degree in accounting, finance, or a related field

- Relevant Experience: A minimum of 3 years post-graduate experience within the financial management or accounting industry

- Regulatory Knowledge: Strong understanding of relevant accounting standards, tax laws, and regulatory requirements.

- Communication Skills: Excellent communication and interpersonal skills

- Problem-Solving Skills: Strong problem-solving and decision-making abilities

- Technical Skills: Proficiency in Microsoft Office and financial management software

- Professional Certification: Professional accounting or finance qualification (e.g. CA, CPA, CFA) is highly desirable.

- Client Management Skills: Strong relationships building and maintenance with clients.

title: YouTube Faceless Video Editor (Storytelling / Documentary Style)
description:
We are looking for a skilled YouTube video editor who specializes in faceless storytelling videos.



This is not basic editing. Our videos rely on strong hooks, emotional storytelling, and engaging pacing to keep viewers watching.



Our niche focuses on powerful historical and real-life stories involving war, injustice, betrayal, and unexpected heroism. The audience is primarily American viewers, so the editing style should feel cinematic, emotional, and engaging.



If you understand how to build curiosity in the first 15 seconds and maintain retention throughout the video, this job may be perfect for you.



What You Will Do



• Edit faceless YouTube videos (8–15 minutes)

• Create very engaging hooks in the first 15–30 seconds

• Use historical footage, images, and AI-generated visuals when real footage is not available

• Add simple animations and motion graphics to improve retention

• Match visual pacing with narration and background music

• Use sound design and music beats to enhance emotional 
nts

• Maintain viewer engagement throughout the entire video



Skills Required



You should have experience with:



• Story-driven editing for YouTube

• Faceless YouTube documentary style videos

• Retention editing techniques

• Using AI tools to generate visuals when needed

• Simple animations and motion graphics

• Syncing music and visuals with narration



Software examples (any of these is fine):



• Premiere Pro

• After Effects

• CapCut

• DaVinci Resolve



Payment



You will be paid $3 per minute of finished video.



Example:

A 15 minute video = $45



Payments will be sent after the video is completed and approved.



Important 

To make sure you read this entire job post, write the word "EAGLE" at the beginning of your application.



Applications without this word will not be considered.



Question 



Imagine you are editing the opening scene of a video about an American soldier who refuses an illegal order during war.



How would you edit the first 20 seconds of this video to hook the viewer?



Explain what visuals, pacing, music, and text you would use.



To Apply



Please send:



1. 2–3 relevant videos you have edited (don't send anyone else's work)



2. Your answer to the question above



3. The word EAGLE at the start of your message



Opportunity



This can become a long-term position if your work is good.

We plan to produce videos regularly every week.



We are looking for someone who understands how to turn a story into a powerful visual experience.

DO APPLY if:



-You have worked in the travel industry OR have strong experience handling detailed client support, bookings, or coordination tasks.



-You have experience explaining policies, handling client questions, or working with structured documentation (insurance experience is a strong advantage, but not required).



-You can send a short video introduction.



-You are looking for a long-term, full-time remote role with a stable team that invests in your growth.



-You are professional, detail-oriented, and take pride in doing things correctly.



-You can work independently, follow documented processes, and ask questions when something is unclear.



-If you have handled complex client situations, briefly mention one example in your application.



-If you have worked with senior or high-touch clients before, please highlight this.



About Us



We are a boutique travel agency based in Atlanta, GA (EST). We specialize in luxury river cruises with Viking and provide high-touch support for our clients.



We're warm, organized, and focused on delivering excellent service. Our team is small, collaborative, and values doing things right.



We have clear processes (SOPs) for most tasks. You will be trained and supported.



We're looking for someone who wants to grow into this role long-term.



Who We're Looking For



Must-Have:



Prior experience as a virtual assistant or in a similar remote support role



Excellent written English with a professional and friendly tone



Proven ability to work independently and manage detailed tasks



High attention to detail, follow-through, and accountability



Reliable high-speed internet and a quiet workspace



Bonus Points:



Experience with TripMate, Allianz, or Travel Insured



Any experience with Viking Cruises or river cruising



HubSpot CRM experience (or experience with similar CRMs)



Familiarity with booking systems, invoices, or client records



Experience reviewing, explaining, or processing insurance (any industry)



Your Role



As our Virtual Assistant, you'll be responsible for:



Drafting client
s



Updating HubSpot CRM and internal trackers



Calling Viking Cruises and partners to verify information or resolve questions



Supporting the insurance department with administrative tasks



Accuracy matters. Small mistakes in names, dates, or policies can impact the client experience.



You will be trained and supported as you learn our systems.



So expectations are clear:



You'll work directly with our team as internal support



Guest/client
s are drafts for review



You'll have autonomy for routine tasks, with guidance on when to escalate



You'll be supported by an experienced team invested in your success



Schedule



Target hours: 9:00am to 5:00pm EST (evening/night shift in the Philippines — please confirm this works for you)



Hours may vary slightly based on business needs



Saturday coverage may be introduced later via rotation



How to Apply



Applications that don't follow these instructions may not be reviewed. This helps us identify candidates with strong attention to detail.



Candidates who clearly follow all steps are prioritized.



Step 1:



Send your application with the subject line or first sentence including: "Meghan's #1"



Step 2:



Include a short video introduction that:



Explains your relevant experience (insurance experience is a bonus, not required)



Shares why you're interested in this role



Describes what excites you about working with a team like ours



Keep it natural and concise. We are looking for clarity, not perfection.



Step 3:



Attach your CV or resume (if using Google Drive, ensure access is granted)



We're excited to meet someone who cares about doing great work and wants to grow with a strong team.



If that sounds like you — we encourage you to apply today.

title: Senior Helpdesk Engineer
description:
HOW TO APPLY:



If you feel this position aligns with your skills and experience, please fill out the application form here:


/bepartofourteam.





We’re looking for a hands-on senior IT professional who can support clients at all levels while also leading or assisting with IT projects and driving innovative solutions.

Our senior tea
mbers are critical to supporting our awesome clients and their users. They leverage industry-leading tools and expertise to resolve complex issues, prevent future problems, and improve client IT environments.

This role is perfect for someone who enjoys solving challenging technical problems while also designing and implementing improvements that make a real impact.



Key Responsibilities:



Client Support (All Levels)



Provide technical support to clients via phone,
, and remote access—handling everything from basic troubleshooting to advanced escalations.

Diagnose and resolve hardware, software, and network issues for multiple clients.

Perform O365 and Windows administration, user account management, and access provisioning.

Support and troubleshoot VOIP systems (e.g., 3CX).

Manage and maintain RMM and PSA tools (e.g., Datto, Halo).

Mentor junior engineers and provide guidance to improve team troubleshooting skills.





Projects & Innovation



Lead or assist with IT projects, e.g cloud migrations, system upgrades, deployments, and process automation etc.

Identify and implement solutions to reduce recurring issues and improve efficiency.

Develop and maintain PowerShell scripts to automate routine tasks and streamline operations.

Collaborate with vendors and clients to plan, test, and deliver new IT solutions.



Documentation & Communication



Log issues and resolutions accurately for future reference.

Communicate effectively with clients and vendors to ensure smooth resolutions and project delivery.



Requirements



Previous experience working in an MSP environment is a plus.

Excellent communication skills – able to have comfortable, friendly conversations in English without being overly formal or technical.

Strong attention to detail and follow-through – “never let it go until it’s solved.”

Demonstrable experience working with Windows systems (client/server) and O365 administration.

Proficiency in advanced troubleshooting methodologies.

Scripting skills, particularly in PowerShell, to automate tasks and improve efficiency.

Experience with VOIP systems and a solid understanding of network infrastructure.

Familiarity with RMM and PSA platforms used in MSP environments (e.g., Datto, Halo).

We are heavy users of Office 365 and Azure, so you’ll need to have solid experience and know the fundamentals or demonstrate skills in something very similar..

Ability to handle difficult tasks, set proper expectations, and deliver solutions within a reasonable timeframe.

Out-of-the-box thinker – proactive, creative, and always looking to improve processes.

Willingness to go the extra mile to ensure client satisfaction.

Ability to “figure things out,” even when facing new or unfamiliar technologies.

title: Wedding Media Coordinator
description:
About the Company



We are a wedding photography and videography company focused on delivering a seamless, stress-free experience for our couples. We don’t just capture weddings; we manage the entire experience behind the scenes so our clients can enjoy their day without worry.  



The Role



We are looking for a Wedding Media Coordinator to be the main point of contact for our clients after they have paid their deposit. You will act as the bridge between our clients, photographers, videographers, and editors to make sure nothing gets missed from booking to final delivery.  



What You Will Be Responsible For



Client & Team Communication



- Take over communication once the client is booked and the deposit is paid.  

- Communicate primarily via
, text, and our client portal.  

- Phone Calls: While rare, you must be comfortable and available to jump on a phone call with a client or tea
mber if a situation requires it.

- Write the word Coordinator as the first word of your response so I know you read this whole thing.

- Keep clients informed, reassured, and guided throughout the entire process.  

- Coordinate with photographers, videographers, and editors to ensure they have accurate wedding details.  



Workflow Management



- Assign photographers and videographers to upcoming weddings.  

- Post new projects for tea
mbers to sign up for.  

- Manage and update the client portal, which serves as our main communication hub.  

- Double-check that no tasks, files, or timelines are missed.  



Post-Wedding Coordination



- Collect and organize media from the wedding team.  

- Send files to the editing team and monitor their progress.  

- Deliver final media to clients and maintain communication until the project is complete.  



Social Media Management



- Post company-provided wedding photos and videos.  

- Create captions and content aligned with current wedding trends.  

- Help maintain a professional and high-quality brand presence online.  



The "Weekend Hero" Bonus ($150+ Per I
)

Your core schedule is Monday to Friday. However, weddings happen on weekends.



- In 6 years and thousands of weddings, we have only had 2 major weekend emergencies. They are very rare.

- You are required to be reachable for these rare "Tier-1" emergencies (e.g., a photographer doesn't show up).

- The Reward: If you are called to resolve a weekend emergency, you will receive a $150+ Hero Bonus per i
 on top of your regular salary.



Schedule



- Monday to Friday

- 9:00 AM to 5:00 PM (Assigned US Timezone)

- Weekend availability only for rare, urgent emergencies.



Who We Are Looking For



- Customer Service Experience: You should be comfortable talking to people and handling their concerns warmly and professionally.  

- Reliable & Organized: You are good at following through on tasks without being reminded.  

- Calm Under Pressure: You can handle a situation logically if things move fast.  

- Great Writer: You can write professional
s and creative social media captions.  

- Phone Ready: You are willing to get on a call when a text or
 isn't enough.



Why This Role Matters



This role is the backbone of our operations. When you do your job well, our team stays prepared and our clients feel taken care of every step of the way.  THIS IS A LONG TERM POSITION, NOT A GIG.



To Apply:



- Send a CV, Canva, loom video, written explanation or whatever you want telling me WHY you are the best fit for this role.

title: Creative Marketing Manager (Content & Systems)
description:
About Us



The Event Engineer helps entrepreneurs scale to 7-figures and beyond. Led by Lisa Barry, we build high-converting event systems and world-class client experiences. Our mission is simple: helping visionary founders grow wealth that fuels meaningful change.



The Role



We are seeking a high-level Creative Marketing Manager to own the visual and written soul of our brand. This role is for someone who is equal parts "Artist" and "Architect." You will be responsible for creating the elite content that establishes Lisa Barry’s voice in the industry while managing the backend systems that keep our business running smoothly.



Key Responsibilities

1. Content Creation & Growth



Video Production: Create high-impact Reels, TikToks, and Shorts from scratch. You’ll research trends, develop unique hooks, and execute flawless edits.



Audience Building: Execute the strategy to reach 50,000 – 100,000 followers through elite short-form content and daily engagement.



Community Connection: Engage with our audience daily to build deep relationships using Lisa’s authentic, "New World" voice.



2. Systems & Funnels



GoHighLevel Mastery: Build, manage, and optimize landing pages and sales funnels. You ensure every page is visually stunning, premium, and functional.



Operations: Maintain our ClickUp workspace. You are responsible for keeping projects on track and ensuring no task falls through the cracks.



Asset Design: Create high-converting lead magnets, PDF guides, and pitch decks that look like 7-figure products.



3. Writing & Creative Direction



Copywriting: Ghostwrite our weekly Substack, the "Wednesday Drop" newsletter, and all social captions. You’ll capture Lisa’s voice perfectly to inspire action.



Innovation: Stay ahead of marketing trends to keep the brand fresh, modern, and visually elite.



4. AI Collaboration (The Claude Requirement)



Power User: Use Claude as your primary co-working partner for writing, strategy, and technical troubleshooting.



Co-Pilot Mentality: You aren't just copy-pasting; you are coaching the AI to "Lisa-fy" every piece of content to ensure it is never generic.



Who You Are

An Owner: You don’t wait for a task list. You see gaps and fill them with brilliance.



System-Oriented: You enjoy the "backend" tech (GHL/ClickUp) as much as the "front end" creative.



Design-Obsessed: If it isn’t world-class, it doesn’t get published.



High-Performance: You thrive in fast-paced environments and take pride in hitting growth targets.



Qualifications & Skills

Technical: Deep proficiency in GoHighLevel and ClickUp.



AI Mastery: Expert-level ability to use Claude for high-speed, high-quality output.



Design/Video: Expert in short-form video editing (CapCut) and visual design (Canva/Photoshop).



Experience: 2–3+ years working for high-ticket coaches or agencies.



Communication: Flawless English with a talent for voice matching.



Work Arrangement & Compensation

Location: Remote (Based in the Philippines)



Hours: 9am – 5pm AEST/AEDT (Full-Time)



Compensation: $1,000 AUD / month + performance-based growth opportunities.



How to Apply

To ensure you are a high-level collaborator and not just "copy-pasting" with AI, we require the following:



Your Portfolio: Links to original Short-Form Video (Reels/TikTok) and marketing designs.



The "Loom" Intro: A 2-minute video introducing yourself. Tell us about one time you used Claude to solve a complex problem or speed up a project.



DISC Profile: Please include your DISC assessment results (PDF or screenshot).



Subject Line: Please use the subject line: [Your Name] | Creative Marketing Manager



Note: Shortlisted candidates will be invited to a paid trial.

title: Full-Time Xero Bookkeeper & Admin Assistant
description:
About Us

We are a growing Australian property compliance and building standards business based in Melbourne. Our team conducts rental property inspections, compliance audits, and assessments across Victoria. We're looking for a dedicated, intelligent bookkeeper who wants to grow with our business long-term and become an integral part of our small, supportive team.

About the Role

This is a full-time, permanent position for someone who is detail-oriented, proactive, and eager to learn. You'll split your time between:

Bookkeeping (approximately 16 hours/week): Managing our Xero accounting, reconciliations, invoicing, expenses, and GST

Business Operations Support (approximately 24 hours/week): Helping run day-to-day operations using our job management software (ServiceM8), coordinating with clients and tenants, scheduling inspections, creating forms, and supporting our Compliance Officer (Rebecca) with administrative tasks

You do NOT need prior experience with ServiceM8—we will fully train you on this system. What matters most is that you're a smart, capable bookkeeper who can learn new software quickly and work collaboratively with our team.

Key Responsibilities

Bookkeeping & Financial Management (Xero):

Daily transaction recording and categorization

Bank reconciliations (accounts, credit cards, loans)

Invoicing clients and tracking accounts receivable

Recording expenses and managing accounts payable

GST reporting and BAS preparation support

Monthly financial reports and summaries

Expense tracking across multiple properties and projects

Business Operations & Administration (ServiceM8 - training provided):

Creating and managing job bookings and schedules

Building custom forms and templates for inspections and compliance reports

Reaching out to tenants and property managers to coordinate inspection bookings

Following up on job completions and client communications

Supporting our Compliance Officer (Rebecca) with task management and workflow coordination

 management and client correspondence

General administrative support as the business grows

What We're Looking For

Required:

Proven Xero bookkeeping experience (minimum 1-2 years preferred)

Strong understanding of accounting fundamentals, reconciliations, invoicing, and expense management

Excellent written and spoken English—you'll communicate directly with Australian clients, tenants, and our team

Detail-oriented with strong organizational skills

Comfortable learning new software systems quickly (we'll train you on ServiceM8 and our processes)

Reliable internet connection and dedicated workspace

Genuinely interested in a long-term position where you can grow with the company

Highly Regarded (but not required):

Experience with Australian clients or understanding of Australian GST/BAS

Familiarity with job management or CRM software (e.g., ServiceM8, Fergus, Tradify, Jobber)

Background in property management, real estate, or service-based businesses

Experience coordinating with clients or scheduling appointments

Personal Qualities We Value:

Loyal and committed—we want someone who sees this as a career, not just a job

Collaborative and easy to work with—you'll work closely with Rebecca daily

Proactive and solutions-focused—you take initiative and don't wait to be told what to do

Adaptable—as we grow, responsibilities may evolve and expand

What We Offer

? Stable, full-time employment with consistent 40-hour weeks

? Competitive pay based on experience—willing to pay well for the right person)

? Long-term growth opportunity—as our property portfolio and compliance business expands, you'll grow with us

? Supportive, small team environment—you'll work directly with the business owner and Rebecca

? Comprehensive training—we'll teach you our systems, processes, and ServiceM8 from scratch

? Set hours, no weekends—predictable schedule aligned with Melbourne business hours

? Interesting, varied work—not just bookkeeping, but helping run the entire business operations

How to Apply

Please submit your application with:

Your updated resume highlighting your Xero bookkeeping experience

A brief cover letter (3-5 sentences) explaining:

Your Xero bookkeeping experience and how long you've used it

Why you're looking for a long-term position

One example of how you've learned a new software or system quickly in a previous role

Applications without a cover letter will not be considered.

We're looking to fill this position quickly, so apply soon if you're interested. We'll review applications on a rolling basis and conduct video interviews with shortlisted candidates.

Interview Process

Initial application review (cover letter + resume)

Short video interview to discuss your experience and assess communication skills

Practical skills test (Xero bookkeeping task—30 minutes)

Final interview with our Compliance Officer (Rebecca) to ensure team fit

We're excited to find someone who will be with us for years to come and become a trusted part of our team!

title: Estimator and Scheduling Coordinator

title: Online Academic Tutor (English, Math and/or Science)
description:
We are seeking a passionate and dedicated Online Academic Tutor to deliver high-quality virtual instruction to students from Kindergarten through to Year 12 across Australia. The ideal candidate will foster a love for learning, adapt to individual student needs, and deliver engaging lessons aligned with the Australian Curriculum.



This role offers flexibility, allowing tutors to specialize in one, two, or all three subject areas: English, Mathematics, and Science, depending on their expertise and experience.



Responsibilities:

1. Deliver engaging, age-appropriate online lessons in English, Mathematics, and/or Science to students from Kindergarten to Year 12.

2. Develop and implement tailored lesson plans based on the Australian Curriculum and individual student learning needs.

3. Reinforce key concepts based on subject expertise:

- English: literacy, grammar, reading comprehension, and writing skills

- Mathematics: numeracy, algebra, geometry, statistics, and problem-solving

- Science: biology, chemistry, physics, and general scientific inquiry

4. Use interactive teaching methods, digital tools, and learning resources to enhance student engagement.

5. Assess student performance and provide regular, constructive feedback.

6. Monitor and track student progress, attendance, and academic outcomes.

7. Maintain accurate records of lessons and student development.

8. Communicate regularly with parents or guardians regarding student progress.

9. Encourage critical thinking, creativity, and confidence in learning.

10. Participate in tea
etings, training sessions, and ongoing professional development.



Qualifications:

1. Bachelor’s degree in Education or a relevant field (English, Mathematics, Science, or related discipline); teaching qualification preferred.

2. Experience teaching or tutoring students at Kindergarten, Primary, or Secondary levels (online experience highly regarded).

3. Strong understanding of the Australian Curriculum in at least one subject area (English, Math, or Science); proficiency in multiple subjects is an advantage.

4. Excellent communication and interpersonal skills.

5. Proficiency in using online teaching platforms (e.g., Zoom, Google Classroom, Microsoft Teams, or similar tools).

6. Reliable internet connection and a quiet, professional home workspace.

7. Patient, adaptable, and student-focused with a passion for helping learners succeed.

title: US Construction Estimator - Commercial Painting (Division 9)
description:
We are a US-based commercial paint contractor looking for a dedicated Estimator/Quantity Surveyor to handle our bidding pipeline. We aim to submit at least 10 high-quality commercial bids per month. You will be responsible for the full takeoff process and preparing the final bid summary.



Key Responsibilities:



Perform detailed digital takeoffs using Bluebeam Revu (required).



Review architectural plans, finish schedules, and project specifications (Division 09).



Calculate square footage for walls, ceilings, and linear footage for trim/base.



Identify substrates (drywall, CMU, metal deck) and special coating requirements.



Populate our Excel bid templates with quantities, labor hours, and material costs.



Maintain a "Bid Tracker" to ensure we never miss a deadline.



Requirements:



Preferred Degree in Civil Engineering or Architecture.



Minimum 2 years experience estimating for US/North American commercial projects.



Expertise in Bluebeam Revu (Tool sets, overlays, and legends).



Strong understanding of "Inclusions/Exclusions" in commercial contracts.



Ability to work [Your Time Zone] hours for at least 3 hours of overlap.



How to Apply:



Please start your application with the phrase "READY TO BID."



Attach a Sample Takeoff (Color-coded Bluebeam markup) and the matching Excel summary.



Briefly describe your experience with Division 9 (Finishes) projects.

title: Digital Marketing Specialist (SEO, Paid Ads & Social Media Manager)

Your goal is simple:

Generate quality leads, increase brand awareness, and help us secure more homeowners, property managers, commercial clients, and contractor relationships.



Responsibilities:



• SEO strategy and implementation (on-page and off-page)  

• Google Business Profile optimization

title: High-Earning Telesales Closer | Up to $3,000/month | US E-commerce Brand
description:
TELESALES REPRESENTATIVE - US E-COMMERCE BRAND



Remote Philippines | Full-time | Night Shift (US Hours)





ABOUT THE ROLE



A fast-growing US e-commerce brand specializing in premium products for US business customers is hiring 2 to 3 Telesales Representatives in the Philippines to handle warm leads and close deals over the phone.



This is a pure sales role, not customer support, not inbound call center. We are looking for people with native-like English, persistent follow-up discipline, and the ability to close deals.





KEY RESPONSIBILITIES



- Receive a daily list of warm leads, customers who have shown buying intent on our website

- Call leads within 10 to 30 minutes of receipt, uncover needs and handle objections

- Close deals over the phone or clearly identify what follow-up is needed

- Send personalized SMS and
s through our internal CRM

- Pursue each lead 6 to 8 times across multiple channels until they buy or clearly opt out

- Maintain detailed records of every customer interaction in the CRM

- Hit monthly sales KPIs





REQUIRED



- 3 to 5 years of telesales experience, preferably with US customers

- Native-like or near-native English with strong American accent preferred. Our customers are US small business owners and they will hear the difference. Natural and clear is required.

- Proven closer mentality, you measure success by deals closed not calls made

- Persistent and disciplined, you follow up 6, 7, 8 times without giving up

- Comfortable with consultative selling, our customers spend 1,000 USD plus and need guidance not pressure

- Self-disciplined remote worker with reliable home office setup, fast internet minimum 25 Mbps, and quiet environment

- CRM-savvy, quick learner with internal sales tools, can update notes during and after calls

- Comfortable with workplace tools such as Slack, Google Workspace, Zoom, OpenPhone, or similar VoIP

- Full-time exclusive commitment. You cannot work for another company simultaneously while employed with us.





PREFERRED



- E-commerce or DTC sales background

- Experience selling visual or design products such as signage, print, branding

- Experience working with creative entrepreneurs or restaurant and retail SMB owners





NOT A FIT IF



- You prefer customer support or inbound-only roles

- You are uncomfortable with commission-heavy compensation

- You give up on leads after 1 or 2 unsuccessful calls

- You cannot sustain a night shift schedule from 9 PM to 6 AM Manila time

- You see "no" as failure instead of feedback

- You plan to work multiple jobs or freelance projects on the side





COMPENSATION STRUCTURE



Base Salary



- Fixed monthly base: 610 USD to 750 USD per month, depending on experience and audio screening result

- Base is paid regardless of monthly performance, on time every month



2-Month Probation



- Reduced base salary at 80 percent of full base

- Commission at 100 percent, same as full-time, earn full commission on every deal closed from day one

- Probation goal is to master the product, sales script, and follow-up process



After Probation, from Month 3



- Full base salary, 610 USD to 750 USD per month

- Plus uncapped commission on closed revenue





REALISTIC INCOME EXPECTATIONS



- Hard workers who put in full hours and call volume earn minimum 1,500 USD per month, base plus commission

- KPI achievers earn 2,000 USD plus per month

- Top performers exceeding KPI earn 3,000 USD plus per month, with no cap



Commission structure is simple: the more deals you close, the more you earn, with no ceiling.





EXCLUSIVITY POLICY



This is a full-time exclusive role. You are not allowed to work for another company, do freelance sales work, or take other employment simultaneously while employed with us.



If discovered working another job:



- Immediate termination of employment

- Forfeiture of any unpaid commission earned to date

- Forfeiture of any pending bonuses or revenue share



We invest heavily in our SDRs through training, leads, and tools. We expect 100 percent of your work hours dedicated to our team.





LONG-TERM OPPORTUNITIES FOR TOP PERFORMERS



- Performance-based revenue share program for outstanding contributors

- Career path: Telesales to Senior Closer to Team Lead to Sales Director





WORK SCHEDULE



- Monday to Friday: 9 PM to 6 AM Manila time, equivalent to 9 AM to 6 PM US Eastern Time, full 9-hour shift

- Saturday: 9 PM to 1 AM Manila time, equivalent to 9 AM to 1 PM US Eastern Time, 4-hour half shift

- Total around 49 hours per week across 6 days



DAYS OFF



- Sundays every week

- Major US holidays such as Memorial Day, July 4, Labor Day, Thanksgiving, Christmas, New Year

- Major Philippine holidays





WHAT WE PROVIDE



- Warm leads daily, no cold calling, no list scraping

- Comprehensive sales playbook with proven scripts, objection handling, FAQ

- One-week paid training before you take customer calls

- Internal CRM with full lead context, mockup design, quote, customer history

- OpenPhone account with US phone number

- Dedicated Team Lead for daily coaching and support

- Clear performance metrics





APPLICATION INSTRUCTIONS



To apply, please follow ALL these steps. Applications missing any step will be ignored.



1. SEND YOUR RESUME



Highlight relevant sales experience, specifically US customer experience, average deal size closed, and conversion rates if available.



2. RECORD AN AUDIO FILE, MINIMUM 2 MINUTES



Record yourself handling this scenario:



You are calling a customer named John who designed a 580 USD custom product on our website about 30 minutes ago, but has not placed the order yet. Record yourself making this discovery call. Your goal is to understand what is holding him back and offer a solution. You can pause briefly between turns to indicate John is responding.



We are listening for: accent, tone, pacing, discovery skills, objection handling, and natural conversation flow.



3. ANSWER THESE 4 SHORT QUESTIONS



- Describe the highest-value deal you have closed and how you closed it. How many follow-up attempts did it take?

- Why are you applying for this role specifically, not just any sales job?

- When can you start? Are you available for night shift, 9 PM to 6 AM Manila time, Mon-Sat?

- Are you currently working another job? Can you commit to full-time exclusivity with us?



4. CONFIRM YOU UNDERSTAND



- This is a commission-heavy sales role, not customer service

- Working hours are 9 PM to 6 AM Manila time, Mon-Fri full shift, Saturday half shift 9 PM to 1 AM

- This is a full-time exclusive role, no second jobs allowed

- You will be expected to follow up 6 to 8 times per lead, not give up after 1 or 2 calls

- The audio recording is the most important part of your application





HIRING PROCESS



We move fast for the right candidates:



- Step 1: Resume and audio screen, 2 to 3 days

- Step 2: 30-minute interview with our Team Lead via Zoom

- Step 3: Live mock call exercise with a hiring manager

- Step 4: Final interview and offer



Start date: ASAP



We are hiring 2 to 3 SDRs in this batch. Strong candidates will receive offers quickly.





WHY JOIN US



- Warm leads only, your time goes to closing not prospecting

- Real product, real demand, premium products with proven market fit

- Direct access to founders, no corporate bureaucracy

- Performance-based revenue share for top performers, your income scales with company growth

- Long-term career path: SDR to Senior SDR to Team Lead to Sales Director

- Build a remote sales career with a US e-commerce brand at scale





Apply now if you are a closer who is tired of low-ticket sales and ready to follow up until you earn what you are worth.

title: Card Pricing & Listings Coordinator (eCommerce)
description:
We are a fast-growing sports card breaking company operating on platforms like Fanatics Live and Whatnot. We run daily live shows and weekly auctions, and we are looking for a full-time tea
mber to help manage our pricing, listings, and auction setup.



This is a detail-oriented and data-focused role. You will be responsible for pricing cards, preparing auction listings, organizing data, and ensuring everything is accurate before going live.



We follow a structured weekly system:

- Auctions launch every Tuesday at 10 AM (5-day auctions)

- Fixed-price inventory is added to our website weekly



You will play a key role in making sure everything is prepared, accurate, and ready ahead of schedule.



WHAT YOU’LL DO

- Look up card prices using eBay sold listings (comps)

- Accurately price sports cards based on market data

- Create and format listings for auctions

- Ensure titles are clean, correct, and under 80 characters (eBay standard)

- Include submission IDs and correct naming in every listing

- Upload and organize listings using our internal tools (training provided)

- Prepare and schedule auctions for weekly Tuesday launches

- Help build and maintain a pipeline of ready-to-list inventory

- Assist with adding fixed-price inventory to our website

- Work with Google Drive, Google Sheets, and Excel for organization



WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR

-Strong attention to detail (VERY important)

- Experience with Google Sheets or Excel

- Organized and reliable

- Able to follow instructions and systems

- Fast learner and efficient worker

- Good written English

- Comfortable using computers and working with data

- Interest in sports or willingness to learn the card market



IMPORTANT

- You must be willing to learn how to price sports cards

- You must be comfortable with repetitive, detail-focused work

- Accuracy is more important than speed (especially at the beginning)



BONUS (NOT REQUIRED)

- Experience with eCommerce or marketplaces

- Familiarity with sports cards or collectibles

- Experience with product listings or data entry roles



SCHEDULE

- Full-time (40 hours per week)

- Consistent weekly workflow based on auction and listing schedule



COMPENSATION

- $500–$800/month depending on experience + performance bonuses



HOW TO APPLY

Include the following in your application:

- Your experience with Excel or Google Sheets

- Any experience with eCommerce or product listings

- Why you would be a good fit for a detail-oriented role

(Optional) Any knowledge or interest in sports or collectibles



IMPORTANT:

Include the word “Headline” in your application so we know you read everything.

title: Business Development Manager / Operations Architect (KPI & Team Building)
description:
Job Title: Business Development & Operations Architect (KPIs + Hiring + Systems)

The Mission:

We are a growing company with a clear vision, but we need a System Builder to create the internal engine. I am looking for a right-hand person who doesn’t just "manage" tasks but designs the organizational structure, sets the metrics for success, and hires the talent to execute it.



Your Core Responsibilities:



Organizational Design: Audit our current workflow and build a scalable team hierarchy.



KPI Management: Define, implement, and track Key Performance Indicators (KPIs) for every department to ensure accountability.



Talent Acquisition: Identify gaps in our team, write job descriptions, and lead the recruitment process to hire A-players.



SOP Creation: Build a library of Standard Operating Procedures so the business can run without constant supervision.



Who You Are:



You have a proven track record of building company structures or scaling departments.



You are data-driven—you believe that if it’s not measured, it’s not managed.



You are an expert recruiter who can spot talent and culture-fit from a mile away.



You have high-level English skills and a "builder" mentality (you find solutions, not excuses).



?? PRE-INTERVIEW TEST (Follow these steps or your application will be ignored):

To ensure you have the attention to detail required for this role, please follow these instructions exactly:



Subject Line: Change your application subject to: "SYSTEM ARCHITECT - [Your Years of Management Experience]" (e.g., SYSTEM ARCHITECT - 5 Years).



The Question: In your cover letter, answer this: "If a department is underperforming, what are the first 3 metrics (KPIs) you would check to find the root cause?"



The Video: Record a 60-90 second Loom video introducing yourself and describing one specific team or system you built from scratch. (Paste the link in your application).



Tools: List the top 3 software tools you use to manage team performance and tasks.



Why Join Us?



Full-time, long-term remote position.



High level of autonomy—you design the systems.



Competitive salary based on experience and results.

title: Public Relations Assistant
description:

Also, please state if you have public relations or publicity experience.

I’m looking for a highly organized, detail-oriented PR Assistant based in the Philippines to support editorial outreach and list building. You’ll help pitch media contacts, manage communications in ClickUp, and support other essential admin and research tasks.



This is NOT a creative writing role. All pitch copy will be provided. Your role is to help execute outreach efficiently, accurately, and with care.



RESPONSIBILITIES



Editorial Outreach & Research

 • Use Excel sheets to send individual PR
s from a provided company
 address — no blasts, no AI writing

 • Personalize each
 by inserting the correct first name and media outlet

 • Conduct online research to find contact information for journalists (Google, social platforms, or byline digging)

List Building & Data Entry

Task Management

 • Track deadlines and deliverables to ensure timely follow-through

 • Maintain clean task records and notes within ClickUp for team visibility



REQUIREMENTS

 • Based in the Philippines

 • Proficient in written and spoken English with excellent grammar

 • Strong working knowledge of Microsoft Excel, Outlook, and Office Suite

 • Familiar with (or willing to learn) ClickUp

 • Absolutely no use of AI or ChatGPT for writing pitches or communication

 • Self-motivated with the ability to prioritize, multi-task, and meet deadlines consistently

WORK STYLE

 • Willingness to receive feedback and grow in the role

CapCut (preferred)

Experience with TikTok/Reels editing

Understand hooks, pacing, retention

Reliable, communicative, meets deadlines



Not a Fit If:



You over-edit with too many effects

To Apply:



Send portfolio (TikTok edits only)

Your rate (per video or monthly)

Turnaround time

title: AI Video Editor
description:

You will be trained extensively on how to do it, previous experience using CapCut is required but the other tools you don't need any experience in. It'll be mostly just providing scripts to an AI tool and then playing with the prompts to get a good outcome of the video. It's quite easy once you get the hang of it, which we'll train you to do!



Starting pay is $3.3 US dollars per video - This is just to start, for people who make good, high quality videos we will increase the pay per video if we see that you're trying your best.

- Ability to learn and take constructive feedback

title: Detail-Oriented VA for Content & Community
description:
Virtual Assistant / Social Media & Operations Coordinator

Job Title Options



Virtual Assistant – Social Media & Content Operations

Content Operations & Community Coordinator

Executive Virtual Assistant – Social Media, Content & Community Management

Social Media Operations Assistant & Project Coordinator





About the Role

We're looking for a highly organized, detail-oriented Virtual Assistant to support our growing content, community, and events operations. You'll work closely with our team to keep daily operations running smoothly — from managing social media publishing and coordinating video editors to organizing client cohorts and supporting live events.

This is an ongoing role ideal for someone who thrives on structure, loves creating order out of chaos, and takes pride in making things run like clockwork behind the scenes.



Key Responsibilities

Daily Coordination & Project Management



Join daily 15–30 minute sync calls with our team lead (Lily) to review priorities and task lists

Receive and execute on assigned tasks from daily syncs

Maintain and organize our Notion workspace to keep projects, SOPs, and documentation up to date

Manage the group chat with our video editors, including file delivery, deadlines, and project tracking



Social Media & Content Operations



Schedule and publish content using our social media management software

Organize files in Canva using our existing templates to produce carousel posts

Post written content in relevant groups and online communities

Plan, calendar, and manage content production and publishing across platforms

Study competitor content and organize findings into structured research folders



Media & File Management



Maintain and organize our Google Drive media library so assets are easy to find and use



Events & Community Support



Provide live event assistance once per week (setup, moderation support, follow-up)

Plan the calendar and book sessions/Zooms for our Quarterly Flagship Product Cohort

Support client transitions into our online Community Circle

Coordinate all team events related to our social media presence, including filming schedules, reminders, and coordinating with Circle tea
mbers





What We're Looking For



Proven experience as a Virtual Assistant, Social Media Assistant, or Operations Coordinator

Strong working knowledge of Notion, Google Drive, Canva, and Zoom

Experience with social media scheduling tools (e.g., Later, Buffer, Metricool, or similar)

Familiarity with Circle (or similar community platforms) is a strong plus

Excellent written English and communication skills

Highly organized with exceptional attention to detail

Self-starter who can manage multiple projects and meet deadlines without close supervision

Comfortable on daily video calls and in group chat environments

Reliable availability during our working hours for the daily sync





Nice to Have



Experience supporting online course creators, coaches, or cohort-based programs

Basic video/content editing familiarity (for coordinating with editors)

Experience planning or supporting live virtual events





Details



Type: Ongoing / Long-term

Hours: [Specify hours per week, e.g., 20–30 hrs/week]

Schedule: Must be available for daily syncs at [specify time zone/time]

Rate: [Specify your budget or "open to discussion based on experience"]





How to Apply

In your proposal, please include:



A brief intro about yourself and why this role fits your experience

Examples of similar VA, social media, or operations roles you've supported

The tools you've used from our stack (Notion, Canva, Circle, Google Drive, scheduling software)

Your availability and time zone

Start your application with the word "Sync" so we know you read the full posting

title: Chat, Email & Technical Support Agent  (FULL-TIME | REMOTE | PERFORMANCE-BASED BONUSES)
description:
We are looking for a reliable, detail-oriented Chat,
 & Technical Support Agent to join our growing e-commerce team.



This is a full-time customer support role focused on helping customers through chat and
, troubleshooting product issues, identifying replacement parts, and providing clear, professional support.



The main focus will be customer service, technical troubleshooting, product support, and helping customers get the correct solution as quickly as possible.



ABOUT US



We operate multiple e-commerce brands in the United States, including:





Electric bikes, bicycles, 2-stroke engine kits, bike parts, and accessories.





Hydroponic equipment, grow lights, LED lighting, grow tents, nutrients, and indoor gardening products.



NU Aqua Systems

Reverse osmosis systems, countertop water filters, under-sink RO systems, whole-house water filters, replacement filters, fittings, and parts.



Our company has been growing for many years, and we are looking for someone who wants a stable long-term position with room to learn, grow, and become a strong part of our support team.





MAIN RESPONSIBILITIES



You will be responsible for helping customers through chat and
 with product questions, order issues, and technical support.



Your responsibilities will include:



Responding to customer
s and chats in a professional and helpful way.



Troubleshooting product issues for our brands, including bikes, e-bikes, 2-stroke engine kits, hydroponic equipment, LED grow lights, reverse osmosis systems, countertop water filters, under-sink RO systems, and whole-house water filters.



Helping customers identify the correct replacement part when something is damaged, missing, defective, or broken during shipping.



Reviewing customer photos, videos, and descriptions to determine what part or solution is needed.



Creating clear notes for replacement orders, warranty claims, and customer follow-ups.



Helping customers understand basic installation, setup, replacement, and troubleshooting steps.



Escalating complex issues to the correct team lead when needed.



Following company processes and keeping customer communication clear, organized, and accurate.







PRODUCTS YOU WILL SUPPORT



You do not need to be an expert in all of these products right away, but you must be willing to learn.



You will be trained to support products such as:



E-bikes, bicycles, bike parts, and 2-stroke engine kits.



Hydroponic systems, grow lights, LED fixtures, tents, and equipment.



Reverse osmosis water systems, countertop systems, under-sink RO systems, whole-house water filters, fittings, tubing, filter housings, replacement filters, and related parts.



A big part of this role is being able to look at a customer’s issue, read carefully, review photos or videos, and figure out what needs to be replaced or what troubleshooting steps should be taken.







WE ARE LOOKING FOR SOMEONE WHO IS



Reliable and consistent.



A strong written communicator.



Detail-oriented and able to follow instructions.



Comfortable learning technical products.



Good at problem solving.



Patient with customers.



Able to stay organized while handling multiple conversations.



Willing to ask questions and learn from feedback.



Comfortable reviewing photos, videos, order details, and product information.



Able to work independently after training.







REQUIREMENTS



Strong English writing skills.



Previous customer service experience.



Experience with
 and/or chat support.



Good attention to detail.



Reliable internet connection.



A PC with an I5 processor or better and 16GB of RAM. 



Quiet and professional work environment.



Ability to work full-time.



Experience with bikes, e-bikes, water filtration, reverse osmosis systems, hydroponics, or home improvement products is a big plus.







SCHEDULE 



Full-time position.



Monday to Friday. 8:30 am PST to 5:00 pm PST



U.S. business hours.







PAY & BENEFITS



Starting pay: ?40,000 per month, equivalent to approximately $3.75 USD per hour based on a full-time schedule.



We also offer:



Performance bonuses.



Paid time off.



Long-term growth opportunities.



Training and support.



Stable full-time work with an established e-commerce company.







READY TO JOIN OUR TEAM? HERE IS HOW TO APPLY



We're excited to learn more about you! To apply, please submit the following:



Your Updated Resume: Please ensure it reflects your most recent experience and skills.



A photo of your workstation, a screenshot of your PC system specifications, and your internet speed.



A Short Video Introduction (1-3 minutes): We'd love to see your personality and hear directly from you! In your video, please:



Highlight your relevant experience and how it aligns with the role.



Explain why you're enthusiastic about joining our team and what you can bring to the table.



Please send your resume and video (via Loom link or similar) to: 
 directly to this
 will ensure your application receives prompt attention!

I want my videos to be transformed into short-form videos and different series that tell a story and keep my audience coming back for more and have them sharing the videos with their friends and family and ultimately grows my audience.

mber profiles
