title: Senior SEO + AI Operations Lead — WordPress + Local SEO — Long-Term Full-Time
description:
We're a new US Rank & Rent operation building a portfolio of 100+ local-service WordPress websites. We're looking for a senior SEO + AI operator who can own day-to-day production, lead a small team, and grow with us for years.



This is not a junior role. This is not a content-writer role. We need someone who has built, ranked, and managed dozens of WordPress sites before, who thinks in systems, and who treats SEO like a craft.



ABOUT THE ROLE

You'll run our entire AI + SEO production line from end to end.



We are finding the best markets to allow our new sites to rank on page 1 and get leads easily and fast. We can be in any niche and any city we want, which ever is the easiest to rank fast. Our goal is scale. To have as many sites as possible. These are basic sites with basic SEO. You need to be an expert at setting up new sites and getting them to rank on page 1 fast in these low competition markets and then we duplicate this again and again. 



AI Tools below are subject to change and we appreciate what you prefer to use as the expert******



AI website generation (10Web AI Builder, ZipWP)

AI content stack (Koala Writer, Penfriend.ai, Frase, SEOWriting.ai)

AI receptionist setup (Goodcall + Twilio per site)

On-page SEO (Rank Math Pro with AI features, schema, internal linking via LinkWhisper)

Local SEO (BrightLocal citations, NAP consistency, local rank tracking)

Quality control (you own the 12-point QC checklist for every site we publish)

Reporting (daily Slack updates, weekly Notion reports, monthly KPI review)



You'll report to the owner via a 30-minute weekly Zoom plus async daily Slack and Loom updates.

WHAT A TYPICAL WEEK LOOKS LIKE



Monday: review the owner's approved keyword/city queue (8-10 new sites/week at peak velocity)

Tuesday-Thursday: AI builds, content generation, on-page SEO, citations

Friday: weekly report, junior VA review, planning the next week

Daily: monitor Goodcall calls across the portfolio, log leads, flag issues

Ongoing: link-building recommendations (you suggest, owner approves), kill-list hygiene, renter handoff support



YOU MUST HAVE



3+ years WordPress experience (GeneratePress, Elementor, or Gutenberg — at least one deeply)

2+ years on-page SEO (Rank Math or Yoast, schema, title/meta optimization, technical SEO basics)

1+ years using AI writing tools in production (Koala, Cuppa, Frase, SEOWriting, ChatGPT, or Claude)

Direct experience managing 30+ websites concurrently (in agency or in-house)

Comfort with citation tools (BrightLocal, Whitespark, or Loganix)

Fluent written English (we communicate primarily in Slack and Loom)

Ability to record clean, watchable Loom SOPs



NICE TO HAVE



Prior local SEO experience (Google Business Profile, NAP consistency, Maps Pack ranking)

Call tracking experience (CallRail, Goodcall, Twilio)

AI receptionist or chatbot setup experience (Goodcall, Synthflow, Stammer.ai)

Team-management experience (1-3 direct reports for 6+ months)

WP-CLI familiarity

Rank-tracking dashboards (SerpRobot, AccuRanker, Ahrefs Rank Tracker)



COMPENSATION & PERKS



$1,400-$1,800 USD per month based on experience (full-time, 40 hours/week)

13th-month bonus

All Philippines public holidays paid

5 days paid leave after 6 months tenure

Performance bonuses tied to portfolio KPIs (sites ranked, leads captured, renters signed)

Annual review with raise potential

Long-term role — we want someone who grows with us for 3+ years



TRIAL



1-week paid trial at full pay

Trial task: build one complete WordPress site end-to-end using our SOPs (provided on Day 1)

Pass criteria are clear and shared before the trial starts

Pass = full-time offer



WHO YOU'LL WORK WITH

You'll report directly to the founder. You'll have weekly 1:1 calls, daily async communication via Slack and Loom, and full ownership of your domain. We use Notion for SOPs, 1Password for credentials, and Google Workspace for
 and shared sheets.

WHO THIS ROLE IS NOT FOR



Anyone juggling 3+ other full-time clients (we need real focus)

Anyone uncomfortable with video communication (Loom is essential here)

Anyone who wants strict scripted tasks with no judgment calls

Anyone who hasn't actually managed multiple WordPress sites before



HOW TO APPLY

Reply to this post with all five of the following items. Applications missing any of these will not be reviewed.



A short paragraph (3-5 sentences) about your most recent SEO or WordPress role — what you owned, what you delivered, and what you would do differently if you started over

Your DISC scores in the format D/I/S/C (we use this to assess working-style fit, not to filter)

A 2-minute Loom video walking through ONE WordPress site you built or managed — point out the SEO work you did, the tools you used, and the results you achieved

Your monthly salary expectation in USD

The exact line "I read the entire job post" — so we know you actually read this



Looking forward to meeting our next teammate.

title: Admin Assistant (Accounting Background)
description:

Working time: To start: Prefer 10:00 AM – 2:00 PM EST (or 8:00 AM – 12:00 PM EST). If full-time (40 hrs/week), preferred schedule aligns with U.S. business hours (~8:00 AM – 5:00 PM EST, with slight flexibility)

Start Date: Beginning of June

title: TikTok Video Editor — @theoppenheimboys · ASCEND
description:
TikTok Video Editor 
 / Ascend Athlete



WHO WE ARE

We are Kai and Miko — two brothers who both play Division 1 college soccer. We built Ascend (
) a 6-pillar performance system for youth soccer athletes. 10 athletes committed D1 this year using our program. Our TikTok has produced multiple videos over 100K and 200K views organically with zero paid promotion.

We are not building from scratch. We are scaling something that is already working and we need an editor who can take it to millions.



WHY THIS ROLE IS DIFFERENT

Most editing jobs hand you footage and a vague direction. This one gives you a professionally written Content Bible — a detailed brief for every video specifying the hook, the exact text overlays with timestamps and font sizes, the footage brief, the color grade, the algorithm goal, and the caption. Every strategic decision is already made.

Your job is to bring that brief to life at the highest possible level. We want precision AND creative excellence. The brief tells you what the video needs to do. How you make it cinematic, emotional, and impossible to scroll past is entirely yours.

The editors who thrive here follow a detailed system and still find ways to make the result better than the brief alone would produce.



WHAT MAKES THESE VIDEOS HARD TO EDIT WELL

Every video is built around a three-layer hook system. Layer one is the first visual frame — it must create a question before any text appears. Layer two is the text hook — 4 to 8 words that open a loop the viewer must resolve by staying. Layer three is the audio — natural sounds from the footage that engage before conscious attention does. All three must work together in the first 1.5 seconds or the video fails regardless of what comes after.

TikTok's algorithm now requires approximately 70% completion rate for a video to receive second-batch distribution. Every edit decision — the opening frame, the cut timing, the text rhythm, the slow-motion placement — must serve that completion rate. This is not casual editing. This is precision craft.



THE 6 VIDEO TYPES YOU WILL EDIT

Skill breakdowns — no text for the first 4 seconds, footage is the entire hook. 3-step breakdown with gold-labeled steps. Slow-motion replay of the exact same hero clip at 0.3x speed at the end. The slow-mo replay drives rewatches — viewers see everything they missed the first time. Built entirely for saves.

D1 Decoded education videos — text-overlay driven content teaching recruiting, training science, and tactical concepts. 45-55 seconds. "Reality 1:", "Reality 2:", "Reality 3:" labels in GOLD #C9A84C. Fast pacing but every point must land. Comment-driver question at the end is the most important text in the video algorithmically.

Origin and story videos — three-act emotional arc: crisis, comeback, resolution. Warm color grade. Pure visual windows of 10-14 seconds with zero text. Ken Burns slow zoom on still photos. The most creatively open format — the brief gives the structure, how you create the emotion is yours.

ASMR videos — zero music tracks, zero. Natural sounds raised to
% volume with frame-accurate audio-visual sync. 18-26 seconds maximum. The first sound in the first 2 seconds is the entire hook. These are the most technically demanding videos in the calendar.

Proof and sell videos — athlete testimonial quotes at 72pt, the largest text in the video. Real D1 commit names stacked vertically. Direct call-to-action sequence. These drive direct revenue for Ascend. Premium and confident — no compromise on quality.

Two Brothers lifestyle — both brothers visible in frame for the majority of the video. Warmer color grade than all other formats. Genuine not produced. The authenticity between two brothers is the content — if it feels staged it does not work.



THE TECHNICAL REQUIREMENTS

CapCut is the primary tool. The entire Content Bible is written for CapCut specifically. You must execute all of the following at expert level without instruction:

Apply the saved color grade preset — Oslo filter 35%, Brightness ?5, Contrast +12, Saturation +5, Warmth +5, Sharpness +10 — consistently to every clip before any editing begins. Sync audio to visuals using the CapCut waveform panel with frame-accurate precision. Add text overlays at exact timestamps: Montserrat Bold, 72pt primary, 60pt secondary, 52pt CTAs, white #FFFFFF with 2px black stroke, positioned in the upper 15-20% of the screen only. Use GOLD #C9A84C on all labels, step numbers, URLs, and "Save this" text. Apply slow-motion using Speed ? Curve ? Hero preset at 0.3x on the peak 
nt of each video. Score every clip A, B, or C before building the timeline and reject C-grade clips. Use hard cuts between every clip — transitions must earn their place or they do not exist. Export at 1080×1920, 30fps, H.264, High quality with correct file naming.

Every finished video must be export-ready for TikTok, Instagram Reels, and
 Reels simultaneously — clean file, no watermarks, correct format.

You must recommend the best possible sound from the TikTok audio library for each video — matching tone, energy, and exact length. We make the final music decision but we expect a specific, reasoned recommendation with every delivery.

You must have proven experience creating and integrating AI-generated images and video into short-form content. This is a hard requirement. Applications without evidence of this will not move forward.



THE WORKFLOW

We send you the briefs and upload raw footage to Google Drive. You edit all 7 videos to the highest possible standard following each brief. When all 7 are complete you upload them and message us. We review and send specific feedback on anything that needs to be redone. You revise and confirm. We add music and post. Done for the week.



PAY

Each video takes approximately one hour to edit. At 7 videos per week that is roughly 7 hours of work.

Second round trial: $4 flat per completed brief. Paid to every applicant who finishes it regardless of outcome. Paid the same day we make our decision.

Ongoing if hired: $6 per video to start, increasing to $7.50 per video based on quality and consistency. 7 videos per week. Paid every Friday via Wise or PayPal. Long-term role — the right editor earns more over time.



HOW TO APPLY

We read every application. Send the following — missing items mean your application is not reviewed.

Your portfolio. Links to 3-5 short-form videos you personally edited for TikTok, Instagram Reels, or YouTube Shorts. We are looking for pacing instinct, text placement precision, color work, audio sync quality, and the ability to hold attention past the 10-second mark. If any video exceeded 50K or 100K views tell us. If you have edited sports, athlete, or soccer content specifically, lead with that.

Your AI work. Concrete examples of AI-generated images or video you have created and integrated into short-form content. Links, screenshots, or portfolio pieces. No examples means no second round.

Your best edit explained. One video you edited that genuinely performed well or that you are proud of. Tell us the specific creative decisions you made — the opening frame, a cut, a sound choice, a text timing call — that elevated it beyond the brief you were given.

Your technical setup. Your CapCut skill level — beginner, intermediate, or advanced. Any other software you use. Be honest. The trial will show us immediately.

Your turnaround time. How long does a finished 60-second edit take you from the 
nt you receive raw footage.

Your payment details. Your PayPal or Wise
 so we can pay you for the trial immediately upon completion.

The phrase "Oppenheim Knox Bros" written somewhere in your application. Applications without this exact phrase are not reviewed. This confirms you read the full post.



SECOND ROUND

From all applications received we will select a shortlist of the strongest candidates. If you are chosen for the second round you will receive one video brief, raw footage, and exact step-by-step instructions. Complete the edit and upload it within 48 hours. We score every submission against the same criteria, pay every participant $4 flat upon completion, and respond to every applicant within 72 hours with our decision.

We run this with multiple editors simultaneously. The best edit gets the ongoing role.



WHO GETS HIRED

You have made videos that actually reached people. You understand why the first frame matters as much as the hook text. You know what a 70% completion rate requires at the editing level. You follow a brief precisely and make the result better than the brief alone. You are reliable — deadlines are not suggestions. You want to be part of something growing, not a one-off gig.



WHO THIS IS NOT FOR

If you have never produced a video that performed well this is not the right role. If you have no experience with AI image or video generation this is not the right role. If CapCut is not a tool you use at a high level this is not the right role yet.



We have proof this content reaches hundreds of thousands of people. We need the editor who makes it reach 
 ·

title: YouTube Thumbnail Designer – Investment & Data Analysis
description:
I am looking for an elite Graphic Designer to handle the

"packaging" for a new, high-end YouTube channel focused on global investment

analysis and economics.



Our target audience consists of high-net-worth, mature professionals. We are NOT

looking for "typical" YouTube thumbnails with shocked faces, red circles, or

loud/messy layouts. We are looking for an authoritative, minimalist, and

cinematic aesthetic. Think The Wall Street Journal meets Bloomberg.



Your Responsibilities:



  - Subject Isolation: Masking out complex subjects (assets, architecture, data

    points) to make them pop against a background.

  - High-Contrast Typography: Using clean, bold, and professional fonts that are

    perfectly legible on mobile devices.

  - Visual Psychology: Using specific color theory (Navy, Gold, High-Contrast

    Grays) to signal trust and authority.

  - Branding: Maintaining a 100% consistent layout across all uploads.



What We Offer:



  - Rate: $10 USD per thumbnail.

  - Workflow: I provide the high-res "hero" image and the specific data hook.

    You provide the creative execution.

  - Consistency: This is a long-term role with 1-2 thumbnails required every

    week.



How to Apply:



1.  Send a link to your portfolio. IMPORTANT: Only include examples of

    thumbnails or posters that look professional, clean, and data-focused. (Do

    not send gaming, anime, or "vlog" style thumbnails).

2.  Tell me your favorite font for high-readability on small screens.

3.  Start your application with the word "LEDGER" so I know you read this.



Note: Shortlisted candidates with a proven track record will be invited to a

paid trial task.

title: Marketing & Email Operations VA — Luxury Brand (Klaviyo + Canva + Outreach)
description:
I run a luxury residential interior design firm based in Los Angeles, with editorial coverage in Architectural Digest, Elle Decor, and the Wall Street Journal. I'm hiring a sharp, self-directed VA to run my outreach, lifecycle
, and social media operations end-to-end so I can stay focused on clients and creative direction.



This is a hands-on doer role, not a creative one. You'll build the sheets, run the merges, format the slides, write first-draft copy, and ship the campaigns. I review and refine copy before anything important goes out — you don't have to be a luxury copywriter on day one. You do have to be sharp, organized, and a strong writer in English.



If you need a lot of direction, this is not the right role. If you are systematic, proactive, and fluent in AI tools, keep reading.



What you'll own:



- Cold outreach to real estate industry — research contacts, build the tracking sheet, send the merge, run the follow-up sequence, report what's converting

- Klaviyo for the editorial site — welcome series, weekly newsletter, segmentation, abandonment flows, A/B tests, performance reporting

- Social media graphics and scheduling — format captions, carousels, and slide content in Canva using provided brand templates, schedule across Instagram, TikTok, and Pinterest

- Contact research using LinkedIn and tools like Apollo or RocketReach

- First-draft
 and caption copy — I review and refine before send

- SOPs — if you do it twice, you document it



What I'm looking for:



- 2+ years of hands-on
 marketing or outreach experience

- Klaviyo experience or strong familiarity — flows, segmentation, campaigns, basic reporting

- Comfortable running mail merges. YAMM preferred, but if you've run Lemlist, Instantly, Smartlead, or similar, I'll bring you up to speed in week one

- Comfortable in Canva — formatting templates, building carousels, and producing slide content from supplied brand assets

- Strong contact research skills (LinkedIn, Apollo, RocketReach, or similar)

- You use Claude (preferably) or ChatGPT daily — not as a novelty, as a habit

- Excellent written English

- You communicate proactively. If something is delayed or unclear, you say so before I notice

- Self-managed — I set targets, you manage your time and report what got done

- Overlap with Pacific Time (Los Angeles)



How to apply:



Apply through this post. In your application, answer these four questions in this order:



1. What AI tools do you use daily and for what tasks?

2. Describe one specific
 marketing campaign you ran — what it was, what it produced, and which platform you used.

3. Rate your written English and conversational English on a 1–10 scale, (1 being beginner and 10 being proficient/excellent)

4. Write a 75-word cold outreach opener to a luxury LA real estate broker who just sold a $12M property in Bel Air. Write it as if it's the first
 the broker will ever receive fro
.



Question 4 is the writing test. Applications that don't answer all four questions will not be reviewed.



See my work at 
.

title: Administrative Assistant with Executive Calendar Management Experience
description:
We are an early-stage venture capital firm seeking a highly organized and execution-driven Administrative Assistant to support our core operations. This role is designed for a tactical professional who possesses exceptional scheduling instincts and intermediate graphic design skills to elevate our firm’s internal and external materials.



The ideal candidate thrives in a fast-paced environment and will work closely with senior leadership to ensure seamless operational flow, from complex calendar management to the creation of polished digital assets.



Key Responsibilities:

- Executive Calendar Management: Coordinate multiple executive calendars with high precision, managing end-to-end meeting logistics and preparation.

- Design & Brand Assets: Utilize Canva to create professional logos, presentations, and marketing materials, ensuring all outputs meet institutional design standards.

- Digital Presence: Monitor news and updates from portfolio companies and community members via LinkedIn and Sales Navigator to curate and draft engaging social media posts.

- Operational Support: Manage accurate data entry, document preparation, and
 workflows to maintain up-to-date firm records.

- Project Coordination: Prioritize daily tasks and administrative duties to ensure all operational deadlines are consistently met.



Qualifications:

- Experience: Proven background in administrative, operations, or executive support roles.

- Calendar Mastery: Required extensive experience in complex executive calendar management and scheduling.

- Technical Proficiency: Strong command of scheduling tools and project management platforms (e.g., Notion, Airtable).

- Design Skills: Proficiency in Canva with a demonstrated ability to create professional logos and designs.

- Attention to Detail: A high level of precision regarding formatting, design, and written communication.

- Platform Knowledge: Familiarity with LinkedIn Sales Navigator and social media engagement strategies is preferred.

- Communication:: Excellent verbal and written communication skills with the ability to maintain a professional brand voice.



Schedule & Location

- Working Hours: This role follows US Pacific Time (9:00 AM – 6:00 PM PST).

- Note: For candidates in the Philippines, this corresponds to 12:00 AM –9:00AM PHT.

title: Sales Representative
description:
READ THE JOB DESCRIPTION CAREFULLY:

Please ensure that you thoroughly review the job description to understand the responsibilities and qualifications required for this role before applying.



To apply, please SUBMIT your resume and a cover letter highlighting your relevant experience and qualifications.



Employment Type: Full-Time, Monday to Friday, 9:00 AM to 5:00 PM PST



Payroll: Php25,000 base + 5%–8% commission on closed deals



Role Overview:

We are seeking a motivated and results-driven Sales Representative who doesn’t just book appointments but actively drives sales and closes deals. The ideal candidate is an excellent communicator, confident in presenting to clients, and capable of generating revenue by addressing client needs, closing deals, and identifying upsell opportunities.



Responsibilities:

- Conduct outreach to potential clients through cold calls,
s, and other communication methods.

- Deliver engaging and persuasive presentations to clients to close deals effectively.

- Identify and create upsell opportunities during client meetings and presentations.

- Collaborate with the sales team to ensure seamless handoff of prospects, follow-ups, and conversion strategies.

- Maintain a deep understanding of our offerings and tailor presentations to meet specific client needs.

- Showcase confidence and professionalism while presenting, whether over the phone, via video call, or in written correspondence.

- Work independently, learn quickly, and adapt to evolving tasks and priorities.

- Focus on generating revenue, not just scheduling meetings, by proactively closing deals and ensuring client satisfaction.



Requirements:

- Familiarity with GoHighLevel, its features, and how it can be used in sales and marketing processes.

- Strong interpersonal and communication skills, both written and verbal, in English.

- Proven experience in delivering presentations, closing deals, and upselling in a sales environment.

- Comfort and confidence in presenting to clients and prospects to drive sales.

- Proficiency in conducting online research and gathering relevant information to tailor presentations effectively.

- Familiarity with AI and ChatGPT technologies for enhanced communication (preferred).

- Self-driven and able to work autonomously with minimal guidance.

- Organized and detail-oriented, ensuring accurate and organized record-keeping.

- Ability to compile and synthesize information from various sources to create comprehensive prospect profiles.

- Quick learner with the ability to grasp industry-specific knowledge.

- Prior experience with lead generation, sales support, closing deals, or upselling is a strong plus.



Application Process:

To apply for this position, please submit your resume and a brief cover letter outlining your relevant experience and how you will contribute to the success of our client’s sales efforts through effective presentations, deal closures, and upselling.

title: Engineer/Overseas Assistant
description: We’re hiring a remote project coordinator with an engineering background (mechanical/electrical/industrial preferred), ideally with some RV or modular manufacturing knowledge, to support our Vessel project by coordinating day-to-day with our China-based factory. Strong written communication, organization, and the ability to work across time zones are required; prior experience working with overseas manufacturers is a plus.

title: Full-Time WordPress / Divi Developer + Automation Specialist (GoHighLevel + n8n)

This role is not just about building websites. We are looking for someone who understands lead pipelines, marketing systems, workflow automation, and integrations.



You will help build complete marketing and lead management systems connecting websites, automations, CRMs, and workflows.



This is a long-term full-time position with consistent work and growth opportunities.



Required Skills (Must Have)

• WordPress development

• Divi Theme Builder

• GoHighLevel (CRM, funnels, automations, pipelines)

• Website troubleshooting and optimization

• Mobile responsive design



If you do not have GoHighLevel experience, this position will not be a good fit.



Automation Experience (Strongly Preferred)



We are especially interested in developers who have experience building automation workflows and system integrations.



Preferred platforms include:



• n8n (preferred)

• Zapier

• Make (Integromat)



If you have experience building automation pipelines, connecting APIs, or automating business processes, please highlight that in your application.



Additional Valuable Skills



Experience with any of the following is a big plus:



• Lead generation systems

• Marketing funnels

• CRM integrations

• API integrations

• Web scraping tools

• Marketing automation systems

• Data automation workflows



Responsibilities



• Build and maintain WordPress websites using Divi

• Manage and improve GoHighLevel funnels, pipelines, and automations

• Build automation workflows using n8n or other tools

• Connect websites with CRMs and lead systems

• Improve marketing workflows and automation systems

• Help build scalable internal systems



Ideal Candidate



We are looking for someone who:



• Has strong Divi and WordPress experience

• Has real experience with GoHighLevel

• Understands automation and workflow systems

• Is a strong problem solver

• Communicates clearly in English

• Wants a long-term remote role



To Apply



Please include the following:



Desired Wage/Salary

Links to websites you have built using Divi

Your experience with GoHighLevel

Your experience with n8n, Zapier, or Make

Examples of automation systems you have built

Important



To confirm that you read this entire job post, please include the word:



PIPELINE



in the subject line of your application.

title: Scheduler (Remote) | High-Performance Operations Role
description:
Scheduler (Remote) | High-Performance Operations Role



We’re looking for a high-performance Scheduler to take control of the daily operations for Plumbing Bros Corporate (Perth).

This is not a basic admin role. You’ll be responsible for coordinating a high volume of jobs, managing technician schedules, and ensuring smooth, efficient service delivery across the business. If you thrive in fast-paced environments and take pride in running a tight operation, this role is for you.



About the Role



You are the command centre of the business.

Your ability to plan, prioritise, and execute will directly impact job completion, team performance, and customer satisfaction.

You’ll be working closely with our operations team, technicians, and clients to ensure every day runs efficiently and no job slips through the cracks.



Key Responsibilities



* Schedule and dispatch technicians across daily job runs

* Manage job flow to maximise productivity and minimise downtime

* Monitor job progress and adjust schedules in real time

* Communicate clearly with technicians, clients, and the internal team

* Ensure all jobs are accurately updated and completed in the system

* Identify issues or inefficiencies and take ownership to resolve them

* Maintain a high level of organisation, urgency, and follow-through



Working Hours

* Monday to Friday, 8:00 am – 5:00 pm (Perth time)

* 1-hour lunch break

* Optional paid overtime available based on workload



What We’re Looking For



You’ll thrive in this role if you:



* Have proven experience in scheduling or dispatch (essential)

* Can manage a high volume of jobs without losing control or accuracy

* Think ahead and stay 2–3 steps in front

* Perform well under pressure and maintain high standards

* Take full ownership of outcomes, not just tasks

* Communicate clearly, confidently, and professionally

* Are highly organised with strong attention to detail

* Experience Requirements

* Scheduling or dispatch experience is essential

* Experience in a trades or service-based business is highly preferred

* Experience with Ascora is highly advantageous

* Ability to quickly learn and operate systems with accuracy



Why Join Us



* Be part of a growing national brand with strong systems and structure

* Work in a high-performance team environment

* Play a critical role in daily operations and business performance

* Clear expectations, accountability, and ownership in your role



Final Note



This is a high-responsibility role managing real-time operations.

It requires focus, urgency, and strong decision-making under pressure.

If you take pride in running a tight schedule and keeping everything on track, we want to hear from you.

title: Shopify Store Expert
description:
We’re looking for a Shopify Store Expert to manage, optimise, and scale our e-commerce operations. The ideal candidate has strong experience in Shopify theme customisation, app integrations, product listings, and conversion optimisation. Must have a keen eye for design, user experience, and SEO, with proven results in boosting sales.

About Us

Ace Chef Apparel is a fast-growing supplier of chef uniforms, FOH uniforms, scrubs, and branded apparel. We are expanding into multiple e-commerce projects and need a Shopify professional who can take full ownership of our online stores.



Role Overview

As our Shopify Store Expert, you’ll be responsible for customising themes, managing product listings, integrating apps, and ensuring smooth store operations across multiple brands. This is a results-driven role where you’ll directly influence sales performance, customer experience, and brand growth.



Key Responsibilities



Build, customise, and maintain Shopify stores (front-end and back-end).

Optimise store speed, navigation, and mobile responsiveness.

Manage product uploads, categories, and collections with accuracy.

Integrate third-party apps for payments, subscriptions, loyalty, reviews, and analytics.

Implement SEO best practices and improve conversion rates.

Configure Google Tag Manager, GA4, Meta Pixel, and TikTok Pixel.

Launch landing pages and funnels to support marketing campaigns.

Troubleshoot checkout, theme, and integration issues quickly.

Work with the marketing team to align promotions, ads, and store content.

Suggest and implement automation tools to improve efficiency.



Mandatory Screening Criteria (Must-Have Before Applying)



Applicants will not be considered unless they can clearly demonstrate:



Live Shopify Portfolio – Must provide links to at least 2–3 live Shopify stores you personally built or managed.

Liquid Coding & Theme Customisation – Hands-on ability to edit themes and customise code (not just drag-and-drop).

App Integrations – Experience integrating advanced apps (subscriptions, loyalty programs, upsells, or custom apps).

Analytics & Pixel Setup – Proven knowledge of GA4, Meta Pixel, and TikTok Pixel implementation.

Proven Sales Impact – Must show specific results (conversion improvement, sales growth, or traffic increase) achieved on previous Shopify projects.



Preferred Skills

Experience with Shopify Plus.

Familiarity with Amazon Marketplace and Shopify integrations.

Graphic design (Canva, Figma, Adobe) and UX/UI design.

Knowledge of automation tools (Make, Zapier, n8n).







Please do not apply if the following applies to you 



No portfolio of Shopify stores or only screenshots.

Applicants who only did basic product uploads but claim Shopify Expert.

Overly reliant on agencies or team work without individual proof.

title: Graphic Designer + Short-Form Video Creator
description:
We're a small digital product studio that builds beautifully designed templates for real life. Our products live on Etsy/Website and cover everything from wedding planners to ADHD money managers to a sober curious dashboard. We're growing fast and need a creative partner who gets the aesthetic and can move quickly.



### What you'll do



You'll be the visual voice of our brand across two formats:



**Etsy listing graphics** (the bigger time investment)

- Design 5-10 listing photos per product (we have 30 products in the catalog)

- Build mockups showing our digital templates on phones, laptops, and tablets

- Create lifestyle-styled scenes (template plus coffee, template plus journal, template in hand)

- Design social proof graphics, FAQ images, and "what's included" overlays

- Maintain brand consistency across all 30 product listings



**Short-form video for paid social ads**

- Edit 3-5 short videos per week (15-30 seconds, vertical 9:16)

- Add captions, text overlays, hooks, and CTAs

- Produce 2-3 creative variations per concept for A/B testing

- Source trending audio and visual references when relevant



### Who we're looking for



- 1+ years designing for e-commerce, ideally Etsy or similar wellness and lifestyle brands

- Strong portfolio of listing graphics and short-form video (please send links, not PDFs)

- Fluent in industry-standard graphic design software

- Fluent in industry-standard short-form video editing software

- Sharp eye for typography, hierarchy, and modern editorial design

- Understands what makes someone stop scrolling on short-form video platforms

- Comfortable working independently and shipping quickly without heavy hand-holding

- Bonus: experience with template-based mockup tools





### Aesthetic direction



Our brand sits at the intersection of editorial magazine design and modern wellness. Confident typography. Lots of white space. Bold accent colors. We avoid: cluttered visuals, default-looking templates, anything that feels generic or AI-generated.



For video, we want creator-style content that feels like an organic post, not a polished commercial. Native to short-form social platforms.



### Logistics



- **Engagement type:** Contract or freelance, with potential for ongoing retainer

- **Hours:** 10-20 hours per week to start, scaling with results

- **Location:** Fully remote, any timezone (we'll align on a few overlapping hours per week)

- **Rate:** Hourly or per-deliverable, depending on your preference. Share your rates in your application.



### How to apply



Send us:



1. Your portfolio (links only, no PDFs)

2. Two examples that match our aesthetic direction described above

3. One Etsy listing you've designed (or one you think is excellent and why)

4. One short-form video you've edited

5. Your hourly rate and approximate availability

6. The phrase "I DESIGN WELL" in your reply, so we know you read the job description



Quick turnaround. Real budget. Long-term work for the right person.

title: Remote Takeoff Estimator/Quality Control Rep-Work From Home (STRUCTURAL)

title: Executive Assistant with Sales Experience
description:
Job Overview



We are seeking a highly organized and proactive Virtual Executive Assistant to support a busy CEO. This role is focused on protecting the executive’s time, maintaining strong organization across tasks and priorities, and providing operational support that allows leadership to focus on strategic work.



The ideal candidate is someone who is dependable, detail-oriented, and capable of anticipating needs while managing multiple responsibilities in a fast-paced environment.



Key Responsibilities



Provide executive assistant support to help manage schedules, priorities, and day-to-day administrative tasks



Maintain organization across calendars, communications, and task management systems



Help protect the executive’s time by coordinating meetings and managing scheduling logistics



Assist with outbound sales support, including outreach and follow-ups when needed



Provide light marketing support to help generate opportunities and maintain visibility



Support general administrative and operational tasks as needed



Qualifications



Proven experience as an Executive Assistant, Administrative Assistant, or similar role



Strong organizational and time-management skills



Excellent written and verbal English communication



Ability to work independently and manage priorities with minimal supervision



Professional, reliable, and highly detail-oriented



Comfortable supporting executives in a fast-paced environment



Ideal Candidate



Highly organized and proactive



Able to anticipate needs and solve problems independently



Comfortable supporting both administrative and growth-related activities (sales support, light marketing)



Flexible with hours and able to adapt to changing priorities



This role is ideal for someone who enjoys supporting leadership, creating structure, and helping a growing business operate more efficiently.

title: Job Post: E-Commerce Listing & Crossposting VA
description:
Photoroom + SellRaze + Vendoo Workflow



I am hiring a detail-oriented, fast, and accurate E-Commerce Listing VA for a very specific workflow. This is not a general admin role and it is not a social media role.



The job is centered around taking item photos, preparing them for listing, running them through AI-supported listing tools, and then finishing the crossposting workflow correctly.



My exact workflow



You will be expected to work in this process:



I send you 3 to 4 photos of an item

You clean up the photos in Photoroom or a similar tool

If needed, you improve the presentation using AI tools, including:

background cleanup

model try-on or presentation enhancement

improving missing support shots when appropriate

You upload the photos into SellRaze

SellRaze generates the listing from the photos

You review the output and correct anything that needs to be fixed, including:

title

category

item specifics

condition

pricing

overall accuracy

SellRaze publishes to the marketplaces it supports

You then go into Vendoo, import from eBay, refine details if needed, confirm the listing was already posted to shared marketplaces, and then crosspost to the marketplaces SellRaze does not cover, such as:

Vinted

Vestiaire

Whatnot

and other additional channels

What I need



I need someone who can work fast, but I care about accuracy more than speed alone. If you create sloppy listings, miss important details, or create inventory confusion, this is not the role for you.



You must be comfortable with:



Photoroom or a very similar photo-editing workflow

Vendoo or a very similar crossposting tool

AI-supported listing workflow

eBay-based listing logic

reviewing and correcting AI-generated output

preventing overselling and inventory errors

working from photos, not just copy-and-paste product catalogs

Strong preference



You will stand out if you already have experience with:



SellRaze

Vendoo

Photoroom

fashion listings

used goods

mixed inventory

multi-platform crossposting

To apply



Please do not send a generic VA pitch.



Reply with the following:



What marketplaces have you personally listed on?

What tools have you used directly? Please list them clearly.

Have you used Photoroom, SellRaze, Vendoo, List Perfectly, or similar tools?

In this type of workflow, how many listings can you complete in one hour when photos are already provided?

Is that speed based on:

full listing creation from scratch, or

AI-assisted / crossposting workflow?

Explain how you prevent overselling and inventory syncing errors

Send 1 real example of a workflow you handled that is similar to this one

Your example must include:

what tools you used

what marketplaces were involved

whether the listing started from photos

whether you imported from one marketplace into another tool

how many listings per hour you completed in that workflow

Are you available for a paid trial task?

Important



For the initial screening stage, I do not provide access to my live stores or account pages. Finalists may be asked to complete a paid test task based on a simulated version of this workflow.



This role is for someone who can take a system and actually run with it, not someone who needs constant hand-holding.



If you read everything carefully, start your application with:

Photo to Listing

title: (Urgent Hiring) Virtual Photo & Video Editor - WFH (Contractual - Renewable)
description:
ABOUT THE COMPANY

Negentropy Limited is a Hong Kong–based social marketing agency specializing in the e-commerce space. The name Negentropy represents order, clarity, and positive energy, reflecting how we work and how we support leadership through clarity, structure, and efficient execution. We are building structured systems that support growth and direction, and we invite you to be part of our pioneering team.



We are looking for a reliable and creative Photo & Video Editor to join our growing team. This role is ideal for someone who thrives in a fast-paced environment, pays close attention to detail, and can bring engaging social media campaigns to life through strong visuals and motion content.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES: 

- Optimize video content for various social media platforms.

- Edit videos, produce graphics, and collaborate with the social media team to create high-quality, engaging content.

- Research, conceptualize, pitch, and create original social video content that aligns with brand goals.

- Produce and edit innovative video campaigns aimed at increasing engagement across platforms.

- Handle critical deadlines and quick turnarounds in a fast-paced environment.



QUALIFICATIONS:

- Bachelor’s degree (Open to fresh graduates).

- 1–2 years of experience as a Social Media Editor, or a portfolio demonstrating equivalent skills.

- Portfolio is required, showcasing previous work in graphic design, video editing, and motion content.

- Proficient in Adobe Premiere Pro, Capcut, Photoshop, and Canva. 

- Knowledgeable of the ever-changing social media landscape and internet video trends.

- Excellent graphic design skills, including Adobe Photoshop mastery (a plus).

- Strong layout and marketing campaign understanding.



SALARY: 18,000 PHP - 22,000 PHP per month



WORK SCHEDULE & SETUP

- Employment Type: Contractual

- Contract Term: 6 months (renewable based on performance and business needs)

- Work Setup: Remote 

- 5 working days per week with 2 rest days

- 8 working hours per day with a 1-hour lunch break

- Schedule may vary depending on business needs

title: Graphic Designer — eCommerce Website & Marketing Graphics
description:
About Us

GroundingWell is a $100M revenue eCommerce company selling grounding and earthing health products (bedsheets, mats, shoes) to customers worldwide. We’re a remote team spanning Australia, the USA, Canada, and the Philippines.



What You’ll Do

• Design and iterate on eCommerce website layouts in Figma

• Create marketing graphics, infographics, and visual assets for ads and landing pages

• Simplify complex concepts into clean, visually compelling graphics

• Proactively suggest creative ideas for new graphics and design improvements



Requirements

• 2+ years of experience designing direct response static and video ads for Meta 
/Instagram), TikTok, and/or native ad platforms (required)

• Experience designing website layouts for eCommerce

• Extreme attention to detail, and can translate a creative brief or iteration checklist into a finished ad that matches the intended angle, framework, and emotional trigger

• Can handle high volume output. Expect to produce 15-30+ ad variations per week across new concepts and iterations.

• Comfortable receiving direct, specific feedback and turning revisions fast - same day for minor tweaks (color change, font swap, copy update), 24-48 hours for larger reworks or new concept executions.

• Available to work at least 8 hours per day with 4-5 of those hours aligned with the EST time zone to ensure effective communication.



Why Work With Us

We pay above-market rates and offer generous bonuses for creative ideas that perform well in our marketing. We’re a direct-response advertising company, which means the effectiveness of your creative work is directly measurable by its profitability when used as paid advertising on social media. Great designers earn significantly more in performance bonuses than their base salary. Your graphics will be used across all advertising channels across the entire business. If you’re someone who constantly generates ideas and wants to be recognised and paid for it, this is the role for you.



How to Apply

Send your portfolio (or 3–5 samples of your best work) and a brief message about why you’re interested. Shortlisted candidates will be sent a short application form.

title: AI Video Operator (Replication + Editing | Full Workflow)
description:
We are hiring an AI video operator to create short-form videos (15–45 seconds) by replicating existing high-performing content.



You will be given:



Reference videos

Scripts

Access to AI tools



Your job is to recreate the same video using a different avatar/subject and deliver a fully finished video ready to post.



This is a system-based role. You will be trained on our exact workflow and are expected to follow it precisely.

What You’ll Do

Watch a reference video and break it into scenes

Recreate each scene using AI (image/video generation)

Use prompting to generate realistic visuals

Animate scenes (Veo, Kling, or similar tools)

Add voice (ElevenLabs or similar)

Edit everything together into a final video (cuts, pacing, timing)

Deliver a complete, polished video



Requirements

Experience with AI tools (video, image generation, or voice tools)

Basic understanding of prompting (how to generate consistent visuals)

Video editing skills (CapCut, Premiere, etc.)

Ability to follow instructions EXACTLY

Strong attention to detail (framing, lighting, realism)

Comfortable with repetitive, system-based work

Reliable and available to work daily

Good English communication

IMPORTANT



This is not a creative role.



You must be able to:



Look at a video

Replicate the same structure, pacing, and style

Execute consistently using a defined system



Please list experience with ai tools to create videos as well as with video editing. Please include screenshots of proof of you using the tools as well as video examples using ai to create fully made ai videos. 



If you cannot follow a structured process, do not apply.

title: Operations & Growth Manager (OGM)
description:
Operations & Growth Manager (OGM)

(Part-Time, Remote – Australian Business Hours)



Are you someone who naturally brings order to chaos and takes the lead?

Do you thrive in fast-moving environments where things change daily, and your ability to stay organised, think ahead, and keep everything running smoothly actually matters?

We’re looking for a highly capable Operations and Growth Manager (OGM) to support a growing home services cleaning business based in Victoria, Australia.

This is not a typical “VA” role.

This is an opportunity to step into a key operational position within the business for the long-term, starting part-time (20 hours per week), with a clear pathway to full-time as the business continues to grow and can justify a full-time position.

________________________________________



About the Role

This role sits at the centre of the business operations.

Upon starting, your focus will be on learning and managing our job management system (ServiceM8), supporting job scheduling, coordinating workflows, and ensuring nothing falls through the cracks.

Over time, the role will evolve into a broader operational and growth support position, where you will contribute to improving systems, supporting customer workflows, and assisting with business development activities such as lead generation.

You will work closely with the business owner and play a critical role in helping the business scale and also maintain excellent customer service and delivery.

________________________________________



Key Responsibilities

Operations & Job Management (Primary Focus)

• Learn and manage ServiceM8 (job scheduling and workflow management). 

• Coordinate daily job schedules and ensure efficient allocation of work. 

• Monitor job progress and ensure tasks are completed on time. 

• Adjust schedules dynamically as priorities shift. 

• Maintain clean, accurate and up-to-date job data. 

________________________________________

CRM & Workflow Management

• Manage and maintain our CRM system (Salesforce). 

• Track leads, jobs, employees, and customer interactions. 

• Support pipeline visibility and follow-up processes.

• Ensure no leads or opportunities are missed. 

________________________________________

Customer Communication (Non-Phone Initially)

• Manage inboxes and respond to customer enquiries via
 and messaging. 

• Handle follow-ups, confirmations, and basic coordination. 

• Maintain a high standard of written communication and professionalism. 

________________________________________

Process Improvement & Admin Support

• Identify inefficiencies and help streamline workflows. 

• Support the creation and documentation of SOPs. 

• Assist with general operational and administrative tasks as required. 

________________________________________

Growth Support (Introduced Over Time)

• Assist with lead generation and tracking activities. 

• Support and drive business development initiatives as the role evolves. 

________________________________________



About You

You are not just organised, you are operationally sharp and treat the business like it’s your own.

You are dynamic in the way you think and operate – you have strong attention to detail and doing things right, and you also have the ability to be creative, innovative and agile. 

You take ownership, communicate clearly, and naturally stay one step ahead.

You are comfortable working in an environment where priorities can shift, and you can adapt quickly without losing structure, and can wear multiple hats.

You are not a typical ‘task taker,’ you think ahead and take initiative because you truly care about the success of the business, and not just ‘getting paid.’

You genuinely value growth, integrity, learning and thinking of ways to have a greater impact in all that you do.

You MUST have your own safe, private and dedicated working environment with a dedicated computer, strong internet, phone, and power infrastructure to ensure punctuality and reliability.

________________________________________



Experience & Skills

• Minimum of 4 years of experience working with CRM systems (e.g. Salesforce, Go High Level, HubSpot or similar) is essential. 

• Minimum 2 years of experience with job management or scheduling systems (e.g. ServiceM8 or similar) is highly regarded, but not required.

• Marketing and business development experience is highly regarded.

• Strong written English and communication skills.

• High attention to detail and accuracy. 

• Strong organisational and time management skills. 

• Tech-savvy with the ability to learn new systems quickly. 

________________________________________



Personal Attributes

• Proactive and takes initiative 

• Highly responsive and reliable 

• Able to prioritise and stay calm under pressure 

• Strong sense of accountability and integrity 

• Adaptable and comfortable in a fast-moving environment 

• Punctual and consistent in communication and delivery 

________________________________________



What’s on Offer

• Part-time role: 20 hours per week (4 hours per day, Monday–Friday). 

• Remote position (must be available during Australian business hours). 

• Clear pathway to full-time as the business grows. 

• Opportunity to step into a key operational role within a growing business. 

• Work directly with the business owner and contribute to real growth outcomes. 

________________________________________



How to Apply

Please submit:

• Your CV 

• A short summary outlining your experience with CRM systems and any scheduling/job management tools and anything else you deem relevant. 

• Briefly explain how you typically stay organised in a fast-paced environment and what sets you apart from other candidates. Please ensure your summary is written by you tailored to this role. Do NOT provide an AI generated response (I can tell). 



Important note: 

Please ONLY apply if you are open to growing into a full-time role over time and are looking for a long-term position within one business only. Further, a lack of punctuality, integrity, professionalism, strong communication with the client will not be tolerated. Please only apply for this role if you think you would be in your natural environment and it strongly aligns with your CV. If this role feels like a ‘stretch’ for you and doesn’t align with your skillset or experience, please do not apply.

My Instagram

title: AI Video Editor - Pixar-Style Animated Ads (Skincare DTC Brand)
description:
We're a fast-growing Italian DTC skincare brand producing AI-generated animated ad videos in a Pixar-inspired style. We need a highly skilled editor who can own the full pipeline, from AI image generation to final video delivery, working independently from a script and visual reference we provide.



This is an ongoing, long-term position. If you're fast, autonomous, and obsessed with quality, this is for you.

You'll be joining an established team with creative strategists on board. Even though scripts are in Italian, our workflow is fully structured so language is never a barrier, everything you need to execute is clear and ready to go.



**WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR**

- Strong eye for quality, you notice when something looks off and you fix it

- Able to work from a brief and deliver with minimal back and forth

- Reliable, responsive, and comfortable with ongoing project work

- Beauty or skincare content experience is a plus, not a requirement



**WHAT YOU'LL DO**

- Receive a script + reference video from us

- Generate Pixar-style AI images for each scene using ChatGPT or Nano Banana Pro

- Animate each image into a clip using Kling AI, Veo 3, or Seedance 2.0

- Edit and assemble clips into a polished final video ad

- Deliver clean, ready-to-run files within agreed deadlines



**TOOLS YOU MUST KNOW WELL**

--> Kling AI, Veo 3, Seedance 2.0, Nano Banana Pro, ChatGPT, CapCut (or similar)

Generic video editing experience is NOT relevant here.

We only want people who actively use these specific AI tools.



**?? [READ THIS BEFORE YOU APPLY] - APPLICATION REQUIREMENT**

You must attach at least 2–3 examples of AI-generated animated videos in a Pixar or 3D animated style. Generic reels, editing showreels, or AI image portfolios without animation will not be considered. Applications without relevant video samples will be declined immediately, no exceptions.



No samples = no reply.



Looking forward to building something great together. ????
